# Full codebase review and optimization (2026-03-10 09:40Z)

_**User**_

Full Codebase Review & Optimization Task
Analyze the entire project codebase of this call-center application and generate a detailed technical review report.
The goal is to verify that the system is:

logically correct
optimized for performance
scalable
free from duplicate or unnecessary code
maintainable and cleanly structured
providing good UI/UX
This application includes:
Asterisk integration
Agent monitoring system
Wallboard

Reporting system
Supervisor monitoring tools
Agent performance analytics
Perform the following analysis.

1. Backend Code Review

Analyze all backend modules and services.

Check for:

duplicate functions
inefficient logic
unnecessary loops
redundant API calls
missing error handling
inconsistent naming conventions

Verify correctness of:

agent session logic
call tracking logic
queue event processing
reporting calculations
Suggest improvements where needed.

2. Database Structure Review

Analyze all database tables and relationships.

Verify:

schema normalization
correct indexing
foreign key relationships
query performance

Check important tables such as:

agent_sessions
agent_status_log
call_activity
agent_daily_stats
agent_pause_log
queue_stats
Suggest schema improvements and missing indexes.

3. Asterisk Integration Review

Analyze how the system integrates with Asterisk.

Verify:

AMI event processing
call lifecycle handling
queue events
call transfer handling
agent monitoring commands
Ensure events are processed correctly and not duplicated.

4. Real-Time Monitoring System

Review the implementation of:
agent live monitoring
wallboard dashboard
queue statistics
call activity updates
Check that the monitoring system is efficient and can handle 100+ agents simultaneously.
Suggest improvements for reducing latency.

5. Reporting System Review

Analyze the historical reporting system.
Verify correctness of calculations such as:
talk time
pause time
login time

AHT

occupancy

conversion rate

Check that reporting queries are optimized and scalable.

6. Duplicate Code Detection

Scan the entire project for:
duplicate logic
repeated functions
unused files
unused imports

dead code

Provide a list of components or modules that can be refactored.

7. Performance Analysis

Identify performance issues such as:

slow database queries
unnecessary API calls
heavy synchronous operations
inefficient loops
Suggest optimizations such as:
caching
query improvements
background processing

8. Frontend Code Review

Analyze all frontend components.

Verify:

component structure
code reuse
state management
rendering efficiency
responsiveness
Ensure UI components are reusable and cleanly organized.

9. UI / UX Review

Evaluate the user interface and user experience.

Review:

dashboard layout
agent monitoring pages
reporting pages
navigation flow
data readability
Suggest improvements for:
better usability
clearer data visualization
improved layout hierarchy

10. Security Review

Check for potential security issues.

Verify:

authentication logic
authorization rules
API input validation
protection against SQL injection and XSS
Ensure sensitive operations require proper permissions.

11. Scalability Assessment

Evaluate whether the system can scale to support:

200+ agents
high call volumes
large reporting datasets
Recommend improvements if needed.

12. Feature Enhancement Suggestions

Based on the current implementation, suggest:
improvements to monitoring features
improvements to reporting analytics
additional supervisor tools
UI improvements

13. Output Format

Generate a structured technical report including:

System architecture overview
Backend analysis
Database analysis
Monitoring system review
Reporting system review
Performance issues
Duplicate code findings
Security observations
UI/UX improvement suggestions
Recommended optimizations

Each issue should include:

description
impact
recommended fix

development/test/server/auth.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport { queryOne, query } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = { 1: 'superadmin', 2: 'admin', 3: 'user', 4: 'campaign', 5: 'agent' };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function roleName(roleId) {\\\\\\\\n  return ROLES[Number(roleId)] || 'user';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function findUserByUsername(username) {\\\\\\\\n  return queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, permission_group_id, change_password_required, phone_login_name, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE username = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [username]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function verifyLogin(username, password) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = await findUserByUsername(username);\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) return null;\\\\\\\\n  if (user.account_status !== 1) return null;\\\\\\\\n  const ok = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n  if (!ok) return null;\\\\\\\\n  return user;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateLastLogin(userId) {\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), login_status = 1 WHERE id = ?', [userId]);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function updatePassword(userId, newPassword) {\\\\\\\\n  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(newPassword, 10);\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET password_hash = ?, change_password_required = 0 WHERE id = ?', [hash, userId]);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function verifyCurrentPassword(userId, password) {\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne('SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id = ?', [userId]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!row) return false;\\\\\\\\n  return bcrypt.compare(password, row.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getEnabledModules(roleId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (Number(roleId) === 1) return null; // superadmin = all modules\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT module_key FROM role_modules WHERE role = ? AND enabled = 1',\\\\\\\\n      [Number(roleId)]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return rows.map(r =&gt; r.module_key);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return [];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function buildSessionUser(user, modules) {\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    id: user.id,\\\\\\\\n    username: user.username,\\\\\\\\n    email: user.email || '',\\\\\\\\n    role: roleName(user.role),\\\\\\\\n    parent_id: user.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n    modules, // null = superadmin (all access), array = enabled module keys\\\\\\\\n    change_password_required: !!user.change_password_required,\\\\\\\\n    phone_login_name: user.phone_login_name,\\\\\\\\n    phone_login_number: user.phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":67}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/auth.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport { queryOne, query } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = { 1: 'superadmin', 2: 'admin', 3: 'user', 4: 'campaign', 5: 'agent' };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function roleName(roleId) {\\\\\\\\n  return ROLES[Number(roleId)] || 'user';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function findUserByUsername(username) {\\\\\\\\n  return queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, permission_group_id, change_password_required, phone_login_name, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE username = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [username]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function verifyLogin(username, password) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = await findUserByUsername(username);\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) return null;\\\\\\\\n  if (user.account_status !== 1) return null;\\\\\\\\n  const ok = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n  if (!ok) return null;\\\\\\\\n  return user;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateLastLogin(userId) {\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), login_status = 1 WHERE id = ?', [userId]);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function updatePassword(userId, newPassword) {\\\\\\\\n  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(newPassword, 10);\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET password_hash = ?, change_password_required = 0 WHERE id = ?', [hash, userId]);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function verifyCurrentPassword(userId, password) {\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne('SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE id = ?', [userId]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!row) return false;\\\\\\\\n  return bcrypt.compare(password, row.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getEnabledModules(roleId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (Number(roleId) === 1) return null; // superadmin = all modules\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT module_key FROM role_modules WHERE role = ? AND enabled = 1',\\\\\\\\n      [Number(roleId)]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return rows.map(r =&gt; r.module_key);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return [];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function buildSessionUser(user, modules) {\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    id: user.id,\\\\\\\\n    username: user.username,\\\\\\\\n    email: user.email || '',\\\\\\\\n    role: roleName(user.role),\\\\\\\\n    parent_id: user.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n    modules, // null = superadmin (all access), array = enabled module keys\\\\\\\\n    change_password_required: !!user.change_password_required,\\\\\\\\n    phone_login_name: user.phone_login_name,\\\\\\\\n    phone_login_number: user.phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":67,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":2210,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development/test/server/seed.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/seed.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dotenv/config';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport mysql from 'mysql2/promise';\\\\\\\\nimport { fileURLToPath } from 'url';\\\\\\\\nimport { dirname, join } from 'path';\\\\\\\\nimport { readFileSync } from 'fs';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst defaultPassword = 'demo123';\\\\\\\\nconst hash = await bcrypt.hash(defaultPassword, 10);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst dbConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',\\\\\\\\n  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306', 10),\\\\\\\\n  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',\\\\\\\\n  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',\\\\\\\\n  multipleStatements: true,\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function run() {\\\\\\\\n  let conn;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    conn = await mysql.createConnection(dbConfig);\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Creating database pbx_callcentre if not exists...');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query('CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS pbx_callcentre DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query('USE pbx_callcentre');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const schemaPath = join(__dirname, '..', 'docs', 'database-schema.sql');\\\\\\\\n    const schema = readFileSync(schemaPath, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(schema);\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Schema applied.');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const migrationsDir = join(__dirname, '..', 'docs', 'migrations');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const { readdirSync } = await import('fs');\\\\\\\\n      const files = readdirSync(migrationsDir).filter(f =&gt; f.endsWith('.sql')).sort();\\\\\\\\n      for (const file of files) {\\\\\\\\n        const sql = readFileSync(join(migrationsDir, file), 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n        await conn.query(sql);\\\\\\\\n        console.log(&#96;Migration applied: ${file}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Migrations folder read skipped:', e.message);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [existing] = await conn.query('SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ?', ['superadmin']);\\\\\\\\n    if (existing.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Seed users already exist. Skipping seed.');\\\\\\\\n      process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required) VALUES\\\\\\\\n       ('superadmin', ?, 'superadmin@localhost', 1, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('admin', ?, 'admin@localhost', 2, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('user', ?, 'user@localhost', 3, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('agent', ?, 'agent@localhost', 5, 2, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('agent2', ?, 'agent2@localhost', 5, 2, 1, 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [hash, hash, hash, hash, hash]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Seeded users: superadmin, admin, user, agent, agent2 (password: demo123)');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO sip_extensions (tenant_id, name) VALUES (2, '1001'), (2, '1002')&#96;\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Seeded SIP extensions 1001, 1002 for tenant 2. Agents (agent, agent2) share same tenant; one can take 1001, other 1002.');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [crmRows] = await conn.query('SELECT id FROM crm_customers WHERE tenant_id = 2 LIMIT 1').catch(() =&gt; [[]]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!crmRows || crmRows.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO crm_customers (tenant_id, customer_id, name, phone, email, notes) VALUES\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C001', 'Acme Corp', '+15551234001', 'contact@acme.example.com', 'Preferred customer'),\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C002', 'Jane Smith', '+15551234002', 'jane@example.com', NULL),\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C003', 'John Doe', '+15551234003', NULL, 'Callback requested')&#96;\\\\\\\\n      ).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Seeded CRM customers C001, C002, C003 for tenant 2.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Seed failed:', err.message || err.code || err);\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('MySQL is not running or not reachable. Start MySQL or set DB_HOST/DB_PORT in .env');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_ACCESS_DENIED_ERROR') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('Check DB_USER and DB_PASSWORD in .env');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  } finally {\\\\\\\\n    if (conn) await conn.end();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrun();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":93}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst defaultPassword = 'demo123';\\\\\\\\nconst hash = await bcrypt.hash(defaultPassword, 10);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst dbConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',\\\\\\\\n  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || '3306', 10),\\\\\\\\n  user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root',\\\\\\\\n  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '',\\\\\\\\n  multipleStatements: true,\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function run() {\\\\\\\\n  let conn;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    conn = await mysql.createConnection(dbConfig);\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Creating database pbx_callcentre if not exists...');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query('CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS pbx_callcentre DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query('USE pbx_callcentre');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const schemaPath = join(__dirname, '..', 'docs', 'database-schema.sql');\\\\\\\\n    const schema = readFileSync(schemaPath, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(schema);\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Schema applied.');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const migrationsDir = join(__dirname, '..', 'docs', 'migrations');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const { readdirSync } = await import('fs');\\\\\\\\n      const files = readdirSync(migrationsDir).filter(f =&gt; f.endsWith('.sql')).sort();\\\\\\\\n      for (const file of files) {\\\\\\\\n        const sql = readFileSync(join(migrationsDir, file), 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n        await conn.query(sql);\\\\\\\\n        console.log(&#96;Migration applied: ${file}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Migrations folder read skipped:', e.message);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [existing] = await conn.query('SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ?', ['superadmin']);\\\\\\\\n    if (existing.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Seed users already exist. Skipping seed.');\\\\\\\\n      process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required) VALUES\\\\\\\\n       ('superadmin', ?, 'superadmin@localhost', 1, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('admin', ?, 'admin@localhost', 2, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('user', ?, 'user@localhost', 3, NULL, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('agent', ?, 'agent@localhost', 5, 2, 1, 0),\\\\\\\\n       ('agent2', ?, 'agent2@localhost', 5, 2, 1, 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [hash, hash, hash, hash, hash]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Seeded users: superadmin, admin, user, agent, agent2 (password: demo123)');\\\\\\\\n    await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO sip_extensions (tenant_id, name) VALUES (2, '1001'), (2, '1002')&#96;\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Seeded SIP extensions 1001, 1002 for tenant 2. Agents (agent, agent2) share same tenant; one can take 1001, other 1002.');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [crmRows] = await conn.query('SELECT id FROM crm_customers WHERE tenant_id = 2 LIMIT 1').catch(() =&gt; [[]]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!crmRows || crmRows.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      await conn.query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO crm_customers (tenant_id, customer_id, name, phone, email, notes) VALUES\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C001', 'Acme Corp', '+15551234001', 'contact@acme.example.com', 'Preferred customer'),\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C002', 'Jane Smith', '+15551234002', 'jane@example.com', NULL),\\\\\\\\n         (2, 'C003', 'John Doe', '+15551234003', NULL, 'Callback requested')&#96;\\\\\\\\n      ).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Seeded CRM customers C001, C002, C003 for tenant 2.');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Seed failed:', err.message || err.code || err);\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('MySQL is not running or not reachable. Start MySQL or set DB_HOST/DB_PORT in .env');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_ACCESS_DENIED_ERROR') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('Check DB_USER and DB_PASSWORD in .env');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  } finally {\\\\\\\\n    if (conn) await conn.end();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrun();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":93,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":3739,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\seed.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":93}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"a19fb1be-49fc-4878-acc9-4e2d9fa904e7\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"769ce791-3ca6-4835-a5b6-0d9c3d1d1137\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\ Optional Phase 3 extension.\\\\\\\\n * When configured, can connect to AMI or ARI WebSocket and push events into call-handler.\\\\\\\\n * For now we rely on dialplan HTTP callbacks (IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function startAsteriskEvents() {\\\\\\\\n  // Future: connect to AMI or ARI, subscribe to channel/bridge events, call call-handler.\\\\\\\\n  if (process.env.ASTERISK_AMI_HOST || process.env.ASTERISK_ARI_WS) {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[asterisk-events] AMI/ARI WebSocket not yet implemented; using HTTP callbacks.');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":12}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/asterisk-events.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Asterisk event subscription (AMI/ARI). development/test/server/realtime.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/realtime.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Real-time event delivery via Server-Sent Events (SSE).\\\\\\\\n * Agents subscribe by agent user id; call-handler and routes broadcast events.\\\\\\\\n * Wallboard supervisors subscribe by tenant id for live dashboard updates.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst clients = new Map(); // agentUserId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst wallboardClients = new Map(); // tenantId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS = 25000;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction sendEvent(res, event) {\\\\\\\\n  if (res.writableEnded) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = typeof event === 'string' ? event : JSON.stringify(event);\\\\\\\\n  res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe an agent to real-time events. Call with the Express res for SSE.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId - req.agentUser.id\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (must not have been sent yet)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!clients.has(key)) clients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  clients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) {\\\\\\\\n      clearInterval(heartbeat);\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Unsubscribe one response for an agent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) clients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast an event to a single agent (all their tabs).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToAgent(agentUserId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe a wallboard viewer to real-time events for a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (SSE stream)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!wallboardClients.has(key)) wallboardClients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  wallboardClients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) { clearInterval(heartbeat); return; }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) wallboardClients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all wallboard viewers watching a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set || set.size === 0) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all agents in a tenant (e.g. queue activity for supervisor).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToTenant(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Event types: incoming_call, call_answered, call_ended, agent_status, queue_activity, call_held, call_resumed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const EventTypes = {\\\\\\\\n  INCOMING_CALL: 'incoming_call',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ANSWERED: 'call_answered',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ENDED: 'call_ended',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT_STATUS: 'agent_status',\\\\\\\\n  QUEUE_ACTIVITY: 'queue_activity',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_HELD: 'call_held',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_RESUMED: 'call_resumed',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":136}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/realtime.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Real-time event delivery via Server-Sent Events (SSE).\\\\\\\\n * Agents subscribe by agent user id; call-handler and routes broadcast events.\\\\\\\\n * Wallboard supervisors subscribe by tenant id for live dashboard updates.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst clients = new Map(); // agentUserId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst wallboardClients = new Map(); // tenantId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS = 25000;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction sendEvent(res, event) {\\\\\\\\n  if (res.writableEnded) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = typeof event === 'string' ? event : JSON.stringify(event);\\\\\\\\n  res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe an agent to real-time events. Call with the Express res for SSE.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId - req.agentUser.id\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (must not have been sent yet)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) {\\\\\\\\n      clearInterval(heartbeat);\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Unsubscribe {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) clients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast an event to a single agent (all their =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set || set.size === 0) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n 'incoming_call',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ANSWERED: 'call_answered',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ENDED: 'call_ended',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT_STATUS: 'agent_status',\\\\\\\\n  QUEUE_ACTIVITY: 'queue_activity',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_HELD: 'call_held',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_RESUMED: 'call_resumed',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":136,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4008,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\realtime.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":136}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"07be9cf4-f791-4be5-b74e-6199829c1c33\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"a1366bb4-f09f-42b7-a38e-ede0739a84c2\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.886Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_fac2a2e6-bfc4-4b2c-91f1-31fee2a65aa\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_fac2a2e6-bfc4-4b2c-91f1-31fee2a65aa\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Agent session and status log for performance monitoring.\\\\\\\\n * - agent_sessions: one row per login→logout (session_duration_sec, logout_reason).\\\\\\\\n * - agent_status_log: one row per state (READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT) with start/end/duration.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst STATUS_LOG_TABLE = 'agent_status_log';\\\\\\\\nconst SESSIONS_TABLE = 'agent_sessions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Map agent_status.status (UI/ARI) to agent_status_log.status (canonical).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function mapToLogStatus(rawStatus, breakName) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (rawStatus || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LOGGEDIN' || s === 'LoginInitiated') return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'Ringing') return 'RINGING';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'On Call' || s === 'Outbound' || s === 'Transferring') return 'IN_CALL';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'PAUSED' || (breakName != null &amp;&amp; breakName !== '')) return 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'After_Call_Work' || s === 'ACW' || s === 'WRAPUP') return 'WRAP_UP';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LoggedOut' || s === 'LoginFailed') return 'LOGOUT';\\\\\\\\n  return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Start a new agent session (on login success). Idempotent: if an open session exists for this agent, close it first then create new.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId - phone_login_number / extension\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} [agentUserId] - users.id\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;number|null&gt;} session id or null if table missing\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function startAgentSession(tenantId, agentId, agentUserId = null) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open session (stale from crash/disconnect)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = 'connection_lost'\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open status log row for this agent\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${SESSIONS_TABLE} (tenant_id, agent_id, agent_user_id, login_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId, aid, agentUserId ?? null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const row = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionId = row?.id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionId) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'READY', NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionId, tenantId, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return sessionId;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return null;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions startAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * End the current agent session (on logout / force logout / login failed).\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {'normal'|'forced'|'connection_lost'} [logoutReason] - default 'normal'\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;boolean&gt;} true if a session was closed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function endAgentSession(agentId, logoutReason = 'normal') {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid) return false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close current open status log (e.g. READY or PAUSED)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Insert LOGOUT transition\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id, tenant_id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionRow) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, end_time, duration_sec) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'LOGOUT', NOW(), NOW(), 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionRow.id, sessionRow.tenant_id, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const result = await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = ?\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [logoutReason, aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return (result?.affectedRows ?? 0) &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return false;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions endAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Log a state change (close previous open log row, insert new one). Call after updating agent_status.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} logStatus - READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT\\\\\\\\n * @param {{ pauseReason?: string }} [opts]\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function logAgentStatusChange(tenantId, agentId, logStatus, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return;\\\\\\\\n  const { pauseReason = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close previous open log row\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, pause_reason) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [sessionRow?.id ?? null, tenantId, aid, logStatus, pauseReason]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions logAgentStatusChange:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":133}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Agent session and status log for performance monitoring.\\\\\\\\n * - agent_sessions: one row per login→logout (session_duration_sec, logout_reason).\\\\\\\\n * - agent_status_log: one row per state (READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT) with start/end/duration.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst STATUS_LOG_TABLE = 'agent_status_log';\\\\\\\\nconst SESSIONS_TABLE = 'agent_sessions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Map agent_status.status (UI/ARI) to agent_status_log.status (canonical).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function mapToLogStatus(rawStatus, breakName) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (rawStatus || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LOGGEDIN' || s === 'LoginInitiated') return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'Ringing') return 'RINGING';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'On Call' || s === 'Outbound' || s === 'Transferring') return 'IN_CALL';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'PAUSED' || (breakName != null &amp;&amp; breakName !== '')) return 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'After_Call_Work' || s === 'ACW' || s === 'WRAPUP') return 'WRAP_UP';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LoggedOut' || s === 'LoginFailed') return 'LOGOUT';\\\\\\\\n  return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Start a new agent session (on login success). Idempotent: if an open session exists for this agent, close it first then create new.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId - phone_login_number / extension\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} [agentUserId] - users.id\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;number|null&gt;} session id or null if table missing\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function startAgentSession(tenantId, agentId, agentUserId = null) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open session (stale from crash/disconnect)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = 'connection_lost'\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open status log row for this agent\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${SESSIONS_TABLE} (tenant_id, agent_id, agent_user_id, login_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId, aid, agentUserId ?? null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const row = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionId = row?.id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionId) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'READY', NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionId, tenantId, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return sessionId;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return null;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions startAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * End the current agent session (on logout / force logout / login failed).\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {'normal'|'forced'|'connection_lost'} [logoutReason] - default 'normal'\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;boolean&gt;} true if a session was closed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function endAgentSession(agentId, logoutReason = 'normal') {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid) return false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close current open status log (e.g. READY or PAUSED)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Insert LOGOUT transition\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id, tenant_id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionRow) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, end_time, duration_sec) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'LOGOUT', NOW(), NOW(), 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionRow.id, sessionRow.tenant_id, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const result = await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = ?\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [logoutReason, aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return (result?.affectedRows ?? 0) &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return false;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions endAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Log a state change (close previous open log row, insert new one). Call after updating agent_status.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} logStatus - READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT\\\\\\\\n * @param {{ pauseReason?: string }} [opts]\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function logAgentStatusChange(tenantId, agentId, logStatus, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return;\\\\\\\\n  const { pauseReason = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close previous open log row\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, pause_reason) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [sessionRow?.id ?? null, tenantId, aid, logStatus, pauseReason]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions logAgentStatusChange:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":133,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":5680,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":133}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"6c053b49-0793-46ad-8107-d5d5de3249a4\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"b86756e5-4ca6-4109-9a18-ca7d816a388e\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.886Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_6a1f5fc9-4d4a-44d8-a7a3-94d8f7f41a0\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_6a1f5fc9-4d4a-44d8-a7a3-94d8f7f41a0\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolves which agent (user) is assigned to a PJSIP extension.\\\\\\\\n * Uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id when set, with fallback to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolve extension name to agent user (by tenant).\\\\\\\\n * Tries sip_extensions.agent_user_id first, then falls back to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} tenantId - Optional. If provided, uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id for this tenant first.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name/number (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ id: number, parent_id: number }|null&gt;} User row (id, parent_id) or null\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, extensionName) {\\\\\\\\n  const ext = String(extensionName || '').trim().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId))) {\\\\\\\\n    const byAssignment = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT u.id, u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       FROM sip_extensions e\\\\\\\\n       INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.agent_user_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n       WHERE e.tenant_id = ? AND e.name = ? AND e.agent_user_id IS NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [Number(tenantId), ext]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (byAssignment) return byAssignment;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const byPhoneLogin = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, parent_id FROM users WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [ext]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return byPhoneLogin || null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set or clear the persistent assignment of an extension to an agent.\\\\\\\\n * Call after ensureSipExtensionForAgent when creating/updating an agent.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId - Tenant id\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} userId - User id to assign, or null to clear\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setExtensionAgentUserId(tenantId, extensionName, userId) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    'UPDATE sip_extensions SET agent_user_id = ? WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ?',\\\\\\\\n    [userId ?? null, tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":53}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolves which agent (user) is assigned to a PJSIP extension.\\\\\\\\n * Uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id when set, with fallback to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolve extension name to agent user (by tenant).\\\\\\\\n * Tries sip_extensions.agent_user_id first, then falls back to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} tenantId - Optional. If provided, uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id for this tenant first.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name/number (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ id: number, parent_id: number }|null&gt;} User row (id, parent_id) or null\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, extensionName) {\\\\\\\\n  const ext = String(extensionName || '').trim().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId))) {\\\\\\\\n    const byAssignment = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT u.id, u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       FROM sip_extensions e\\\\\\\\n       INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.agent_user_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n       WHERE e.tenant_id = ? AND e.name = ? AND e.agent_user_id IS NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [Number(tenantId), ext]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (byAssignment) return byAssignment;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const byPhoneLogin = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, parent_id FROM users WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [ext]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return byPhoneLogin || null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set or clear the persistent assignment of an extension to an agent.\\\\\\\\n * Call after ensureSipExtensionForAgent when creating/updating an agent.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId - Tenant id\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} userId - User id to assign, or null to clear\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setExtensionAgentUserId(tenantId, extensionName, userId) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    'UPDATE sip_extensions SET agent_user_id = ? WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ?',\\\\\\\\n    [userId ?? null, tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":53,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":2068,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":53}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"c0597e92-b884-4908-9777-c6ad58edbb20\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"c079ced1-58fc-461a-845f-b7edcfa57c3d\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":
