\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.886Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\"}\",\"1a23f8ff-68d8-4153-bfb1-bc9a0f208cf0\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"b96bbc1f-3625-45c2-9ba7-8b2b04f2178b\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.886Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_b12f3938-9c5b-4a31-96c2-4c97067f682\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_b12f3938-9c5b-4a31-96c2-4c97067f682\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Queue ring strategy: order queue members by strategy for incoming queue calls.\\\\\\\\n * Used by Stasis queue-dashboard to pick which agent(s) to try and in what order.\\\\\\\\n * All strategies are per-queue and work for any number of queues and any number of agents per queue.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Default behaviour (all queues and agents): only available agents are considered.\\\\\\\\n * Agents who are LoggedOut, LoginFailed, Outbound, On Call, Ringing, or Transferring are excluded\\\\\\\\n * so the next call always goes to the next available agent.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Strategies:\\\\\\\\n * - ringall: fixed order by member_name (first agent first every time)\\\\\\\\n * - linear: same as ringall (member_name order)\\\\\\\\n * - rrordered: round-robin by position (each new call tries next agent in list)\\\\\\\\n * - rrmemory: round-robin by last answered (next call goes to agent after who last answered)\\\\\\\\n * - leastrecent: agent with oldest last_called time first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - fewestcalls: agent with fewest answered calls first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - random: shuffle order per call\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// In-memory state per queue: rrordered = last tried index, rrmemory = last agent who answered\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastIndex = new Map();\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastAgent = new Map();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeStrategy(str) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (str || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'roundrobin' || s === 'rrordered') return 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'rrmemory') return 'rrmemory';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'leastrecent') return 'leastrecent';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'fewestcalls') return 'fewestcalls';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'random') return 'random';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'linear') return 'linear';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'ringall') return 'ringall';\\\\\\\\n  return 'ringall'; // default\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction shuffle(arr) {\\\\\\\\n  const a = [...arr];\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = a.length - 1; i &gt; 0; i--) {\\\\\\\\n    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\\\\\\\\n    [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return a;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get queue members ordered by the queue's ring strategy.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} queueIdOrName - Queue id (numeric) or queue name\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ members: string[], strategy: string }&gt;} Ordered list of member_name (extension numbers) and strategy used\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getOrderedQueueMembers(queueIdOrName) {\\\\\\\\n  const raw = (queueIdOrName || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!raw) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE name = ? LIMIT 1', [raw]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue &amp;&amp; /^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+$/.test(raw)) {\\\\\\\\n    queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1', [parseInt(raw, 10)]);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const queueName = queue.name;\\\\\\\\n  const mapKey = String(queueName).trim(); // canonical key for in-memory state (all queues)\\\\\\\\n  // When no strategy is set in DB, default to rrordered so calls distribute across agents\\\\\\\\n  const rawStrategy = queue.strategy != null &amp;&amp; String(queue.strategy).trim() !== '' ? queue.strategy : 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  const strategy = normalizeStrategy(rawStrategy);\\\\\\\\n  const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT member_name FROM queue_members WHERE queue_name = ? AND (paused = 0 OR paused IS NULL) ORDER BY member_name',\\\\\\\\n    [queueName]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  let members = (rows || []).map((r) =&gt; String(r.member_name || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  const rawMembers = [...members];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Single query to get all agent_status rows — classify each as available, busy, or offline\\\\\\\\n  const allStatusRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT agent_id, extension_number, status FROM agent_status'\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const availableIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  const busyIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of allStatusRows || []) {\\\\\\\\n    const ext = String(r.extension_number || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const aid = String(r.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const st = (r.status || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n    const stLower = st.toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    // Treat LoggedOut / login in-progress / SIP phone ringing as offline\\\\\\\\n    if (\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loggedout' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loginfailed' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'logininitiated' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'sip phone ringing'\\\\\\\\n    ) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Treat PAUSED / Break statuses as not available for queue calls\\\\\\\\n    if (stLower === 'paused' || stLower.includes('break')) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Busy: on call / ringing / transferring / outbound\\\\\\\\n    if (['On Call', 'Ringing', 'Transferring', 'Outbound'].includes(st)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) busyIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) busyIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) availableIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) availableIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  members = members.filter((m) =&gt; availableIds.has(m) &amp;&amp; !busyIds.has(m));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log('[queue-strategy]', queueName, '| strategy:', strategy,\\\\\\\\n    '| rawMembers:', rawMembers,\\\\\\\\n    '| available:', [...availableIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| busy:', [...busyIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| finalMembers:', members);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (members.length === 0) return { members: [], strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  switch (strategy) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'random':\\\\\\\\n      members = shuffle(members);\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrordered': {\\\\\\\\n      const last = queueLastIndex.get(mapKey) ?? -1;\\\\\\\\n      const next = Math.max(0, (last + 1) % Math.max(1, members.length));\\\\\\\\n      queueLastIndex.set(mapKey, next);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(next), ...members.slice(0, next)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrmemory': {\\\\\\\\n      const lastAgent = queueLastAgent.get(mapKey);\\\\\\\\n      const idx = lastAgent ? members.indexOf(lastAgent) : -1;\\\\\\\\n      const start = idx &gt;= 0 ? (idx + 1) % members.length : 0;\\\\\\\\n      if (members.length &gt; 0) queueLastAgent.set(mapKey, members[start] ?? members[0]);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(start), ...members.slice(0, start)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'leastrecent': {\\\\\\\\n      const recents = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, MAX(end_time) AS last_called FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const lastByExt = new Map((recents || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), r.last_called]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ta = lastByExt.get(a) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(a)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        const tb = lastByExt.get(b) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(b)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ta !== tb) return ta - tb; // least recent first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'fewestcalls': {\\\\\\\\n      const counts = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND status = 'answered' AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const countByExt = new Map((counts || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), Number(r.cnt) || 0]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ca = countByExt.get(a) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        const cb = countByExt.get(b) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ca !== cb) return ca - cb; // fewest first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'linear':\\\\\\\\n    case 'ringall':\\\\\\\\n    default:\\\\\\\\n      // already ordered by member_name (stable, deterministic)\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { members, strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update last agent for rrmemory when a call is answered (so next call uses next agent).\\\\\\\\n * Uses same canonical queue key as getOrderedQueueMembers so strategy state stays consistent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function setQueueLastAgent(queueName, agentExtension) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = queueName != null ? String(queueName).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  const ext = agentExtension != null ? String(agentExtension).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  if (key &amp;&amp; ext) queueLastAgent.set(key, ext);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":186}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Queue ring strategy: order queue members by strategy for incoming queue calls.\\\\\\\\n * Used by Stasis queue-dashboard to pick which agent(s) to try and in what order.\\\\\\\\n * All strategies are per-queue and work for any number of queues and any number of agents per queue.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Default behaviour (all queues and agents): only available agents are considered.\\\\\\\\n * Agents who are LoggedOut, LoginFailed, Outbound, On Call, Ringing, or Transferring are excluded\\\\\\\\n * so the next call always goes to the next available agent.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Strategies:\\\\\\\\n * - ringall: fixed order by member_name (first agent first every time)\\\\\\\\n * - linear: same as ringall (member_name order)\\\\\\\\n * - rrordered: round-robin by position (each new call tries next agent in list)\\\\\\\\n * - rrmemory: round-robin by last answered (next call goes to agent after who last answered)\\\\\\\\n * - leastrecent: agent with oldest last_called time first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - fewestcalls: agent with fewest answered calls first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - random: shuffle order per call\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// In-memory state per queue: rrordered = last tried index, rrmemory = last agent who answered\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastIndex = new Map();\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastAgent = new Map();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeStrategy(str) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (str || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'roundrobin' || s === 'rrordered') return 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'rrmemory') return 'rrmemory';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'leastrecent') return 'leastrecent';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'fewestcalls') return 'fewestcalls';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'random') return 'random';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'linear') return 'linear';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'ringall') return 'ringall';\\\\\\\\n  return 'ringall'; // default\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction shuffle(arr) {\\\\\\\\n  const a = [...arr];\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = a.length - 1; i &gt; 0; i--) {\\\\\\\\n    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\\\\\\\\n    [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return a;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get queue members ordered by the queue's ring strategy.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} queueIdOrName - Queue id (numeric) or queue name\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ members: string[], strategy: string }&gt;} Ordered list of member_name (extension numbers) and strategy used\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getOrderedQueueMembers(queueIdOrName) {\\\\\\\\n  const raw = (queueIdOrName || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!raw) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE name = ? LIMIT 1', [raw]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue &amp;&amp; /^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+$/.test(raw)) {\\\\\\\\n    queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1', [parseInt(raw, 10)]);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const queueName = queue.name;\\\\\\\\n  const mapKey = String(queueName).trim(); // canonical key for in-memory state (all queues)\\\\\\\\n  // When no strategy is set in DB, default to rrordered so calls distribute across agents\\\\\\\\n  const rawStrategy = queue.strategy != null &amp;&amp; String(queue.strategy).trim() !== '' ? queue.strategy : 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  const strategy = normalizeStrategy(rawStrategy);\\\\\\\\n  const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT member_name FROM queue_members WHERE queue_name = ? AND (paused = 0 OR paused IS NULL) ORDER BY member_name',\\\\\\\\n    [queueName]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  let members = (rows || []).map((r) =&gt; String(r.member_name || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  const rawMembers = [...members];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Single query to get all agent_status rows — classify each as available, busy, or offline\\\\\\\\n  const allStatusRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT agent_id, extension_number, status FROM agent_status'\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const availableIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  const busyIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of allStatusRows || []) {\\\\\\\\n    const ext = String(r.extension_number || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const aid = String(r.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const st = (r.status || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n    const stLower = st.toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    // Treat LoggedOut / login in-progress / SIP phone ringing as offline\\\\\\\\n    if (\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loggedout' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loginfailed' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'logininitiated' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'sip phone ringing'\\\\\\\\n    ) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Treat PAUSED / Break statuses as not available for queue calls\\\\\\\\n    if (stLower === 'paused' || stLower.includes('break')) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Busy: on call / ringing / transferring / outbound\\\\\\\\n    if (['On Call', 'Ringing', 'Transferring', 'Outbound'].includes(st)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) busyIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) busyIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) availableIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) availableIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  members = members.filter((m) =&gt; availableIds.has(m) &amp;&amp; !busyIds.has(m));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log('[queue-strategy]', queueName, '| strategy:', strategy,\\\\\\\\n    '| rawMembers:', rawMembers,\\\\\\\\n    '| available:', [...availableIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| busy:', [...busyIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| finalMembers:', members);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (members.length === 0) return { members: [], strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  switch (strategy) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'random':\\\\\\\\n      members = shuffle(members);\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrordered': {\\\\\\\\n      const last = queueLastIndex.get(mapKey) ?? -1;\\\\\\\\n      const next = Math.max(0, (last + 1) % Math.max(1, members.length));\\\\\\\\n      queueLastIndex.set(mapKey, next);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(next), ...members.slice(0, next)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrmemory': {\\\\\\\\n      const lastAgent = queueLastAgent.get(mapKey);\\\\\\\\n      const idx = lastAgent ? members.indexOf(lastAgent) : -1;\\\\\\\\n      const start = idx &gt;= 0 ? (idx + 1) % members.length : 0;\\\\\\\\n      if (members.length &gt; 0) queueLastAgent.set(mapKey, members[start] ?? members[0]);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(start), ...members.slice(0, start)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'leastrecent': {\\\\\\\\n      const recents = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, MAX(end_time) AS last_called FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const lastByExt = new Map((recents || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), r.last_called]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ta = lastByExt.get(a) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(a)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        const tb = lastByExt.get(b) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(b)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ta !== tb) return ta - tb; // least recent first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'fewestcalls': {\\\\\\\\n      const counts = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND status = 'answered' AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const countByExt = new Map((counts || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), Number(r.cnt) || 0]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ca = countByExt.get(a) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        const cb = countByExt.get(b) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ca !== cb) return ca - cb; // fewest first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'linear':\\\\\\\\n    case 'ringall':\\\\\\\\n    default:\\\\\\\\n      // already ordered by member_name (stable, deterministic)\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { members, strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update last agent for rrmemory when a call is answered (so next call uses next agent).\\\\\\\\n * Uses same canonical queue key as getOrderedQueueMembers so strategy state stays consistent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function setQueueLastAgent(queueName, agentExtension) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = queueName != null ? String(queueName).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  const ext = agentExtension != null ? String(agentExtension).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  if (key &amp;&amp; ext) queueLastAgent.set(key, ext);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":186,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":7836,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":186}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"b35cb98b-4d2e-46aa-91b7-5c8c830bfebe\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"bd046d9b-7268-4d75-be58-8ab5372a804c\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"un live monitoring).\\\\\\\\n * Store must support .all(callback) and .destroy(sid, callback) (e.g. MemoryStore).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function destroySessionsForUser(store, userId, callback) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!store || typeof store.all !== 'function') {\\\\\\\\n    return callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  store.all((err, sessions) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (err) return callback &amp;&amp; callback(err);\\\\\\\\n    const sids = Object.keys(sessions || {}).filter(\\\\\\\\n      (sid) =&gt; sessions[sid]?.user?.id === userId\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (sids.length === 0) return callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n    let done = 0;\\\\\\\\n    sids.forEach((sid) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      store.destroy(sid, () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        done++;\\\\\\\\n        if (done === sids.length) callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":24}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web when force-logout from live monitoring).\\\\\\\\n * Store must support .all(callback) and .destroy(sid, callback) (e.g. MemoryStore).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function destroySessionsForUser(store, userId, callback) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!store || typeof store.all !== 'function') {\\\\\\\\n    return callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  store.all((err, sessions) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (err) return callback &amp;&amp; callback(err);\\\\\\\\n    const sids = Object.keys(sessions || {}).filter(\\\\\\\\n      (sid) =&gt; sessions[sid]?.user?.id === userId\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (sids.length === 0) return callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n    let done = 0;\\\\\\\\n    sids.forEach((sid) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      store.destroy(sid, () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        done++;\\\\\\\\n        if (done === sids.length) callback &amp;&amp; callback(null);\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":24,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":786,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development/test/server/redis-wallboard.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Optional Redis real-time state cache for wallboard.\\\\\\\\n * Stores agent and queue state for sub-second reads when REDIS_URL is set.\\\\\\\\n * Gracefully degrades: all functions are no-ops when Redis is unavailable.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet redis = null;\\\\\\\\nlet redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\nconst KEY_PREFIX = 'wb:';\\\\\\\\nconst TTL_SEC = 120;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function initRedis() {\\\\\\\\n  const url = (process.env.REDIS_URL || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!url) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { createClient } = await import('redis');\\\\\\\\n    redis = createClient({ url });\\\\\\\\n    redis.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (redisAvailable) console.error('[redis-wallboard] Redis error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n      redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n    redis.on('ready', () =&gt; { redisAvailable = true; });\\\\\\\\n    await redis.connect();\\\\\\\\n    redisAvailable = true;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[redis-wallboard] Connected to Redis');\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[redis-wallboard] Redis not available:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    redis = null;\\\\\\\\n    redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function isRedisAvailable() { return redisAvailable &amp;&amp; redis != null; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function setAgentState(tenantId, agentId, data) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:${agentId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await redis.set(key, JSON.stringify(data), { EX: TTL_SEC });\\\\\\\\n  } catch {}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getAgentState(tenantId, agentId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:${agentId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const raw = await redis.get(key);\\\\\\\\n    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getAllAgentStates(tenantId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const pattern = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:*&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const keys = await redis.keys(pattern);\\\\\\\\n    if (keys.length === 0) return [];\\\\\\\\n    const pipeline = redis.multi();\\\\\\\\n    for (const k of keys) pipeline.get(k);\\\\\\\\n    const results = await pipeline.exec();\\\\\\\\n    return results.map((r) =&gt; { try { return JSON.parse(r); } catch { return null; } }).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function setQueueState(tenantId, queueName, data) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}queue:${tenantId}:${queueName}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await redis.set(key, JSON.stringify(data), { EX: TTL_SEC });\\\\\\\\n  } catch {}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getQueueState(tenantId, queueName) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}queue:${tenantId}:${queueName}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const raw = await redis.get(key);\\\\\\\\n    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteAgentState(tenantId, agentId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:${agentId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await redis.del(key);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":89}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/redis-wallboard.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Optional Redis real-time state cache for wallboard.\\\\\\\\n * Stores agent and queue state for sub-second reads when REDIS_URL is set.\\\\\\\\n * Gracefully degrades: all functions are no-ops when Redis is unavailable.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet redis = null;\\\\\\\\nlet redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\nconst KEY_PREFIX = 'wb:';\\\\\\\\nconst TTL_SEC = 120;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function initRedis() {\\\\\\\\n  const url = (process.env.REDIS_URL || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!url) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { createClient } = await import('redis');\\\\\\\\n    redis = createClient({ url });\\\\\\\\n    redis.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (redisAvailable) console.error('[redis-wallboard] Redis error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n      redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n    redis.on('ready', () =&gt; { redisAvailable = true; });\\\\\\\\n    await redis.connect();\\\\\\\\n    redisAvailable = true;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('[redis-wallboard] Connected to Redis');\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.warn('[redis-wallboard] Redis not available:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    redis = null;\\\\\\\\n    redisAvailable = false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function isRedisAvailable() { return redisAvailable &amp;&amp; redis != null; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function setAgentState(tenantId, agentId, data) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:${agentId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await redis.set(key, JSON.stringify(data), { EX: TTL_SEC });\\\\\\\\n  } catch {}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getAgentState(tenantId, agentId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:${agentId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const raw = await redis.get(key);\\\\\\\\n    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getAllAgentStates(tenantId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const pattern = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}agent:${tenantId}:*&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const keys = await redis.keys(pattern);\\\\\\\\n    if (keys.length === 0) return [];\\\\\\\\n    const pipeline = redis.multi();\\\\\\\\n    for (const k of keys) pipeline.get(k);\\\\\\\\n    const results = await pipeline.exec();\\\\\\\\n    return results.map((r) =&gt; { try { return JSON.parse(r); } catch { return null; } }).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function setQueueState(tenantId, queueName, data) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}queue:${tenantId}:${queueName}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await redis.set(key, JSON.stringify(data), { EX: TTL_SEC });\\\\\\\\n  } catch {}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function getQueueState(tenantId, queueName) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisAvailable || !redis) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const key = &#96;${KEY_PREFIX}queue:${tenantId}:${queueName}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const raw = await redis.get(key);\\\\\\\\n    return raw ? './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { superadmin: 1, admin: 2, user: 3, campaign: 4, agent: 5 };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function addUser(username, password, roleName, parentId) {\\\\\\\\n  const role = ROLE_IDS[roleName?.toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n  if (!role) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Role must be: superadmin, admin, user, or agent');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Usage: node server/add-user.js &lt;username&gt; &lt;password&gt; &lt;role&gt; [parent_id]');\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Example: node server/add-user.js myadmin mypass123 admin');\\\\\\\\n    console.error('For agents (to see extensions): node server/add-user.js agent2 demo123 agent 2');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\\\\\\\\n  const parent = role === 5 &amp;&amp; parentId != null ? parseInt(parentId, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [username, hash, &#96;${username}@localhost&#96;, role, parent]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;User created: ${username} (role: ${roleName}${parent != null ? &#96;, parent_id=${parent}&#96; : ''})&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error(&#96;Username \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" already exists. Choose a different username.&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('Failed:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst [, , username, password, role, parentId] = process.argv;\\\\\\\\naddUser(username, password, role, parentId);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":41}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/add-user.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import 'dotenv/config';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport { query } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { superadmin: 1, admin: 2, user: 3, campaign: 4, agent: 5 };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function addUser(username, password, roleName, parentId) {\\\\\\\\n  const role = ROLE_IDS[roleName?.toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n  if (!role) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Role must be: superadmin, admin, user, or agent');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Usage: node server/add-user.js &lt;username&gt; &lt;password&gt; &lt;role&gt; [parent_id]');\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Example: node server/add-user.js myadmin mypass123 admin');\\\\\\\\n    console.error('For agents (to see extensions): node server/add-user.js agent2 demo123 agent 2');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\\\\\\\\n  const parent = role === 5 &amp;&amp; parentId != null ? parseInt(parentId, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [username, hash, &#96;${username}@localhost&#96;, role, parent]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;User created: ${username} (role: ${roleName}${parent != null ? &#96;, parent_id=${parent}&#96; : ''})&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {\\\\\\\\n      console.error(&#96;Username \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" already exists. FoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.887Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_47d29b1e-f956-4768-bb8a-51f6b02a411\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_47d29b1e-f956-4768-bb8a-51f6b02a411\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/auth.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/auth.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/auth.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport {\\\\\\\\n  findUserByUsername,\\\\\\\\n  updateLastLogin,\\\\\\\\n  updatePassword,\\\\\\\\n  getEnabledModules,\\\\\\\\n  buildSessionUser,\\\\\\\\n  verifyCurrentPassword,\\\\\\\\n} from '../auth.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { endAgentSession } from '../agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { hangupChannel } from '../asterisk-ari.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getAgentLoginChannel } from '../ari-stasis-queue.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { broadcastToWallboard } from '../realtime.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** When a new user logs in in the same browser, mark the previous session's agent as LoggedOut so live monitoring does not show them as Available. */\\\\\\\\nasync function clearPreviousAgentStatusOnLogin(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const prev = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!prev || prev.role !== 'agent' || !prev.id) return;\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [prev.id]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const phoneNum = row?.phone_login_number != null ? String(row.phone_login_number) : null;\\\\\\\\n  if (!phoneNum) return;\\\\\\\\n  await endAgentSession(phoneNum, 'normal');\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE agent_status SET status = 'LoggedOut', agent_channel_id = NULL, session_started_at = NULL, timestamp = NOW() WHERE agent_id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET soft_phone_login_status = 0 WHERE phone_login_number = ? LIMIT 1', [phoneNum]).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/login', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { username, password } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username and password required' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const trimmedUsername = String(username).trim();\\\\\\\\n    const user = await findUserByUsername(trimmedUsername);\\\\\\\\n    if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid credentials or account disabled' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (user.account_status !== 1) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Account is disabled. Enable it in Super Admin → Users (set status to Active).' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const ok = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n    if (!ok) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid credentials or account disabled' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    await clearPreviousAgentStatusOnLogin(req);\\\\\\\\n    await updateLastLogin(user.id);\\\\\\\\n    const modules = await getEnabledModules(user.role);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionUser = buildSessionUser(user, modules);\\\\\\\\n    req.session = req.session || {};\\\\\\\\n    req.session.user = sessionUser;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionUser.role === 'agent') {\\\\\\\\n      delete req.session.agentExtension;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, user: sessionUser });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Login error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_ACCESS_DENIED_ERROR' || (err.message &amp;&amp; err.message.includes('using password: NO'))) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(503).json({\\\\\\\\n        success: false,\\\\\\\\n        error: 'Database not configured. Set DB_PASSWORD in .env to your MySQL root password and restart the server.',\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(503).json({ success: false, error: 'Database not reachable. Start MySQL service.' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Login failed' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/logout', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const userId = req.session?.user?.id;\\\\\\\\n  const session = req.session;\\\\\\\\n  const wasAgent = req.session?.user?.role === 'agent';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (wasAgent &amp;&amp; userId) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n        [userId]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const phoneNum = row?.phone_login_number != null ? String(row.phone_login_number) : null;\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        const loginCh = getAgentLoginChannel(phoneNum);\\\\\\\\n        const statusRow = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT agent_channel_id, tenant_id FROM agent_status WHERE agent_id = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n          [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        const channelId = statusRow?.agent_channel_id;\\\\\\\\n        const toHangup = loginCh || (channelId &amp;&amp; typeof channelId === 'string' &amp;&amp; channelId.trim()) || null;\\\\\\\\n        if (toHangup) {\\\\\\\\n          await hangupChannel(toHangup).catch((e) =&gt;\\\\\\\\n            console.warn('[auth logout] ARI hangup:', e?.message || e)\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        await endAgentSession(phoneNum, 'normal');\\\\\\\\n        await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;UPDATE agent_status SET status = 'LoggedOut', agent_channel_id = NULL, session_started_at = NULL, break_started_at = NULL, timestamp = NOW() WHERE agent_id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        await query('UPDATE users SET soft_phone_login_status = 0 WHERE phone_login_number = ? LIMIT 1', [phoneNum]).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n        if (statusRow?.tenant_id) {\\\\\\\\n          broadcastToWallboard(statusRow.tenant_id, { type: 'agent_status', payload: { agent_id: phoneNum, status: 'LoggedOut', break_started_at: null } });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      console.warn('[auth logout] agent cleanup:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (userId) {\\\\\\\\n    query('DELETE FROM agent_extension_usage WHERE user_id = ?', [userId]).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  delete session?.agentExtension;\\\\\\\\n  const sendResponse = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    res.clearCookie('pbx.sid');\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  if (session &amp;&amp; typeof session.destroy === 'function') {\\\\\\\\n    session.destroy((err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (err) console.error('Logout session destroy error:', err);\\\\\\\\n      sendResponse();\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    sendResponse();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/change-password', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const userId = req.session?.user?.id;\\\\\\\\n    if (!userId) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const { current_password, new_password } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    if (!new_password || new_password.length &lt; 6) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'New password must be at least 6 characters' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const ok = await verifyCurrentPassword(userId, current_password || '');\\\\\\\\n    if (!ok) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Current password is incorrect' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    await updatePassword(userId, new_password);\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Change password error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Change password failed' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/me', (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  return res.json({ success: true, user });\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default router;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":167}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/auth.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport {\\\\\\\\n  findUserByUsername,\\\\\\\\n  updateLastLogin,\\\\\\\\n  updatePassword,\\\\\\\\n  getEnabledModules,\\\\\\\\n  buildSessionUser,\\\\\\\\n  verifyCurrentPassword,\\\\\\\\n} from '../auth.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { endAgentSession } from '../agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { hangupChannel } from '../asterisk-ari.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getAgentLoginChannel } from '../ari-stasis-queue.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { broadcastToWallboard } from '../realtime.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** When a new user logs in in the same browser, mark the previous session's agent as LoggedOut so live monitoring does not show them as Available. */\\\\\\\\nasync function clearPreviousAgentStatusOnLogin(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const prev = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!prev || prev.role !== 'agent' || !prev.id) return;\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [prev.id]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const phoneNum = row?.phone_login_number != null ? String(row.phone_login_number) : null;\\\\\\\\n  if (!phoneNum) return;\\\\\\\\n  await endAgentSession(phoneNum, 'normal');\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE agent_status SET status = 'LoggedOut', agent_channel_id = NULL, session_started_at = NULL, timestamp = NOW() WHERE agent_id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  await query('UPDATE users SET soft_phone_login_status = 0 WHERE phone_login_number = ? LIMIT 1', [phoneNum]).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/login', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { username, password } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username and password required' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const trimmedUsername = String(username).trim();\\\\\\\\n    const user = await findUserByUsername(trimmedUsername);\\\\\\\\n    if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid credentials or account disabled' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (user.account_status !== 1) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Account is disabled. Enable it in Super Admin → Users (set status to Active).' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const ok = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\\\\\\\\n    if (!ok) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid credentials or account disabled' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    await clearPreviousAgentStatusOnLogin(req);\\\\\\\\n    await updateLastLogin(user.id);\\\\\\\\n    const modules = await getEnabledModules(user.role);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionUser = buildSessionUser(user, modules);\\\\\\\\n    req.session = req.session || {};\\\\\\\\n    req.session.user = sessionUser;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionUser.role === 'agent') {\\\\\\\\n      delete req.session.agentExtension;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, user: sessionUser });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Login error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_ACCESS_DENIED_ERROR' || (err.message &amp;&amp; err.message.includes('using password: NO'))) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(503).json({\\\\\\\\n        success: false,\\\\\\\\n        error: 'Database not configured. Set DB_PASSWORD in .env to your MySQL root password and restart the server.',\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ECONNREFUSED') {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(503).json({ success: false, error: 'Database not reachable. Start MySQL service.' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Login failed' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/logout', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const userId = req.session?.user?.id;\\\\\\\\n  const session = req.session;\\\\\\\\n  const wasAgent = req.session?.user?.role === 'agent';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (wasAgent &amp;&amp; userId) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n        [userId]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const phoneNum = row?.phone_login_number != null ? String(row.phone_login_number) : null;\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        const loginCh = getAgentLoginChannel(phoneNum);\\\\\\\\n        const statusRow = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT agent_channel_id, tenant_id FROM agent_status WHERE agent_id = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n          [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        const channelId = statusRow?.agent_channel_id;\\\\\\\\n        const toHangup = loginCh || (channelId &amp;&amp; typeof channelId === 'string' &amp;&amp; channelId.trim()) || null;\\\\\\\\n        if (toHangup) {\\\\\\\\n          await hangupChannel(toHangup).catch((e) =&gt;\\\\\\\\n            console.warn('[auth logout] ARI hangup:', e?.message || e)\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        await endAgentSession(phoneNum, 'normal');\\\\\\\\n        await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;UPDATE agent_status SET status = 'LoggedOut', agent_channel_id = NULL, session_started_at = NULL, break_started_at = NULL, timestamp = NOW() WHERE agent_id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        await query('UPDATE users SET soft_phone_login_status = 0 WHERE phone_login_number = ? status: 'LoggedOut', break_started_at: null } });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      console.warn('[auth logout] agent cleanup:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (userId) {\\\\\\\\n    query('DELETE FROM agent_extension_usage WHERE user_id = ?', [userId]).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  delete session?.agentExtension;\\\\\\\\n  const sendResponse = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    res.clearCookie('pbx.sid');\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  if (session &amp;&amp; typeof session.destroy === 'function') {\\\\\\\\n    session.destroy((err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (err) console.error('Logout session destroy error:', err);\\\\\\\\n      sendResponse();\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    sendResponse();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/change-password', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const userId = sReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.887Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_57343ad2-16cf-42d8-be49-2ec833e35ef\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_57343ad2-16cf-42d8-be49-2ec833e35ef\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/superadmin.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":400}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/superadmin.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":400,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:/web development/test/server/routes/superadmin.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport fs from 'fs';\\\\\\\\nimport path from 'path';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { roleName } from '../auth.js';\\\\\\\\nimport ALL_MODULES from '../modules.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { syncAgentsToAsterisk, syncExtensionsToAsterisk, syncTrunksToAsterisk, syncDialplanToAsterisk, syncAllToAsterisk } from '../asterisk-config-sync.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getPjsipEndpointStates, getPjsipEndpointsRaw, originateIntoStasis, originateToContext, getQueueStasisAppName, isAriConfigured } from '../asterisk-ari.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getBridgedCallInfo, forceLogoutAgent } from '../ari-stasis-queue.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { destroySessionsForUser } from '../session-utils.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { endAgentSession } from '../agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { setExtensionAgentUserId } from '../agent-extension-resolver.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function ensureSipExtensionForAgent(tenantId, extensionName, secret) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId)))\\\\\\\\n    ? Number(tenantId)\\\\\\\\n    : 1;\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  const ext = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) {\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO sip_extensions (tenant_id, name, secret, context, host, type)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'from-internal', NULL, 'friend')&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tid, name, secret || name]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { superadmin: 1, admin: 2, user: 3, campaign: 4, agent: 5 };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PATH_MODULE_MAP = {\\\\\\\\n  'users': 'users',\\\\\\\\n  'tenants': 'tenants',\\\\\\\\n  'sip-extensions': 'extensions',\\\\\\\\n  'debug-ari-endpoints': 'extensions',\\\\\\\\n  'sip-trunks': 'trunks',\\\\\\\\n  'stats': 'dashboard',\\\\\\\\n  'inbound-routes': 'inbound',\\\\\\\\n  'outbound-routes': 'outbound',\\\\\\\\n  'queues': 'queues',\\\\\\\\n  'ivr-menus': 'ivr',\\\\\\\\n  'time-conditions': 'timeconditions',\\\\\\\\n  'time-groups': 'timeconditions',\\\\\\\\n  'sound-files': 'sounds',\\\\\\\\n  'voicemail-boxes': 'voicemail',\\\\\\\\n  'live-agents': 'wallboard',\\\\\\\\n  'cdr': 'cdr',\\\\\\\\n  'asterisk-logs': '_system',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireSuperadmin(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (user.role !== 'superadmin') {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Superadmin only' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  next();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireModuleAccess(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (user.role === 'superadmin') return next();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const firstSegment = req.path.split('/').filter(Boolean)[0] || '';\\\\\\\\n  const requiredModule = PATH_MODULE_MAP[firstSegment];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!requiredModule) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Superadmin only' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (Array.isArray(user.modules) &amp;&amp; user.modules.includes(requiredModule)) {\\\\\\\\n    return next();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Module not enabled for your role' });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.use(requireModuleAccess);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** For admin/user, return their tenant id (parent_id). For superadmin, return null (no restriction). */\\\\\\\\nfunction getEffectiveTenantId(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user || user.role === 'superadmin') return null;\\\\\\\\n  const pid = user.parent_id;\\\\\\\\n  if (pid == null || pid === '') return null;\\\\\\\\n  const n = parseInt(pid, 10);\\\\\\\\n  return Number.isNaN(n) || n &lt; 1 ? null : n;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// --- Users ---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/users', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    let sql = &#96;SELECT id, username, email, role, parent_id, account_status, created_at,\\\\\\\\n              phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n              (phone_login_password IS NOT NULL AND phone_login_password != '') AS phone_login_set\\\\\\\\n       FROM users&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' WHERE parent_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(effectiveTenantId);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY id';\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await query(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    const users = rows.map((r) =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n      id: r.id,\\\\\\\\n      username: r.username,\\\\\\\\n      email: r.email || '',\\\\\\\\n      role: roleName(r.role),\\\\\\\\n      role_id: r.role,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id: r.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n      account_status: r.account_status,\\\\\\\\n      created_at: r.created_at,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number: r.phone_login_number || '',\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_set: !!r.phone_login_set,\\\\\\\\n    }));\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, users });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin list users error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to list users' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/users', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const {\\\\\\\\n      username,\\\\\\\\n      password,\\\\\\\\n      role: roleNameParam,\\\\\\\\n      email,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_password,\\\\\\\\n    } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const roleId = ROLE_IDS[String(roleNameParam || '').toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n    if (!roleId) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Role must be: superadmin, admin, user, or agent' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username and password required' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (password.length &lt; 6) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Password must be at least 6 characters' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    let parentId = roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; parent_id != null &amp;&amp; parent_id !== '' ? parseInt(parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 2 || roleId === 3) parentId = parent_id != null &amp;&amp; parent_id !== '' ? parseInt(parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; (roleId === 2 || roleId === 3 || roleId === 5)) parentId = effectiveTenantId;\\\\\\\\n    const phoneNum = phone_login_number != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_number).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_number).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const phonePass = phone_login_password != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_password).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_password).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; (!phoneNum || !phonePass)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n        success: false,\\\\\\\\n        error: 'Agents require phone login number (extension) and phone login password (PIN)',\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n      const existingAgent = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE role = 5 AND phone_login_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phone_login_number) = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n        [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (existingAgent) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n          success: false,\\\\\\\\n          error: &#96;Extension ${phoneNum} is already assigned to agent \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${existingAgent.username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Choose a different extension or remove it from that agent first.&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        await ensureSipExtensionForAgent(parentId, phoneNum, phonePass);\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n        console.error('Superadmin ensure PJSIP extension for agent error:', err);\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(500).json({\\\\\\\\n          success: false,\\\\\\\\n          error: 'Failed to create PJSIP extension for agent. Ensure sip_extensions table exists. ' + (err.message || String(err)),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const hash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\\\\\\\\n    const emailVal = email &amp;&amp; String(email).trim() ? String(email).trim() : &#96;${username}@localhost&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required, phone_login_number, phone_login_password)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 0, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [String(username).trim(), hash, emailVal, roleId, parentId, roleId === 5 ? phoneNum : null, roleId === 5 ? phonePass : null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const [row] = await query('SELECT id, username, email, role, parent_id, created_at FROM users WHERE username = ?', [\\\\\\\\n      String(username).trim(),\\\\\\\\n    ]);\\\\\\\\n    const user = row\\\\\\\\n      ? {\\\\\\\\n          id: row.id,\\\\\\\\n          username: row.username,\\\\\\\\n          email: row.email || '',\\\\\\\\n          role: roleName(row.role),\\\\\\\\n          parent_id: row.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n          created_at: row.created_at,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum &amp;&amp; row?.id &amp;&amp; parentId != null) {\\\\\\\\n      await setExtensionAgentUserId(parentId, phoneNum, row.id).catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Set extension agent_user_id:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n      await syncAgentsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk agents sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n      await syncExtensionsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk extensions sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    } else if (roleId === 5) {\\\\\\\\n      syncAgentsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk agents sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, user });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username already exists' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin create user error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to create user' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.patch('/users/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid user ID' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const {\\\\\\\\n      username: usernameBody,\\\\\\\\n      email: emailBody,\\\\\\\\n      role: roleBody,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id: parentIdBody,\\\\\\\\n      account_status: accountStatusBody,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_password,\\\\\\\\n      password,\\\\\\\\n    } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id, username, role, parent_id, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'User not found' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    const isSuperadmin = effectiveTenantId == null;\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; Number(existing.parent_id) !== Number(effectiveTenantId)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'You can only update users in your tenant' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Optional: update username, email, role, parent_id, account_status (role/parent_id only for superadmin)\\\\\\\\n    if (usernameBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; String(usernameBody).trim() !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      const newUsername = String(usernameBody).trim();\\\\\\\\n      const dup = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ? AND id != ? LIMIT 1', [newUsername, id]);\\\\\\\\n      if (dup) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username already taken' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET username = ? WHERE id = ?', [newUsername, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (emailBody !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET email = ? WHERE id = ?', [emailBody != null ? String(emailBody).trim() : null, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (accountStatusBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; accountStatusBody !== null &amp;&amp; String(accountStatusBody) !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      const status = accountStatusBody === 1 || accountStatusBody === '1' ? 1 : 0;\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET account_status = ? WHERE id = ?', [status, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (isSuperadmin) {\\\\\\\\n      if (roleBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; roleBody !== null &amp;&amp; String(roleBody).trim() !== '') {\\\\\\\\n        const roleId = ROLE_IDS[String(roleBody).toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n        if (roleId) await query('UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?', [roleId, id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (parentIdBody !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n        const pid = parentIdBody === null || parentIdBody === '' ? null : parseInt(parentIdBody, 10);\\\\\\\\n        const newParentId = pid != null &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(pid) &amp;&amp; pid &gt;= 1 ? pid : null;\\\\\\\\n        await query('UPDATE users SET parent_id = ? WHERE id = ?', [newParentId, id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Agent-only: phone extension and PIN (and optional web password)\\\\\\\\n    const phoneNum = phone_login_number != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_number).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_number).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const phonePass = phone_login_password != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_password).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_password).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const current = await queryOne('SELECT id, role, parent_id, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (current.role === 5 &amp;&amp; (phoneNum != null || phonePass != null || password != null)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        const otherAgent = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE role = 5 AND id != ? AND phone_login_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phone_login_number) = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n          [id, phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        if (otherAgent) {\\\\\\\\n          return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n            success: false,\\\\\\\\n            error: &#96;Extension ${phoneNum} is already assigned to agent \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${otherAgent.username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Choose a different extension or remove it from that agent first.&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      const newPassword = password != null &amp;&amp; String(password).trim() !== '' ?
