from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\\\\\\\\nimport fs from 'fs';\\\\\\\\nimport path from 'path';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { roleName } from '../auth.js';\\\\\\\\nimport ALL_MODULES from '../modules.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { syncAgentsToAsterisk, syncExtensionsToAsterisk, syncTrunksToAsterisk, syncDialplanToAsterisk, syncAllToAsterisk } from '../asterisk-config-sync.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getPjsipEndpointStates, getPjsipEndpointsRaw, originateIntoStasis, originateToContext, getQueueStasisAppName, isAriConfigured } from '../asterisk-ari.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getBridgedCallInfo, forceLogoutAgent } from '../ari-stasis-queue.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { destroySessionsForUser } from '../session-utils.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { endAgentSession } from '../agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { setExtensionAgentUserId } from '../agent-extension-resolver.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function ensureSipExtensionForAgent(tenantId, extensionName, secret) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId)))\\\\\\\\n    ? Number(tenantId)\\\\\\\\n    : 1;\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  const ext = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) {\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO sip_extensions (tenant_id, name, secret, context, host, type)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'from-internal', NULL, 'friend')&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tid, name, secret || name]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { superadmin: 1, admin: 2, user: 3, campaign: 4, agent: 5 };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PATH_MODULE_MAP = {\\\\\\\\n  'users': 'users',\\\\\\\\n  'tenants': 'tenants',\\\\\\\\n  'sip-extensions': 'extensions',\\\\\\\\n  'debug-ari-endpoints': 'extensions',\\\\\\\\n  'sip-trunks': 'trunks',\\\\\\\\n  'stats': 'dashboard',\\\\\\\\n  'inbound-routes': 'inbound',\\\\\\\\n  'outbound-routes': 'outbound',\\\\\\\\n  'queues': 'queues',\\\\\\\\n  'ivr-menus': 'ivr',\\\\\\\\n  'time-conditions': 'timeconditions',\\\\\\\\n  'time-groups': 'timeconditions',\\\\\\\\n  'sound-files': 'sounds',\\\\\\\\n  'voicemail-boxes': 'voicemail',\\\\\\\\n  'live-agents': 'wallboard',\\\\\\\\n  'cdr': 'cdr',\\\\\\\\n  'asterisk-logs': '_system',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireSuperadmin(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (user.role !== 'superadmin') {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Superadmin only' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  next();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireModuleAccess(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (user.role === 'superadmin') return next();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const firstSegment = req.path.split('/').filter(Boolean)[0] || '';\\\\\\\\n  const requiredModule = PATH_MODULE_MAP[firstSegment];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!requiredModule) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Superadmin only' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (Array.isArray(user.modules) &amp;&amp; user.modules.includes(requiredModule)) {\\\\\\\\n    return next();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Module not enabled for your role' });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.use(requireModuleAccess);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** For admin/user, return their tenant id (parent_id). For superadmin, return null (no restriction). */\\\\\\\\nfunction getEffectiveTenantId(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user || user.role === 'superadmin') return null;\\\\\\\\n  const pid = user.parent_id;\\\\\\\\n  if (pid == null || pid === '') return null;\\\\\\\\n  const n = parseInt(pid, 10);\\\\\\\\n  return Number.isNaN(n) || n &lt; 1 ? null : n;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// --- Users ---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/users', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    let sql = &#96;SELECT id, username, email, role, parent_id, account_status, created_at,\\\\\\\\n              phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n              (phone_login_password IS NOT NULL AND phone_login_password != '') AS phone_login_set\\\\\\\\n       FROM users&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' WHERE parent_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(effectiveTenantId);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY id';\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await query(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    const users = rows.map((r) =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n      id: r.id,\\\\\\\\n      username: r.username,\\\\\\\\n      email: r.email || '',\\\\\\\\n      role: roleName(r.role),\\\\\\\\n      role_id: r.role,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id: r.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n      account_status: r.account_status,\\\\\\\\n      created_at: r.created_at,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number: r.phone_login_number || '',\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_set: !!r.phone_login_set,\\\\\\\\n    }));\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, users });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin list users error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to list users' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/users', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const {\\\\\\\\n      username,\\\\\\\\n      password,\\\\\\\\n      role: roleNameParam,\\\\\\\\n      email,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_password,\\\\\\\\n    } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const roleId = ROLE_IDS[String(roleNameParam || '').toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n    if (!roleId) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Role must be: superadmin, admin, user, or agent' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!username || !password) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username and password required' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (password.length &lt; 6) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Password must be at least 6 characters' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    let parentId = roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; parent_id != null &amp;&amp; parent_id !== '' ? parseInt(parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 2 || roleId === 3) parentId = parent_id != null &amp;&amp; parent_id !== '' ? parseInt(parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; (roleId === 2 || roleId === 3 || roleId === 5)) parentId = effectiveTenantId;\\\\\\\\n    const phoneNum = phone_login_number != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_number).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_number).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const phonePass = phone_login_password != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_password).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_password).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; (!phoneNum || !phonePass)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n        success: false,\\\\\\\\n        error: 'Agents require phone login number (extension) and phone login password (PIN)',\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n      const existingAgent = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE role = 5 AND phone_login_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phone_login_number) = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n        [phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      if (existingAgent) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n          success: false,\\\\\\\\n          error: &#96;Extension ${phoneNum} is already assigned to agent \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${existingAgent.username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Choose a different extension or remove it from that agent first.&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        await ensureSipExtensionForAgent(parentId, phoneNum, phonePass);\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n        console.error('Superadmin ensure PJSIP extension for agent error:', err);\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(500).json({\\\\\\\\n          success: false,\\\\\\\\n          error: 'Failed to create PJSIP extension for agent. Ensure sip_extensions table exists. ' + (err.message || String(err)),\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const hash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\\\\\\\\n    const emailVal = email &amp;&amp; String(email).trim() ? String(email).trim() : &#96;${username}@localhost&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, parent_id, account_status, change_password_required, phone_login_number, phone_login_password)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, 0, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [String(username).trim(), hash, emailVal, roleId, parentId, roleId === 5 ? phoneNum : null, roleId === 5 ? phonePass : null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const [row] = await query('SELECT id, username, email, role, parent_id, created_at FROM users WHERE username = ?', [\\\\\\\\n      String(username).trim(),\\\\\\\\n    ]);\\\\\\\\n    const user = row\\\\\\\\n      ? {\\\\\\\\n          id: row.id,\\\\\\\\n          username: row.username,\\\\\\\\n          email: row.email || '',\\\\\\\\n          role: roleName(row.role),\\\\\\\\n          parent_id: row.parent_id,\\\\\\\\n          created_at: row.created_at,\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      : null;\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum &amp;&amp; row?.id &amp;&amp; parentId != null) {\\\\\\\\n      await setExtensionAgentUserId(parentId, phoneNum, row.id).catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Set extension agent_user_id:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (roleId === 5 &amp;&amp; phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n      await syncAgentsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk agents sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n      await syncExtensionsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk extensions sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    } else if (roleId === 5) {\\\\\\\\n      syncAgentsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk agents sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, user });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    if (err.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username already exists' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin create user error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to create user' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.patch('/users/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid user ID' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const {\\\\\\\\n      username: usernameBody,\\\\\\\\n      email: emailBody,\\\\\\\\n      role: roleBody,\\\\\\\\n      parent_id: parentIdBody,\\\\\\\\n      account_status: accountStatusBody,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n      phone_login_password,\\\\\\\\n      password,\\\\\\\\n    } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id, username, role, parent_id, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'User not found' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    const isSuperadmin = effectiveTenantId == null;\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; Number(existing.parent_id) !== Number(effectiveTenantId)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'You can only update users in your tenant' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Optional: update username, email, role, parent_id, account_status (role/parent_id only for superadmin)\\\\\\\\n    if (usernameBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; String(usernameBody).trim() !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      const newUsername = String(usernameBody).trim();\\\\\\\\n      const dup = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ? AND id != ? LIMIT 1', [newUsername, id]);\\\\\\\\n      if (dup) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Username already taken' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET username = ? WHERE id = ?', [newUsername, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (emailBody !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET email = ? WHERE id = ?', [emailBody != null ? String(emailBody).trim() : null, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (accountStatusBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; accountStatusBody !== null &amp;&amp; String(accountStatusBody) !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      const status = accountStatusBody === 1 || accountStatusBody === '1' ? 1 : 0;\\\\\\\\n      await query('UPDATE users SET account_status = ? WHERE id = ?', [status, id]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (isSuperadmin) {\\\\\\\\n      if (roleBody !== undefined &amp;&amp; roleBody !== null &amp;&amp; String(roleBody).trim() !== '') {\\\\\\\\n        const roleId = ROLE_IDS[String(roleBody).toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n        if (roleId) await query('UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?', [roleId, id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (parentIdBody !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n        const pid = parentIdBody === null || parentIdBody === '' ? null : parseInt(parentIdBody, 10);\\\\\\\\n        const newParentId = pid != null &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(pid) &amp;&amp; pid &gt;= 1 ? pid : null;\\\\\\\\n        await query('UPDATE users SET parent_id = ? WHERE id = ?', [newParentId, id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Agent-only: phone extension and PIN (and optional web password)\\\\\\\\n    const phoneNum = phone_login_number != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_number).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_number).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const phonePass = phone_login_password != null &amp;&amp; String(phone_login_password).trim() !== '' ? String(phone_login_password).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n    const current = await queryOne('SELECT id, role, parent_id, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (current.role === 5 &amp;&amp; (phoneNum != null || phonePass != null || password != null)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        const otherAgent = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE role = 5 AND id != ? AND phone_login_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phone_login_number) = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n          [id, phoneNum]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        if (otherAgent) {\\\\\\\\n          return res.status(400).json({\\\\\\\\n            success: false,\\\\\\\\n            error: &#96;Extension ${phoneNum} is already assigned to agent \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${otherAgent.username}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Choose a different extension or remove it from that agent first.&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      const newPassword = password != null &amp;&amp; String(password).trim() !== '' ? WHERE id = ?',\\\\\\\\n          [phoneNum, phonePass, hash, id]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        await query(\\\\\\\\n          'UPDATE users SET phone_login_number = ?, phone_login_password = ? String(current.phone_login_number).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n        if (oldExt &amp;&amp; oldExt !== (phoneNum || '')) {\\\\\\\\n          await setExtensionAgentUserId(current.parent_id, oldExt, null).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          await ensureSipExtensionForAgent(current.parent_id, phoneNum, phonePass);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n          console.error('Superadmin ensure PJSIP extension for agent error:', err);\\\\\\\\n          return res.status(500).json({\\\\\\\\n            success: false,\\\\\\\\n            error: 'Failed to create PJSIP extension for agent. ' + (err.message || String(err)),\\\\\\\\n          });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        await syncExtensionsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk extensions sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n        await setExtensionAgentUserId(current.parent_id, phoneNum, id).catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Set extension agent_user_id:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      syncAgentsToAsterisk().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Asterisk agents sync:', e.message));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin update user error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to update user' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.delete('/users/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid user ID' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id, role, parent_id, phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'User not found' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    if (effectiveTenantId != null &amp;&amp; Number(existing.parent_id) !== Number(effectiveTenantId)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'You can only delete users in your tenant' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const wasAgent = existing.role === 5;\\\\\\\\n    const agentId = wasAgent ? ],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.888Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\nHere is a backend server analysis:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Backend Server Analysis – PBX Call Center\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\nThe backend is a Node.js/Express app that integrates with Asterisk (ARI, config API) for PBX, queues, and call handling. It uses MySQL for persistence, SSE for real-time events, optional Redis for wallboard caching, and ARI WebSockets for queue events.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Root-Level Server Files\\\\n\\\\n### 1. **d:/web development/test/server/index.js** (67 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Application bootstrap, middleware, routing.\\\\n\\\\n**Key behavior:**\\\\n- CORS with credentials from &#96;CORS_ORIGIN&#96;\\\\n- Express session (&#96;pbx.sid&#96;), in-memory store\\\\n- Mounts routes: &#96;/api/auth&#96;, &#96;/api/agent&#96;, &#96;/api/superadmin&#96;, &#96;/api/asterisk&#96;, &#96;/api/wallboard&#96;, &#96;/api/admin&#96;, &#96;/api/reports&#96;\\\\n- On startup: &#96;startQueueStasisClient()&#96;, &#96;initRedis()&#96;, &#96;startReportAggregator()&#96;\\\\n- &#96;/api/health&#96; health check\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Security:** &#96;SESSION_SECRET&#96; default &#96;pbx-callcentre-secret-change-in-production&#96; is unsafe for production\\\\n- **Scalability:** &#96;MemoryStore&#96; sessions don’t scale across processes; use Redis or similar in production\\\\n- **Error handling:** &#96;initRedis().catch(() =&gt; {})&#96; swallows errors; startup continues without Redis\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 2. **d:/web development/test/server/db.js** (25 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** MySQL connection pool and query helpers.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:**\\\\n- &#96;query(sql, params)&#96; – returns rows\\\\n- &#96;queryOne(sql, params)&#96; – returns first row or null\\\\n- &#96;pool&#96; – raw pool\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **SQL injection:** Uses parameterized queries (OK)\\\\n- **Connection limits:** &#96;connectionLimit: 10&#96;, &#96;queueLimit: 0&#96; – large queues could block\\\\n- **No retry:** No retry or backoff on connection failures\\\\n- **Charset:** Uses &#96;utf8mb4_unicode_ci&#96; – appropriate\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 3. **d:/web development/test/server/auth.js** (66 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Auth helpers (bcrypt-based).\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;roleName&#96;, &#96;findUserByUsername&#96;, &#96;verifyLogin&#96;, &#96;updateLastLogin&#96;, &#96;updatePassword&#96;, &#96;verifyCurrentPassword&#96;, &#96;getEnabledModules&#96;, &#96;buildSessionUser&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- &#96;findUserByUsername&#96;: &#96;SELECT ... FROM users WHERE username = ?&#96; – indexed if &#96;username&#96; is unique\\\\n- &#96;getEnabledModules&#96;: &#96;SELECT module_key FROM role_modules WHERE role = ?&#96; – efficient\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Error handling:** &#96;getEnabledModules&#96; catch returns &#96;[]&#96;; errors are hidden\\\\n- **Password:** bcrypt with cost 10 – acceptable\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 4. **d:/web development/test/server/seed.js** (92 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** DB initialization and seeding.\\\\n\\\\n**Key behavior:**\\\\n- Creates DB if missing, runs schema and migrations\\\\n- Seeds users (superadmin, admin, user, agent, agent2) with password &#96;demo123&#96;\\\\n- Seeds SIP extensions and CRM records\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Security:** Default password &#96;demo123&#96; documented; must be changed in production\\\\n- **Migrations order:** Reads migration filenames; ordering depends on sort (works with numeric prefixes)\\\\n- **Idempotency:** Skips seed if superadmin exists – good\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 5. **d:/web development/test/server/asterisk-ari.js** (485 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** ARI client for Asterisk.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;isAriConfigured&#96;, &#96;originateAgentLogin&#96;, &#96;hangupChannel&#96;, &#96;getChannelVariable&#96;, &#96;setChannelVariable&#96;, &#96;redirectToContext&#96;, &#96;redirectToQueueFailoverContext&#96;, &#96;continueInDialplan&#96;, &#96;answerChannel&#96;, &#96;startMohOnChannel&#96;, &#96;stopMohOnChannel&#96;, &#96;holdChannel&#96;, &#96;unholdChannel&#96;, &#96;muteChannel&#96;, &#96;unmuteChannel&#96;, &#96;redirectChannel&#96;, &#96;originateOutbound&#96;, &#96;getPjsipEndpointStates&#96;, &#96;getPjsipEndpointsRaw&#96;, &#96;createBridge&#96;, &#96;addChannelToBridge&#96;, &#96;removeChannelFromBridge&#96;, &#96;originateIntoStasis&#96;, &#96;getQueueStasisAppName&#96;, &#96;originateToContext&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**ARI integration:**\\\\n- HTTP to ARI REST API\\\\n- Uses &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_URL&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_USER&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_PASSWORD&#96;\\\\n- Timeouts (e.g. 10s/30s) via &#96;AbortSignal.timeout()&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Error handling:** &#96;ariRequest&#96; catches errors and returns &#96;{ status: 0 }&#96;; callers may treat this as success\\\\n- **Encoding:** &#96;encodeURIComponent&#96; used for channel IDs – correct\\\\n- **Path handling:** &#96;ariRequest('endpoints/pjsip')&#96; – path construction may differ from other calls; verify consistency with &#96;/ari/&#96; prefix\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 6. **d:/web development/test/server/asterisk-config-sync.js** (635 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Pushes agents, PJSIP extensions, trunks, dialplan to Asterisk config API.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;isAsteriskSyncConfigured&#96;, &#96;syncAgentsToAsterisk&#96;, &#96;syncExtensionsToAsterisk&#96;, &#96;syncTrunksToAsterisk&#96;, &#96;syncDialplanToAsterisk&#96;, &#96;syncAllToAsterisk&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- &#96;syncAgentsToAsterisk&#96;: agents from &#96;users&#96; – simple\\\\n- &#96;syncExtensionsToAsterisk&#96;: &#96;sip_extensions&#96; – ordered by tenant\\\\n- &#96;syncTrunksToAsterisk&#96;: &#96;sip_trunks&#96; with &#96;config_json&#96;\\\\n- &#96;syncDialplanToAsterisk&#96;: large dialplan with curl URLs\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Security:** Dialplan embeds &#96;APP_URL&#96;; if Asterisk can reach only internal URLs, ensure they are not externally exposed\\\\n- **Duplication:** &#96;queue-failover&#96; block built twice in PJSIP config (endpoint + aor)\\\\n- **Large dialplan:** Single string; consider streaming or chunking for very large configs\\\\n- **Error handling:** &#96;syncAllToAsterisk&#96; collects errors but doesn’t roll back previous steps\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 7. **d:/web development/test/server/asterisk-events.js** (11 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Placeholder for AMI/ARI event subscriptions.\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior:** Only logs when AMI/ARI env vars are set; no real implementation.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 8. **d:/web development/test/server/ari-stasis-queue.js** (1007 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** ARI Stasis app for queue-dashboard: queues, bridges, agent login, barge/listen, outbound.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;startQueueStasisClient&#96;, &#96;getPendingCustomerChannel&#96;, &#96;tryNextQueueAgent&#96;, &#96;hangupBridgedQueueCall&#96;, &#96;answerQueueCallWithLoginChannel&#96;, &#96;getAgentLoginChannel&#96;, &#96;transferBridgedCallToExtension&#96;, &#96;forceLogoutAgent&#96;, &#96;setPendingAgentInfo&#96;, &#96;getQueueWaitingCounts&#96;, &#96;reassignWaitingCalls&#96;, &#96;getBridgedCallInfo&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**ARI integration:**\\\\n- WebSocket to ARI (&#96;/ari/events?app=queue-dashboard&#96;)\\\\n- Handles: StasisStart, ChannelStateChange, ChannelDestroyed, StasisEnd\\\\n- In-memory: &#96;pendingCustomers&#96;, &#96;pendingAgents&#96;, &#96;activeBridgedCalls&#96;, &#96;agentLoginStasisChannels&#96;, &#96;pendingSupervisorJoin&#96;, &#96;pendingOutbound&#96;, &#96;activeOutboundCalls&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- &#96;getQueueFailover&#96;: queue failover settings\\\\n- &#96;createCallRecord&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordAgent&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordAbandon&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordTransfer&#96;\\\\n- Multiple &#96;queryOne&#96; for queue and tenant lookups\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **State:** All state in memory; restart or crash loses call state\\\\n- **Race conditions:** Multiple Maps updated; possible races under high load\\\\n- **Duplicate queries:** &#96;getQueueFailover&#96;-style logic repeated; &#96;queryOne('SELECT tenant_id FROM queues WHERE name = ?')&#96; in several places\\\\n- **Error handling:** Some &#96;.catch(() =&gt; {})&#96; and &#96;.catch((e) =&gt; console.error(...))&#96; with no retries\\\\n- **Memory:** Maps can grow if events are missed or cleanup fails\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 9. **d:/web development/test/server/call-handler.js** (432 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Call state, CDR updates, agent status, realtime broadcasts.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;getAgentUserIdByNumber&#96;, &#96;createCallRecord&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordAnswered&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordAgent&#96;, &#96;normalizeCallStatus&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordEnd&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordTransfer&#96;, &#96;updateCallRecordAbandon&#96;, &#96;setAgentTransferring&#96;, &#96;setAgentRinging&#96;, &#96;setAgentAnswered&#96;, &#96;setAgentHangup&#96;, &#96;broadcastAgentStatus&#96;, &#96;setCallRecording&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- &#96;createCallRecord&#96;: idempotent by &#96;unique_id&#96; – good\\\\n- &#96;updateCallRecordEnd&#96;: SELECT then UPDATE – small race possible\\\\n- &#96;resolveAgentTenantId&#96;: &#96;agent_status&#96; lookup\\\\n- &#96;setAgentRinging&#96;: several queries for status, tenant mask, etc.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Duplicate logic:** Agent resolution and tenant mask logic repeated\\\\n- **Performance:** &#96;setAgentRinging&#96; does many sequential queries; could be batched\\\\n- **Redis:** &#96;updateRedisAgent&#96; called with &#96;.catch(() =&gt; {})&#96;; failures are silent\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 10. **d:/web development/test/server/realtime.js** (135 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** SSE for agents and wallboard.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;subscribe&#96;, &#96;unsubscribe&#96;, &#96;broadcastToAgent&#96;, &#96;subscribeWallboard&#96;, &#96;unsubscribeWallboard&#96;, &#96;broadcastToWallboard&#96;, &#96;broadcastToTenant&#96;, &#96;EventTypes&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior:** In-memory Maps; heartbeat every 25s; cleanup on &#96;close&#96;/&#96;error&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Scalability:** Per-process in-memory; multiple processes won’t share subscriptions\\\\n- **Heartbeat:** &#96;res.on('close')&#96; used twice (lines 26–27 and 40); second clears heartbeat – correct\\\\n- **Backpressure:** No backpressure; slow clients can accumulate data\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 11. **d:/web development/test/server/agent-sessions.js** (132 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Agent session and status logging.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;mapToLogStatus&#96;, &#96;startAgentSession&#96;, &#96;endAgentSession&#96;, &#96;logAgentStatusChange&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- Updates &#96;agent_sessions&#96;, &#96;agent_status_log&#96;\\\\n- Uses &#96;ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE&#96; to degrade gracefully\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **session_id:** &#96;logAgentStatusChange&#96; can insert with &#96;session_id: null&#96; if no open session\\\\n- **Race:** Multiple status log updates; possible overlapping rows\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 12. **d:/web development/test/server/agent-extension-resolver.js** (52 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Map extension → agent user (sip_extensions.agent_user_id or users.phone_login_number).\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;resolveAgentUserByExtensionName&#96;, &#96;setExtensionAgentUserId&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:** Two paths: bound extension vs &#96;phone_login_number&#96;. Uses indexes if defined.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **tenantId type:** &#96;resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, extensionName)&#96; – when &#96;tenantId&#96; is &#96;null&#96;, order of args could be confusing; consider naming to clarify.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 13. **d:/web development/test/server/queue-strategy.js** (185 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Queue ring strategies (ringall, rrordered, rrmemory, leastrecent, fewestcalls, random).\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;getOrderedQueueMembers&#96;, &#96;setQueueLastAgent&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:**\\\\n- &#96;queues&#96;, &#96;queue_members&#96;, &#96;agent_status&#96;, &#96;call_records&#96;\\\\n- &#96;SELECT agent_id, extension_number, status FROM agent_status&#96; – no tenant filter; all agents loaded\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Performance:** Loads all &#96;agent_status&#96; rows; can be heavy with many tenants\\\\n- **In-memory:** &#96;queueLastIndex&#96;, &#96;queueLastAgent&#96;; lost on restart\\\\n- **Logging:** Verbose &#96;console.log&#96; in production path\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 14. **d:/web development/test/server/session-utils.js** (23 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Destroy all sessions for a user (force logout).\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;destroySessionsForUser&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior:** Iterates over &#96;store.all()&#96;, destroys sessions by &#96;user.id&#96;. Requires &#96;MemoryStore&#96; or compatible store.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Redis sessions:** Won’t work with Redis-backed stores that lack &#96;store.all&#96;\\\\n- **Callback:** Always calls &#96;callback(null)&#96; even if &#96;store.all&#96; fails\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 15. **d:/web development/test/server/report-aggregator.js** (390 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Background aggregation into &#96;agent_hourly_stats&#96;, &#96;agent_break_stats&#96;, &#96;queue_daily_stats&#96;, &#96;agent_daily_stats&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;startReportAggregator&#96;, &#96;stopReportAggregator&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Database:** Heavy aggregation, per-tenant, per-agent, per-hour. Uses &#96;ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Performance:** Nested loops; many queries per cycle\\\\n- **Error handling:** Individual errors caught but cycle continues; long-running failures could accumulate\\\\n- **Default interval:** 5 minutes – configurable via &#96;REPORT_AGGREGATE_INTERVAL_MS&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 16. **d:/web development/test/server/redis-wallboard.js** (88 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Optional Redis cache for wallboard state.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;initRedis&#96;, &#96;isRedisAvailable&#96;, &#96;setAgentState&#96;, &#96;getAgentState&#96;, &#96;getAllAgentStates&#96;, &#96;setQueueState&#96;, &#96;getQueueState&#96;, &#96;deleteAgentState&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior:** Degrades if Redis is unavailable. TTL 120s. &#96;redis.keys()&#96; used for &#96;getAllAgentStates&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **&#96;keys()&#96;:** &#96;redis.keys(pattern)&#96; blocks; use &#96;SCAN&#96; for production\\\\n- **Connection:** No reconnection on Redis disconnect\\\\n- **Errors:** Swallowed with empty catch blocks\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 17. **d:/web development/test/server/modules.js** (19 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Module definitions for role-based access.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** &#96;ALL_MODULES&#96; (default).\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:** None significant.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 18. **d:/web development/test/server/add-user.js** (40 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** CLI to add users.\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior:** Reads argv, hashes password, inserts user, exits.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:** Not for HTTP use; standalone script.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Route Files\\\\n\\\\n### 19. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/auth.js** (166 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Endpoints:** &#96;POST /login&#96;, &#96;POST /logout&#96;, &#96;POST /change-password&#96;, &#96;GET /me&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Login:** Exposes “Invalid credentials or account disabled” – could leak account existence\\\\n- **Logout:** Agent cleanup uses &#96;getAgentLoginChannel&#96; + &#96;hangupChannel&#96;; async work before &#96;session.destroy&#96; might run after session is gone\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 20. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/agent.js** (975 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Endpoints:** &#96;GET /events&#96;, &#96;GET /extensions&#96;, &#96;GET /status&#96;, &#96;GET /session&#96;, &#96;POST /break/start&#96;, &#96;POST /break/end&#96;, &#96;POST /outbound/start&#96;, &#96;POST /outbound/end&#96;, &#96;GET /crm&#96;, &#96;POST /select-extension&#96;, &#96;POST /clear-extension&#96;, &#96;POST /block-number&#96;, &#96;POST /logout&#96;, &#96;POST /call-extension&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/answer&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/reject&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/hangup&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/hold&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/unhold&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/transfer&#96;, &#96;POST /calls/dial&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Duplicate:** &#96;normalizePhoneForBlacklist&#96; duplicated from admin routes; should be shared\\\\n- **Agent logout:** Agent &#96;/logout&#96; vs auth &#96;/logout&#96; – different behavior; agent logout cleans up ARI/session\\\\n- **Hold/Unhold:** Uses &#96;channel_id&#96; or &#96;status?.agent_channel_id&#96;; for queue calls the channel is the login channel, but hold/unhold might apply to the wrong leg\\\\n- **Validation:** &#96;block-number&#96; inserts raw input; normalized value used but originals not strictly sanitized\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 21. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/admin.js** (815 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Endpoints:** Tenants, blacklist CRUD, stats, live-agents, monitor, force-end-break, force-logout, CDR, DID/TFN report, recording stream.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Recording path:** &#96;fs.existsSync&#96;, &#96;fs.statSync&#96;, &#96;fs.createReadStream&#96; – path traversal handled via &#96;startsWith(safeBase)&#96; but worth extra review\\\\n- **Duplicate:** &#96;normalizePhoneForBlacklist&#96; duplicated from agent routes\\\\n- **Live agents:** &#96;breaksByAgent&#96; filters by &#96;b.agent_id !== r.user_id&#96; – &#96;session_agent_breaks.agent_id&#96; is user id, so this looks correct\\\\n- **Dynamic SQL:** No user-controlled SQL; parameters used correctly\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 22. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/asterisk.js** (691 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Asterisk dialplan callbacks (no auth).\\\\n\\\\n**Endpoints:** AgentLogin, AgentLogout, AgentLoginSuccess, InboundRoute, QueueMembers, QueueFailover, ExtensionFailover, IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup, Recording, IVRDetail, IVROptionRoute, TimeCondition, VoicemailDetail, SoundFilePath.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Security:** No auth; relies on Asterisk-only access. If exposed, anyone can trigger callbacks\\\\n- **ParseAgentId:** &#96;parseAgentId&#96; returns &#96;parseInt(cleaned, 10)&#96; – agent IDs like “1001” become numbers; used consistently as strings elsewhere\\\\n- **InboundRoute:** Blacklist check; &#96;REPLACE&#96; on DID for matching – ensure indexes support this\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 23. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/superadmin.js** (2,614 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** CRUD for users, tenants, extensions, trunks, inbound/outbound routes, queues, IVR, time conditions, sounds, voicemail, Asterisk sync, ARI debug, logs.\\\\n\\\\n**Exports:** Many REST endpoints for admin UI.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Size:** Very large file; split into sub-routers or modules would help\\\\n- **Validation:** Some validation, but complex nested objects could use schema validation (e.g. Joi/Zod)\\\\n- **Sync:** Asterisk sync on user create/update; failures logged but not surfaced clearly to UI\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 24. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/wallboard.js** (1,141 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Wallboard summary, events, monitor, force-end-break, force-logout, agent detail, reports.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Debug code:** &#96;fetch('http://127.0.0.1:7408/ingest/...')&#96; in summary, agent detail, report – hardcoded URL; appears to be telemetry/debug and should be removed or gated\\\\n- **Duplicate logic:** Force-logout and force-end-break overlap with admin routes\\\\n- **&#96;aggregateAgentDailyStats&#96;:** Duplicates logic from &#96;report-aggregator.js&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 25. **d:/web development/test/server/routes/reports.js** (762 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose:** Performance, leaderboard, breaks, comparison, trends, hourly, queue, time-distribution, alerts, agents, queues, tenants.\\\\n\\\\n**Issues:**\\\\n- **Fallbacks:** Uses &#96;agent_daily_stats&#96;, &#96;agent_break_stats&#96;, etc., with fallbacks; some tables may not exist\\\\n- **Low occupancy:** &#96;occ&#96; calculation in alerts route is complex; logic appears fragile (&#96;actualOcc&#96; vs &#96;occ&#96;)\\\\n- **SQL:** Uses parameterized queries – good\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Database Query Efficiency\\\\n\\\\n| Area | Notes |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| **Indexes** | Assumes indexes on &#96;username&#96;, &#96;unique_id&#96;, &#96;agent_id&#96;, &#96;tenant_id&#96;, &#96;queue_name&#96;, etc.; verify schema |\\\\n| **N+1** | Report aggregator and wallboard detail query per agent; batch where possible |\\\\n| **Full scans** | &#96;queue-strategy&#96; loads all &#96;agent_status&#96;; consider tenant/queue scoping |\\\\n| **Aggregation** | Heavy aggregation in report-aggregator; consider incremental or scheduled jobs |\\\\n| **Connection pool** | Single pool; ensure limits match expected concurrency |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Asterisk Integration Summary\\\\n\\\\n| Component | Type | Purpose |\\\\n|-----------|------|---------|\\\\n| **asterisk-ari.js** | ARI HTTP | Originate, hangup, bridge, channel vars, MOH, hold, mute, redirect |\\\\n| **asterisk-config-sync.js** | Config API | agents.conf, pjsip.conf, dialplan |\\\\n| **ari-stasis-queue.js** | ARI WebSocket | Stasis app &#96;queue-dashboard&#96;; queue flow, bridging, login, barge/listen |\\\\n| **asterisk-events.js** | Placeholder | AMI/ARI events not implemented |\\\\n| **routes/asterisk.js** | HTTP callbacks | Dialplan curl callbacks (AgentLogin, InboundRoute, IncomingCall, etc.) |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security Summary\\\\n\\\\n1. **Session secret:** Change default in production\\\\n2. **Asterisk routes:** No auth; must not be publicly reachable\\\\n3. **Recording path:** Traversal mitigated; double-check base path\\\\n4. **CORS:** Configure &#96;CORS_ORIGIN&#96; for production\\\\n5. **SQL:** Parameterized queries used throughout\\\\n6. **Passwords:** bcrypt; cost 10 is reasonable\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Recommended Fixes\\\\n\\\\n1. Remove or gate debug &#96;fetch&#96; in &#96;wallboard.js&#96;\\\\n2. Share &#96;normalizePhoneForBlacklist&#96; and similar helpers\\\\n3. Replace &#96;redis.keys()&#96; with &#96;SCAN&#96; in redis-wallboard\\\\n4. Add structured error handling instead of broad &#96;.catch(() =&gt; {})&#96;\\\\n5. Consider Redis (or similar) for sessions and realtime in multi-instance setups\\\\n6. Split &#96;superadmin.js&#96; into smaller modules\\\\n7. Add request validation (e.g. Joi/Zod) for complex payloads\\\\n8. Ensure &#96;SESSION_SECRET&#96; is set and strong in useContext, useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = {\\\\\\\\n  SUPERADMIN: 'superadmin',\\\\\\\\n  ADMIN: 'admin',\\\\\\\\n  USER: 'user',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT: 'agent',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { 1: 'superadmin', 2: 'admin', 3: 'user', 4: 'campaign', 5: 'agent' };\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeRole(role) {\\\\\\\\n  if (role == null) return 'user';\\\\\\\\n  const r = ROLE_IDS[Number(role)] || role;\\\\\\\\n  return typeof r === 'string' ? r : 'user';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.DEV ? '' : (import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || '');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function apiFetch(path, options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const res = await fetch(&#96;${API_BASE}${path}&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n    ...options,\\\\\\\\n    credentials: 'include',\\\\\\\\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers },\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  return res;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst AuthContext = createContext(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function AuthProvider({ children }) {\\\\\\\\n  const [user, setUser] = useState(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const stored = sessionStorage.getItem('pbx_user');\\\\\\\\n      if (!stored) return null;\\\\\\\\n      const u = JSON.parse(stored);\\\\\\\\n      if (u) u.role = normalizeRole(u.role);\\\\\\\\n      return u;\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  const [authReady, setAuthReady] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const persistUser = useCallback((userData) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    setUser(userData);\\\\\\\\n    if (userData) {\\\\\\\\n      sessionStorage.setItem('pbx_user', JSON.stringify(userData));\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      sessionStorage.removeItem('pbx_user');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const login = useCallback(async (username, password) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveUsername = (username || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!effectiveUsername) {\\\\\\\\n      return { success: false, error: 'Username is required' };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const res = await apiFetch('/api/auth/login', {\\\\\\\\n        method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ username: effectiveUsername, password }),\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      const text = await res.text();\\\\\\\\n      let data = {};\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        data = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        data = { error: 'Server returned an invalid response. Is the API running (e.g. port 3001)?' };\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (res.ok &amp;&amp; data.success &amp;&amp; data.user) {\\\\\\\\n        const userData = {\\\\\\\\n          ...data.user,\\\\\\\\n          role: normalizeRole(data.user.role),\\\\\\\\n          displayName: data.user.username?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + data.user.username?.slice(1) || data.user.username,\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n        persistUser(userData);\\\\\\\\n        return { success: true, user: userData };\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return { success: false, error: data.error || 'Invalid credentials' };\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      const msg = e?.message || '';\\\\\\\\n      const isNetwork = /failed to fetch|network|load/i.test(msg) || (e?.name === 'TypeError' &amp;&amp; !msg);\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        success: false,\\\\\\\\n        error: isNetwork\\\\\\\\n          ? 'Cannot reach server. Start the API (e.g. npm run server on port 3001) and check your connection.'\\\\\\\\n          : 'Login failed. Check your connection.',\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }, [persistUser]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const logout = useCallback(async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      if (user?.role === 'agent') {\\\\\\\\n        await apiFetch('/api/agent/logout', { method: 'POST' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      await apiFetch('/api/auth/logout', { method: 'POST' });\\\\\\\\n    } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n    persistUser(null);\\\\\\\\n  }, [persistUser, user?.role]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    let cancelled = false;\\\\\\\\n    (async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const res = await apiFetch('/api/auth/me');\\\\\\\\n        const data = await res.json().catch(() =&gt; ({}));\\\\\\\\n        if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n        if (res.status === 401 || !res.ok) {\\\\\\\\n          persistUser(null);\\\\\\\\n        } else if (data.success &amp;&amp; data.user) {\\\\\\\\n          const userData = {\\\\\\\\n            ...data.user,\\\\\\\\n            role: normalizeRole(data.user.role),\\\\\\\\n            displayName: data.user.username?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + data.user.username?.slice(1) || data.user.username,\\\\\\\\n          };\\\\\\\\n          persistUser(userData);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n      if (!cancelled) setAuthReady(true);\\\\\\\\n    })();\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; { cancelled = true; };\\\\\\\\n  }, [persistUser]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Periodic auth check: when session is destroyed (e.g. force-logout), clear user so app redirects to login\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!user) return;\\\\\\\\n    const interval = setInterval(async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const res = await apiFetch('/api/auth/me');\\\\\\\\n        if (res.status === 401) {\\\\\\\\n          persistUser(null);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n    }, 20000);\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; clearInterval(interval);\\\\\\\\n  }, [user, persistUser]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const value = { user, login, logout, authReady, ROLES };\\\\\\\\n  return &lt;AuthContext.Provider value={value}&gt;{children}&lt;/AuthContext.Provider&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function useAuth() {\\\\\\\\n  const ctx = useContext(AuthContext);\\\\\\\\n  if (!ctx) throw new Error('useAuth must be used within AuthProvider');\\\\\\\\n  return ctx;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { ROLES };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":151}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AuthContext.jsx\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import { createContext, useContext, useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = {\\\\\\\\n  SUPERADMIN: 'superadmin',\\\\\\\\n  ADMIN: 'admin',\\\\\\\\n  USER: 'user',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT: 'agent',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_IDS = { 1: 'superadmin', 2: 'admin', 3: 'user', 4: 'campaign', 5: 'agent' };\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeRole(role) {\\\\\\\\n  if (role == null) return 'user';\\\\\\\\n  const r = ROLE_IDS[Number(role)] || role;\\\\\\\\n  return typeof r === 'string' ? r : 'user';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.DEV ? development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AgentExtensionSelect.jsx\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport Layout from '../components/Layout';\\\\\\\\nimport './AgentExtensionSelect.css';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.DEV ? '' : (import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || '');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function apiFetch(path, options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const res = await fetch(&#96;${API_BASE}${path}&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n    ...options,\\\\\\\\n    credentials: 'include',\\\\\\\\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers },\\\\\\\\n    cache: 'no-store',\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  return res;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 1000;\\\\\\\\nconst POLL_TIMEOUT_MS = 120000; // 2 min\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function AgentExtensionSelect({ onSelected }) {\\\\\\\\n  const [extensions, setExtensions] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\\\\\\\\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [ringing, setRinging] = useState(false);\\\\\\\\n  const [error, setError] = useState('');\\\\\\\\n  const pollTimeoutRef = useRef(null);\\\\\\\\n  const pollIntervalRef = useRef(null);\\\\\\\\n  const onSelectedRef = useRef(onSelected);\\\\\\\\n  onSelectedRef.current = onSelected;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    let cancelled = false;\\\\\\\\n    (async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const res = await apiFetch('/api/agent/extensions');\\\\\\\\n        const data = await res.json().catch(() =&gt; ({}));\\\\\\\\n        if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n        const list = Array.isArray(data.extensions) ? data.extensions : [];\\\\\\\\n        if (data.success) {\\\\\\\\n          setExtensions(list);\\\\\\\\n          if (list.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; !selectedId) {\\\\\\\\n            const available = list.find((e) =&gt; !e.in_use || e.in_use_by_me);\\\\\\\\n            if (available) setSelectedId(String(available.id));\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n          setError('');\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          setExtensions([]);\\\\\\\\n          setError(data.error || 'Failed to load extensions');\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (_) {\\\\\\\\n        if (!cancelled) setError('Could not load extensions. Check you are logged in as an agent.');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (!cancelled) setLoading(false);\\\\\\\\n    })();\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; { cancelled = true; };\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (pollIntervalRef.current) clearInterval(pollIntervalRef.current);\\\\\\\\n      if (pollTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(pollTimeoutRef.current);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleSubmit = async (e) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    e.preventDefault();\\\\\\\\n    setError('');\\\\\\\\n    if (!selectedId) {\\\\\\\\n      setError('Please select an extension.');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    setSubmitting(true);\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const extId = Number(selectedId);\\\\\\\\n      const selectRes = await apiFetch('/api/agent/select-extension', {\\\\\\\\n        method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ extension_id: extId }),\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      const selectData = await selectRes.json().catch(() =&gt; ({}));\\\\\\\\n      if (!selectData.success) {\\\\\\\\n        setError(selectData.error || 'Failed to set extension');\\\\\\\\n        setSubmitting(false);\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const callRes = await apiFetch('/api/agent/call-extension', {\\\\\\\\n        method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n        body: JSON.stringify({ extension_id: extId }),\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      const callData = await callRes.json().catch(() =&gt; ({}));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (!callData.success) {\\\\\\\\n        setError(callData.error || 'Could not ring your phone. center;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-table td:first-child { text-align: left; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-table tbody tr {\\\\\\\\n  transition: background 0.1s;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-table 0.2rem 0.5rem;\\\\\\\\n  border-radius: 5px;\\\\\\\\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\\\\\\\\n  font-weight: 600;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-score-high { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2); color: #22c55e; }\\\\\\\\n.rpt-score-mid { background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); color: #3b82f6; }\\\\\\\\n.rpt-score-low { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); color: #ef4444; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/* Progress bars (time #3b82f6; }\\\\\\\\n.rpt-bar-ready { background: #22c55e; }\\\\\\\\n.rpt-bar-wrap { background: #a855f7; }\\\\\\\\n.rpt-bar-pause { background: #f59e0b; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-bar-legend {\\\\\\\\n  display: flex;\\\\\\\\n  gap: 1rem;\\\\\\\\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\\\\\\\\n  margin-top: 0.5rem;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-bar-legend-item {\\\\\\\\n  display: flex;\\\\\\\\n  align-items: margin-bottom: 1rem;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-agent-check-item {\\\\\\\\n  display: flex;\\\\\\\\n  align-items: center;\\\\\\\\n  gap: 0.3rem;\\\\\\\\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;\\\\\\\\n 0.15s;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-agent-check-item:hover { border-color: #3b82f6; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-agent-check-item.selected {\\\\\\\\n  background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15);\\\\\\\\n  border-color: #3b82f6;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-agent-check-item input {\\\\\\\\n  accent-color: #3b82f6;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/* Empty state */\\\\\\\\n.rpt-empty {\\\\\\\\n  text-align: font-size: 0.8125rem;\\\\\\\\n  color: #94a3b8;\\\\\\\\n  text-decoration: none;\\\\\\\\n  transition: color 0.15s;\\\\\\\\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n.rpt-back:hover { color: '' : (import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || '');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction api(path, options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  return fetch(&#96;${API_BASE}${path}&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n    ...options,\\\\\\\\n    credentials: 'include',\\\\\\\\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers },\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = ['superadmin', 'admin', 'user', 'agent'];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_LABEL = { 2: 'Admin', 3: 'User', 5: 'Agent' };\\\\\\\\nconst MANAGEABLE_ROLES = [2, 3, 5];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ALL_NAV_GROUPS = [\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'User Management',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'tenants', label: 'Tenants', moduleKey: 'tenants' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'users', label: 'Users', moduleKey: 'users' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'PBX Configuration',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'extensions', label: 'PJSIP Extensions', moduleKey: 'extensions' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'trunks', label: 'SIP Trunks', moduleKey: 'trunks' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'campaigns', label: 'Campaigns', moduleKey: 'campaigns' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'inbound', label: 'Inbound Routes', moduleKey: 'inbound' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'outbound', label: 'Outbound Routes', moduleKey: 'outbound' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'queues', label: 'Queues', moduleKey: 'queues' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'ivr', label: 'IVR Menus', moduleKey: 'ivr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'timeconditions', label: 'Time Conditions', moduleKey: 'timeconditions' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'sounds', label: 'Sound Files', moduleKey: 'sounds' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'voicemail', label: 'Voicemail', moduleKey: 'voicemail' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'blacklist', label: 'Blacklist', moduleKey: 'blacklist' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'Reports &amp; Monitoring',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'overview', label: 'Dashboard', moduleKey: 'dashboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'cdr', label: 'CDR &amp; Recordings', moduleKey: 'cdr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'did-tfn-report', label: 'Calls per DID/TFN', moduleKey: 'cdr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'live-agents', label: 'Agent Live Monitoring', moduleKey: 'wallboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'wallboard', label: 'Wallboard', moduleKey: 'wallboard', href: '/wallboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'reports', label: 'Agent Reports', moduleKey: 'wallboard', href: '/reports' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'System',\\\\\\\\n    superadminOnly: true,\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'asterisk-logs', label: 'Asterisk Logs', moduleKey: '_system' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'role-permissions', label: 'Role Permissions', moduleKey: '_system' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function SuperAdmin() {\\\\\\\\n  const { user } = useAuth();\\\\\\\\n  const isSuperadmin = user?.role === 'superadmin';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const navGroups = useMemo(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!user) return [];\\\\\\\\n    if (isSuperadmin) return ALL_NAV_GROUPS;\\\\\\\\n    const enabledSet = new Set(user.modules || []);\\\\\\\\n    return ALL_NAV_GROUPS\\\\\\\\n      .filter(g =&gt; !g.superadminOnly)\\\\\\\\n      .map(g =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n        ...g,\\\\\\\\n        items: g.items.filter(item =&gt;\\\\\\\\n          (item.id === 'wallboard' || item.id === 'live-agents')\\\\\\\\n            ? enabledSet.has('wallboard') || enabledSet.has('live_agents')\\\\\\\\n            : enabledSet.has(item.moduleKey)\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n      }))\\\\\\\\n      .filter(g =&gt; g.items.length &gt; 0);\\\\\\\\n  }, [user, isSuperadmin]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const validViewIds = useMemo(\\\\\\\\n    () =&gt; navGroups.flatMap(g =&gt; g.items.filter(i =&gt; !i.href).map(i =&gt; i.id)),\\\\\\\\n    [navGroups]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\\\\\\\\n  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();\\\\\\\\n  const viewFromUrl = searchParams.get('view');\\\\\\\\n  const defaultView = validViewIds.includes('overview') ? 'overview' : (validViewIds[0] || 'overview');\\\\\\\\n  const view = validViewIds.includes(viewFromUrl) ? viewFromUrl : defaultView;\\\\\\\\n  const setView = useCallback(\\\\\\\\n    (id) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      setSearchParams(\\\\\\\\n        (prev) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev);\\\\\\\\n          if (id === 'overview') next.delete('view');\\\\\\\\n          else next.set('view', id);\\\\\\\\n          return next;\\\\\\\\n        },\\\\\\\\n        { replace: true }\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    [setSearchParams]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';\\\\\\\\nimport Layout from '../components/Layout';\\\\\\\\nimport { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';\\\\\\\\nimport './Dashboard.css';\\\\\\\\nimport './SuperAdmin.css';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.DEV ? '' : (import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || '');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction api(path, options = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  return fetch(&#96;${API_BASE}${path}&#96;, {\\\\\\\\n    ...options,\\\\\\\\n    credentials: 'include',\\\\\\\\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers },\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLES = ['superadmin', 'admin', 'user', 'agent'];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ROLE_LABEL = { 2: 'Admin', 3: 'User', 5: 'Agent' };\\\\\\\\nconst MANAGEABLE_ROLES = [2, 3, 5];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ALL_NAV_GROUPS = [\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'User Management',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'tenants', label: 'Tenants', moduleKey: 'tenants' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'users', label: 'Users', moduleKey: 'users' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'PBX Configuration',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'extensions', label: 'PJSIP Extensions', moduleKey: 'extensions' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'trunks', label: 'SIP Trunks', moduleKey: 'trunks' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'campaigns', label: 'Campaigns', moduleKey: 'campaigns' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'inbound', label: 'Inbound Routes', moduleKey: 'inbound' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'outbound', label: 'Outbound Routes', moduleKey: 'outbound' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'queues', label: 'Queues', moduleKey: 'queues' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'ivr', label: 'IVR Menus', moduleKey: 'ivr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'timeconditions', label: 'Time Conditions', moduleKey: 'timeconditions' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'sounds', label: 'Sound Files', moduleKey: 'sounds' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'voicemail', label: 'Voicemail', moduleKey: 'voicemail' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'blacklist', label: 'Blacklist', moduleKey: 'blacklist' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'Reports &amp; Monitoring',\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'overview', label: 'Dashboard', moduleKey: 'dashboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'cdr', label: 'CDR &amp; Recordings', moduleKey: 'cdr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'did-tfn-report', label: 'Calls per DID/TFN', moduleKey: 'cdr' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'live-agents', label: 'Agent Live Monitoring', moduleKey: 'wallboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'wallboard', label: 'Wallboard', moduleKey: 'wallboard', href: '/wallboard' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'reports', label: 'Agent Reports', moduleKey: 'wallboard', href: '/reports' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  {\\\\\\\\n    group: 'System',\\\\\\\\n    superadminOnly: true,\\\\\\\\n    items: [\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'asterisk-logs', label: 'Asterisk Logs', moduleKey: '_system' },\\\\\\\\n      { id: 'role-permissions', label: 'Role Permissions', moduleKey: '_system' },\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function SuperAdmin() {\\\\\\\\n  const { user } = useAuth();\\\\\\\\n  const isSuperadmin = user?.role === 'superadmin';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const navGroups = useMemo(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!user) return [];\\\\\\\\n    if (isSuperadmin) return ALL_NAV_GROUPS;\\\\\\\\n    const enabledSet = new Set(user.modules || []);\\\\\\\\n    return ALL_NAV_GROUPS\\\\\\\\n      .filter(g =&gt; !g.superadminOnly)\\\\\\\\n      .map(g =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n        ...g,\\\\\\\\n        items: g.items.filter(item =&gt;\\\\\\\\n          (item.id === 'wallboard' || item.id === 'live-agents')\\\\\\\\n            ? enabledSet.has('wallboard') || enabledSet.has('live_agents')\\\\\\\\n            : enabledSet.has(item.moduleKey)\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n      }))\\\\\\\\n      .filter(g =&gt; g.items.length &gt; 0);\\\\\\\\n  }, [user, isSuperadmin]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const validViewIds = useMemo(\\\\\\\\n    () =&gt; navGroups.flatMap(g =&gt; g.items.filter(i =&gt; !i.href).map(i =&gt; i.id)),\\\\\\\\n    [navGroups]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\\\\\\\\n  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();\\\\\\\\n  const viewFromUrl = searchParams.get('view');\\\\\\\\n  const defaultView = validViewIds.includes('overview') ? 'overview' : (validViewIds[0] || 'overview');\\\\\\\\n  const view = validViewIds.includes(viewFromUrl) ? viewFromUrl : defaultView;\\\\\\\\n  const setView = useCallback(\\\\\\\\n    (id) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      setSearchParams(\\\\\\\\n        (prev) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev);\\\\\\\\n          if (id === 'overview') next.delete('view');\\\\\\\\n          else next.set('view', id);\\\\\\\\n          return next;\\\\\\\\n        },\\\\\\\\n        { replace: true }\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    [setSearchParams]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n  const [extensions, setExtensions] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n  const [trunks, setTrunks] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n  const [campaigns, setCampaigns] = &#96;Tenant ${t.id}&#96;; });\\\\\\\\n    return map;\\\\\\\\n  }, [tenants]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const filteredTenants = useMemo(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    let list = tenants || [];\\\\\\\\n    const q = (tenantSearchName || '').trim().toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    if (q) {\\\\\\\\n      list = list.filter((t) =&gt; (t.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) || String(t.id).includes(q));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const has = tenantFilterHas || {};\\\\\\\\n    const activeFilters = [\\\\\\\\n      has.users &amp;&amp; 'has_users',\\\\\\\\n      has.extensions &amp;&amp; 'has_extensions',\\\\\\\\n      has.trunks &amp;&amp; 'has_trunks',\\\\\\\\n      has.queues &amp;&amp; 'has_queues',\\\\\\\\n      has.inbound_routes &amp;&amp; 'has_inbound_routes',\\\\\\\\n      has.outbound_routes &amp;&amp; 'has_outbound_routes',\\\\\\\\n      has.campaigns &amp;&amp; 'has_campaigns',\\\\\\\\n    ].filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n    if (activeFilters.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      list = list.filter((t) =&gt; activeFilters.every((key) =&gt; t[key] === 1));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return list;\\\\\\\\n  }, [tenants, tenantSearchName, tenantFilterHas]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const getTenantLabel = (id) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (id == null) return '—';\\\\\\\\n    const name = tenantNameById[id];\\\\\\\\n    return name ? &#96;${id} · ${name}&#96; : String(id);\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const ResourceTenantFilterDropdown = ({ viewKey, label = 'Filter by tenant' }) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n    &lt;label className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"superadmin-tenant-filter-label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;span style={{ color: '#94a3b8', fontSize: '0.875rem' }}&gt;{label}&lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\\n      &lt;select\\\\\\\\n        className=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"superadmin-select superadmin-select-filter\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        value={resourceTenantFilter[viewKey] ?? ''}\\\\\\\\n        onChange={(e) =&gt; setResourceTenantFilter((prev) =&gt; ({ ...prev, [viewKey]: e.target.value }))}\\\\\\\\n      &gt;\\\\\\\\n        &lt;option value=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;All tenants&lt;/option&gt;\\\\\\\\n        {tenants.map((t) =&gt; (\\\\\\\\n          &lt;option key={t.id} value={t.id}&gt;{getTenantLabel(t.id)}&lt;/option&gt;\\\\\\\\n        ))}\\\\\\\\n      &lt;/select&gt;\\\\\\\\n    &lt;/label&gt;\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const normalizeQueueStrategy = (s) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const v = (s || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'roundrobin' || v === 'rrordered') return 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'leastrecent') return 'leastrecent';\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'fewestcalls') return 'fewestcalls';\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'random') return 'random';\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'rrmemory') return 'rrmemory';\\\\\\\\n    if (v === 'linear') return 'linear';\\\\\\\\n    return 'ringall';\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const getInboundDestinationLabel = (r) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const type = (r.destination_type || 'hangup').toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    const labels = {\\\\\\\\n      hangup: 'Terminate Call',\\\\\\\\n      announcement: 'Announcement',\\\\\\\\n      ivr: 'IVR',\\\\\\\\n      queue: 'Queue',\\\\\\\\n      voicemail: 'Voicemail',\\\\\\\\n      timecondition: 'Time condition',\\\\\\\\n      extension: 'Extension',\\\\\\\\n      exten: 'Extension',\\\\\\\\n      outbound_queue: 'Outbound Queue',\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    const base = labels[type] || type;\\\\\\\\n    if (type === 'queue' &amp;&amp; r.destination_id) {\\\\\\\\n      const q = queues.find((qu) =&gt; qu.id === r.destination_id);\\\\\\\\n      return q ? &#96;Queue: ${q.name}&#96; : &#96;Queue (${r.destination_id})&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if ((type === 'extension' || type === 'exten') &amp;&amp;
