10T10:10:34.900Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"7405d9ed-3497-4f85-aed4-1000fdb1ef9d\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"23bbf889-6c3b-4b1b-9904-d6b781857d54\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.900Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\nHere’s an analysis of the frontend React codebase for the call center application.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Frontend React Codebase Analysis\\\\n\\\\n## Summary Overview\\\\n\\\\n| Category | Count |\\\\n|----------|-------|\\\\n| Total src files analyzed | 25 |\\\\n| Root components | 4 (App, main, index.css, App.css) |\\\\n| Pages | 9 |\\\\n| Components | 2 |\\\\n| Context providers | 1 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Root Files\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\App.jsx&#96; (88 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- &#96;RootRedirect&#96; – redirects to role-based path or login\\\\n- &#96;App&#96; – &#96;AuthProvider&#96; → &#96;BrowserRouter&#96; → &#96;Routes&#96;\\\\n- Routes: &#96;/login&#96;, &#96;/&#96; (redirect), &#96;/dashboard&#96;, legacy &#96;/superadmin&#96;, &#96;/admin&#96;, &#96;/user&#96; (all redirect to dashboard), &#96;/wallboard&#96;, &#96;/reports&#96;, &#96;/agent&#96;, &#96;*&#96; (catch-all)\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- Uses &#96;AuthContext&#96; for auth; no local state.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Role-based routing; legacy paths redirect for backwards compatibility.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;Dashboard&#96; import points to &#96;SuperAdmin&#96; (alias).\\\\n- App is focused and readable.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- No &#96;aria-live&#96; or loading indicators for route changes.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\App.css&#96; (13 lines)\\\\n\\\\nGlobal reset: &#96;box-sizing&#96;, &#96;#root&#96;, &#96;body&#96; min-height. Simple reset.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\main.jsx&#96; (11 lines)\\\\n\\\\nMounts &#96;App&#96; in &#96;StrictMode&#96;. No additional logic.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\index.css&#96; (26 lines)\\\\n\\\\nGlobal styles: dark theme (&#96;#0f172a&#96;), Segoe UI/system fonts, form defaults for &#96;button&#96;, &#96;input&#96;, &#96;select&#96;, &#96;textarea&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\vite.config.js&#96; (14 lines)\\\\n\\\\nReact plugin; dev server with proxy &#96;/api&#96; → &#96;http://localhost:3001&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\package.json&#96; (42 lines)\\\\n\\\\nDependencies: React 19.2, react-router-dom 7.1, recharts 3.8. No global state lib (Zustand, Redux, etc.).\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Context\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\context\\\\\\\\AuthContext.jsx&#96; (151 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- &#96;ROLES&#96;, &#96;ROLE_IDS&#96;, &#96;normalizeRole&#96;, &#96;apiFetch&#96;, &#96;AuthProvider&#96;, &#96;useAuth()&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- &#96;user&#96; – from &#96;sessionStorage.pbx_user&#96;  \\\\n- &#96;authReady&#96; – session check finished  \\\\n- &#96;persistUser&#96;, &#96;login&#96;, &#96;logout&#96; in callbacks\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Login persistence; periodic auth check every 20s; agent-specific logout on &#96;/api/agent/logout&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;normalizeRole&#96; and &#96;ROLE_IDS&#96; duplicated in &#96;ProtectedRoute.jsx&#96;; &#96;API_BASE&#96; pattern repeated across pages.\\\\n- &#96;normalizeRole&#96; could be a shared util.\\\\n- &#96;displayName&#96; logic duplicated (lines 74 and 114).\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Components\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\components\\\\\\\\ProtectedRoute.jsx&#96; (39 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- &#96;ProtectedRoute&#96; and &#96;getRoleRedirectPath&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- Uses &#96;useAuth()&#96; and &#96;useLocation()&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;ROLE_IDS&#96; and &#96;normalizeRole&#96; duplicated from &#96;AuthContext&#96;.  \\\\n- &#96;campaign&#96; role in &#96;ROLE_ROUTES&#96; but not in &#96;AuthContext.ROLES&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- No &#96;aria-live&#96; for redirect messages.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\components\\\\\\\\Layout.jsx&#96; (35 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Shared layout: header with logo, title, subtitle, user badge, role tag, logout.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- No local state; &#96;handleLogout&#96; calls &#96;logout()&#96; and &#96;navigate('/login')&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Consistent chrome across dashboard-style pages.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Emoji logo (&#96;📞&#96;) lacks alternative text; logout button has no &#96;aria-label&#96;.\\\\n- No skip-to-content or landmark roles (&#96;role=\\\\\\\"banner\\\\\\\"&#96;, etc.).\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\components\\\\\\\\Layout.css&#96; (80 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Dark theme; header with flex layout; role badge; logout button hover states.\\\\n- No mobile breakpoints; header can overflow on small screens.\\\\n- &#96;.btn-logout&#96; has no &#96;:focus-visible&#96; for keyboard users.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. Pages\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Login.jsx&#96; (73 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Controlled form (username, password, error).\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- &#96;username&#96;, &#96;password&#96;, &#96;error&#96;; uses &#96;login()&#96; from auth.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Redirects to &#96;location.state?.from&#96; or role-based path.  \\\\n- Hint text references seed data and &#96;npm run server&#96; (development-only).\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- Dev hints visible in production; should be conditional or removed.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Labels and &#96;htmlFor&#96; used; &#96;autoComplete&#96; present; error area could use &#96;aria-live=\\\\\\\"polite\\\\\\\"&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n** responsiveness:**  \\\\n- Uses &#96;padding: 1rem&#96;; no dedicated mobile layout.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Login.css&#96; (135 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Centered card, gradient background, form groups, focus styles.\\\\n- &#96;.btn-login:active&#96; has &#96;transform: scale(0.99)&#96;.  \\\\n- No breakpoints; should work on small screens due to centering and padding.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\SuperAdmin.jsx&#96; (~4,888 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Single large component with many views (tenants, users, extensions, trunks, campaigns, inbound, outbound, queues, IVR, time conditions, sounds, voicemail, blacklist, CDR, DID/TFN, live agents, etc.).  \\\\n- Sidebar navigation driven by &#96;navGroups&#96; and role modules.  \\\\n- Views switched via &#96;view&#96; state and &#96;?view=&#96; query.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- 100+ &#96;useState&#96; and several &#96;useCallback&#96;/&#96;useMemo&#96;.  \\\\n- Loaders per section; many CRUD forms and modals.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- Strong candidate for splitting into smaller components and/or a view-based structure.  \\\\n- Duplicate API patterns (&#96;api()&#96;, &#96;setLoading&#96;, &#96;setError&#96;, JSON parsing).  \\\\n- Shared logic (e.g. CDR, blacklist) with Admin.jsx.  \\\\n- Many inline styles; large render tree.  \\\\n- Role modules: &#96;wallboard&#96; and &#96;live_agents&#96; both checked for live-agents access.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Rich configuration UI; sidebar navigation; sticky tables.  \\\\n- Some forms lack clear loading/disabled states.  \\\\n- Modal stacking and focus management not obvious.\\\\n\\\\n**Responsiveness:**  \\\\n- &#96;.superadmin-sidebar&#96; is fixed 230px; at 768px only Live Agent Monitoring has responsive tweaks.  \\\\n- Many tables will need horizontal scroll on mobile.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Modals likely trap focus; keyboard navigation for sidebar/menus unknown.  \\\\n- Tables lack &#96;scope&#96; and &#96;aria-sort&#96; where sortable.  \\\\n- Complex forms may need &#96;aria-describedby&#96; for validation.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\SuperAdmin.css&#96; (648 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Sidebar layout, forms, tables, modals, quick actions, stat cards, Live Agent styles, CDR, role-permissions toggle.  \\\\n- Breakpoint at 768px for live monitoring.  \\\\n- Shared class prefixes (&#96;superadmin-&#96;, &#96;la-&#96;, &#96;cdr-&#96;).  \\\\n- &#96;.ResponsiveContainer&#96; in recharts needs explicit height; some charts may render incorrectly if parent has no height.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Admin.jsx&#96; (399 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Dashboard with Overview, Reports (CDR, DID/TFN), Blacklist.  \\\\n- Uses &#96;Layout&#96;.  \\\\n- View switching via &#96;view&#96; state.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- &#96;stats&#96;, &#96;cdr&#96;, &#96;didTfnReport&#96;, &#96;tenants&#96;, &#96;blacklist&#96;, loaders, filters.  \\\\n- Loads stats and tenants on mount; reports/blacklist when view switches.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;API_BASE&#96; and &#96;api()&#96; duplicated from other modules.  \\\\n- CSV download logic duplicated (lines 300–318 and 391–402).  \\\\n- Inline styles (e.g. &#96;style={{ marginBottom: '1rem' }}&#96;); could use CSS classes.  \\\\n- &#96;loadReports&#96; calls CDR with fixed page 1; &#96; tenantId&#96; not passed to CDR.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Clear sections; tenant selector; back buttons for sub-views.  \\\\n- \\\\\\\"View reports\\\\\\\" button in User.jsx is a stub.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\User.jsx&#96; (43 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Simple dashboard with cards and action buttons.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- No data fetching; stat cards show placeholders (\\\\\\\"—\\\\\\\").\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- \\\\\\\"View reports\\\\\\\" and \\\\\\\"Contact list\\\\\\\" do nothing.  \\\\n- Layout/styling overlaps with Admin; could share a dashboard component.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Placeholder layout; buttons are mostly non-functional.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Agent.jsx&#96; (656 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Agent dashboard: extension select flow, status, breaks, transfers, CRM search, dial pad, modals (transfer, change password).\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- Many state variables: &#96;extensionSelected&#96;, &#96;status&#96;, &#96;breakState&#96;, &#96;activeCall&#96;, &#96;callState&#96;, &#96;incomingCall&#96;, etc.  \\\\n- Session via backend and fallback to local storage.  \\\\n- SSE for real-time events.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;apiFetch&#96; and &#96;API_BASE&#96; duplicated; &#96;formatDuration&#96; could be shared.  \\\\n- Auto-answer via &#96;useEffect&#96; and &#96;autoAnswerRef&#96; works but is non-obvious.  \\\\n- Unused CSS classes: &#96;.agent-btn-answer&#96;, &#96;.agent-btn-reject&#96;, &#96;.agent-incoming-actions&#96;.  \\\\n- Break/end-break logic split across backend and localStorage.  \\\\n- No error boundary around SSE connection.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Clear top bar; call info panel; CRM panel; dial pad when outbound.  \\\\n- Change password modal closes after success.  \\\\n- Transfer modal requires both target and type; UX is reasonable.\\\\n\\\\n**Responsiveness:**  \\\\n- Grid collapses at 900px and 600px; dial pad has &#96;max-width: 320px&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Dial input has &#96;aria-label&#96;.  \\\\n- Break menu closes on outside click.  \\\\n- Modals may not trap focus or handle Escape.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Agent.css&#96; (788 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Top bar, status badge, action buttons, break menu, call cards, CRM, dial pad, modals, contact lists.  \\\\n- Breakpoints at 900px and 600px.  \\\\n- Unused classes (&#96;.agent-btn-answer&#96;, &#96;.agent-btn-reject&#96;, &#96;.incoming-placeholder&#96;, etc.) indicate removed or planned features.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\AgentExtensionSelect.jsx&#96; (229 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Extension select form; calls backend to set extension and ring phone; polls until LOGGEDIN or timeout.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- &#96;extensions&#96;, &#96;selectedId&#96;, &#96;loading&#96;, &#96;submitting&#96;, &#96;ringing&#96;, &#96;error&#96;.  \\\\n- Uses refs for poll interval/timeout and &#96;onSelected&#96; callback.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;apiFetch&#96; and &#96;API_BASE&#96; duplicated again.  \\\\n- Poll cleanup on unmount; timeout and interval handled correctly.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- &#96;aria-live=\\\\\\\"polite\\\\\\\"&#96; on ringing message.  \\\\n- Form has labels; select has &#96;id&#96;/&#96;htmlFor&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\AgentExtensionSelect.css&#96; (121 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Card layout, form styles; &#96;.extension-select-form .form-group&#96; assumes parent uses &#96;.form-group&#96; (shared with Login.css).\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Wallboard.jsx&#96; (686 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Live monitoring plus Daily Report tab; metrics strip, agent table, queue table, agent detail panel, leaderboard.\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- Many state variables: &#96;tenantId&#96;, &#96;data&#96;, &#96;sseConnected&#96;, &#96;supervisorExt&#96;, &#96;reportData&#96;, &#96;activeTab&#96;, filters.  \\\\n- SSE for real-time updates; 2-second poll and 1-second tick for timers.  \\\\n- &#96;WallboardBreakDuration&#96; sub-component with local timer.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- &#96;formatDurationSec&#96; and &#96;formatAht&#96; used; &#96;api&#96;/&#96;API_BASE&#96; duplicated.  \\\\n- &#96;loadSummary&#96; in SSE &#96;onmessage&#96; causes extra fetches; may want debouncing.  \\\\n- &#96;handleForceEndBreak&#96; / &#96;handleForceLogout&#96; use raw &#96;fetch&#96; instead of shared &#96;api&#96;.  \\\\n- Tenant ID derived from &#96;sessionStorage&#96; directly; could use auth context.  \\\\n- \\\\\\\"Agent Reports\\\\\\\" is an &#96;&lt;a href=\\\\\\\"/reports\\\\\\\"&gt;&#96;; consistent with navigation.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Connection indicator; SSE vs polling status.  \\\\n- Tenant and extension selectors; filters; agent detail panel.  \\\\n- Good amount of call-center metrics.\\\\n\\\\n**Responsiveness:**  \\\\n- Breakpoints at 1024px and 640px; toolbar stacks on small screens.  \\\\n- Many columns in tables; horizontal scroll likely on mobile.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Connection indicator has &#96;title&#96;.  \\\\n- Tables may need headers and &#96;scope&#96;; row click handlers could be keyboard-accessible.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Wallboard.css&#96; (469 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Toolbar, tabs, metrics grid, tables, status badges, filter controls, detail panel, report layout.  \\\\n- Breakpoints at 1024px and 640px.  \\\\n- Sticky headers and scroll areas.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Reports.jsx&#96; (608 lines)\\\\n\\\\n**Structure:**  \\\\n- Tabs: Performance, Leaderboard, Break Analysis, Time Distribution, Trends, Hourly, Comparison, Queue Stats, Alerts.  \\\\n- Uses recharts (Bar, Line, Pie, Radar).\\\\n\\\\n**State:**  \\\\n- Tab, period, dates, tenant, agent, queue filters; per-tab data; loading/error.\\\\n\\\\n**Code quality:**  \\\\n- Does **not** use &#96;Layout&#96;; has its own header with links to Wallboard and Dashboard.  \\\\n- Inconsistent with other pages that use &#96;Layout&#96;.  \\\\n- &#96;ResponsiveContainer&#96; used without explicit &#96;width&#96;/&#96;height&#96;; recharts suggests both.  \\\\n- &#96;fmtSec&#96; / &#96;fmtSecShort&#96; could be shared.  \\\\n- &#96;handleCsvExport&#96; uses &#96;window.open&#96;; might fail with CORS in some setups.  \\\\n- &#96;user&#96; from &#96;useAuth&#96; is imported but unused.\\\\n\\\\n**UI/UX:**  \\\\n- Rich reporting; KPI strip; charts and tables.  \\\\n- Filter bar is dense; may be cramped on mobile.\\\\n\\\\n**Responsiveness:**  \\\\n- Breakpoints at 1024px and 768px; tabs scroll horizontally.  \\\\n- Charts may need smaller heights on small screens.\\\\n\\\\n**Accessibility:**  \\\\n- Charts have limited screen-reader support; tooltips help sighted users only.  \\\\n- Tables could use better headers and structure.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Reports.css&#96; (429 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Tabs, filters, KPIs, tables, ranks, scores, bar stacks, alerts, chart containers.  \\\\n- Responsive grid and flex layout.  \\\\n- &#96;.rpt-back&#96; defined but not obviously used in current structure.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;d:\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\pages\\\\\\\\Dashboard.css&#96; (123 lines)\\\\n\\\\n- Shared by Admin, User, Wallboard, SuperAdmin.  \\\\n- Card grid, stat cards, action buttons, table styles, selects.  \\\\n- Generic; no page-specific overrides; consistent look across dashboard-style pages.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Cross-Cutting Concerns\\\\n\\\\n### Duplicate Logic\\\\n\\\\n1. **API helpers** – &#96;api()&#96;, &#96;apiFetch()&#96;, &#96;API_BASE&#96; repeated in:\\\\n   - AuthContext, Admin, Agent, AgentExtensionSelect, Wallboard, SuperAdmin, Reports.\\\\n2. **Role normalization** – &#96;normalizeRole&#96; and &#96;ROLE_IDS&#96; in AuthContext and ProtectedRoute.\\\\n3. **Duration formatting** – &#96;formatDuration&#96; / &#96;formatDurationSec&#96; / &#96;fmtSec&#96; in Agent, Wallboard, Reports.\\\\n4. **CSV downloads** – Blob + &#96;createObjectURL&#96; + &#96;&lt;a download&gt;&#96; pattern repeated in Admin, SuperAdmin, Wallboard.\\\\n\\\\n### Unused or Stub Code\\\\n\\\\n1. **User.jsx** – \\\\\\\"View reports\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Contact list\\\\\\\" buttons are stubs.\\\\n2. **Agent.css** – &#96;.agent-btn-answer&#96;, &#96;.agent-btn-reject&#96;, &#96;.agent-incoming-actions&#96;, &#96;.incoming-placeholder&#96;, &#96;.btn-answer-demo&#96;, &#96;.contact-list&#96;, &#96;.recent-title&#96; appear unused.\\\\n3. **Reports.jsx** – &#96;user&#96; from &#96;useAuth&#96; is unused.\\\\n4. **Reports.css** – &#96;.rpt-back&#96; not clearly used.\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n\\\\n1. **SuperAdmin.jsx** – Large component and render tree; view changes re-render everything.\\\\n2. **Wallboard** – 2-second polling + SSE; &#96;loadSummary&#96; triggered frequently from SSE.\\\\n3. **Reports** – All tab data fetched; no lazy loading of inactive tabs.\\\\n4. **Agent** – 1-second timer for login duration; many state updates during calls.\\\\n\\\\n### Responsiveness\\\\n\\\\n1. **Layout / header** – No breakpoints; can overflow on small screens.\\\\n2. **Tables** – Most use &#96;overflow-x: auto&#96;; horizontal scroll on mobile.\\\\n3. **SuperAdmin sidebar** – Fixed 230px; no mobile sidebar treatment.\\\\n4. **Reports** – Many filters; horizontal scroll for tabs at 768px.\\\\n\\\\n### Accessibility\\\\n\\\\n1. **Focus management** – Modal focus trap and restoration not consistently implemented.\\\\n2. **ARIA** – Missing &#96;aria-live&#96; for errors, loading, redirects; limited landmark roles.\\\\n3. **Keyboard navigation** – Break menu and dropdowns need verification.\\\\n4. **Charts** – Limited support for screen readers.\\\\n5. **Emoji** – Logo emoji lacks alternative text.\\\\n\\\\n### CSS Observations\\\\n\\\\n1. **Theme** – Consistent dark palette (&#96;#0f172a&#96;, &#96;#1e293b&#96;, &#96;#334155&#96;, &#96;#64748b&#96;, &#96;#94a3b8&#96;, &#96;#f1f5f9&#96;).\\\\n2. **Borders** – Shared border-radius (6px, 8px, 10px, 12px).\\\\n3. **Transitions** – Generally 0.15–0.2s on hover.\\\\n4. **Focus** – Blue focus ring (&#96;#3b82f6&#96;) in places; &#96;.btn-logout&#96; lacks &#96;:focus-visible&#96;.\\\\n5. **Naming** – Mix of BEM-like (&#96;superadmin-&#96;) and shorthand (&#96;rpt-&#96;, &#96;wb-&#96;, &#96;la-&#96;).\\\\n6. **Specificity** – Some overrides use &#96;!important&#96; (e.g. &#96;.recent-title&#96;).\\\\n7. **Responsive** – Breakpoints vary (600, 640, 768, 900, 1024). Not centralized.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Recommendations Summary\\\\n\\\\n1. Centralize API helpers, role normalization, and duration formatting.\\\\n2. Split SuperAdmin into smaller components/views.\\\\n3. Use &#96;Layout&#96; for Reports and remove duplicate header.\\\\n4. Add or complete modal focus trap and Escape handling.\\\\n5. Add &#96;aria-live&#96; for errors and loading states.\\\\n6. Extract shared dashboard layout from Admin/User.\\\\n7. Remove or implement User.jsx action buttons.\\\\n8. Clean unused CSS in Agent.css.\\\\n9. Replace dev hints on Login with env-based or removed hints.\\\\n10. Reuse CSV download logic in a single utility.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1773136584138,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Frontend and to the plan, and states that the new DB is used while Asterisk integration concept stays the same.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8133,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**Next steps for you:** Create the database (e.g. &#96;CREATE DATABASE pbx_callcentre ...&#96;) and run &#96;docs/database-schema.sql&#96; against it when you implement the backend. Use this new schema for all app data; keep talking to Asterisk the same way as in the old PBX (AMI/HTTP, same concepts).\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8149,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. Create the database (MySQL) - I'll need to provide a way to create it. We have docs/database-schema.sql. I could:\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8158,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. Update docs/database-schema.sql to include CREATE DATABASE and USE, plus optional seed for a default superadmin user\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8195,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **read_file_v2** • Read file: D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\database-schema.sql&lt;/summary&gt;\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8218,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"For bcrypt hash of \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"demo123\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" - I'll need to generate it. Standard bcrypt hash for \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"demo123\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (cost 10): $2b$10$... I can use a well-known hash or document that we seed with a known hash. I'll add a seed script that uses bcrypt to hash the password so we don't store plaintext. In the SQL we can insert a placeholder and then the Node seed script updates it, or we run a small script to generate the hash and put it in SQL. Simplest: add a seed.sql that inserts users with a pre-generated bcrypt hash. I'll generate one - \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"demo123\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with bcrypt gives something like $2b$10$rQZ5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Zu... Actually I'll create a server/seed.js that runs after DB is created and inserts users with bcrypt hashed passwords. That way we don't need to hardcode a hash in SQL.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":8236,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: Standard bcrypt hash for \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"demo123\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (cost 10): $2b$10$... I can use a well-known hash or document that we seed with a known hash. I'll add a seed script that uses bcrypt to hash the password so we don't store plaintext. In the SQL we can insert a placeholder and then the Node seed script updates it, or we run a small script to generate the hash and put it in SQL. Simplest: add a seed.sql that inserts users with a pre-generated bcrypt hash. I'll generate one - \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"demo123\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with bcrypt gives something like $2b$10$rQZ5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Z5Zu... Actually I'll create a server/seed.js that runs after DB is created and inserts users with bcrypt hashed passwords. USE pbx_callcentre;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Campaigns (per tenant)\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS campaigns (\\\\\\\\n  id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  tenant_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  description VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  UNIQUE KEY uk_tenant_name (tenant_id, name),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_tenant (tenant_id)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add campaign_id to inbound_routes\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE inbound_routes\\\\\\\\n  ADD COLUMN campaign_id INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL AFTER destination_id,\\\\\\\\n  ADD INDEX idx_campaign (campaign_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Backfill: create default campaign per tenant and assign existing routes\\\\\\\\nINSERT IGNORE INTO campaigns (tenant_id, name, description)\\\\\\\\n  SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, 'Default', 'Default campaign for existing inbound routes'\\\\\\\\n  FROM inbound_routes;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nUPDATE inbound_routes ir\\\\\\\\n  INNER JOIN campaigns c ON c.tenant_id = ir.tenant_id AND c.name = 'Default'\\\\\\\\n  SET ir.campaign_id = c.id\\\\\\\\n  WHERE ir.campaign_id IS NULL;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE inbound_routes\\\\\\\\n  MODIFY COLUMN campaign_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Call records: store campaign name for reporting and agent display\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records\\\\\\\\n  ADD COLUMN campaign_name VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL AFTER queue_name,\\\\\\\\n  ADD INDEX idx_campaign_name Migration 016: Call Tracking Enhancements\\\\\\\\n-- Adds columns for detailed transfer tracking, abandon reasons, failover tracking, and wait time\\\\\\\\n-- \\\\\\\\n-- NOTE: Run each ALTER TABLE statement separately in MySQL Workbench.\\\\\\\\n-- If a column already exists, it will show \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Duplicate column name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" error - that's OK, just continue.\\\\\\\\n-- Or use the stored procedure version at the bottom for automatic handling.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- ==========================================\\\\\\\\n-- OPTION 1: Run statements one by one\\\\\\\\n-- (Skip any that show \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Duplicate column name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n-- ==========================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Ensure transfer_status exists (from migration 004)\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN transfer_status TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER recording_path;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Ensure transfer_to exists (from migration 004)\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN transfer_to VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL AFTER transfer_status;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add wait_time_sec\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN wait_time_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL AFTER talk_sec;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add transfer_from\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN transfer_from VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL AFTER transfer_to;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add transfer_time\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN transfer_time DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER transfer_from;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add transfer_type\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN transfer_type ENUM('agent_to_agent','agent_to_extension','agent_to_queue','agent_to_ivr','blind','attended') DEFAULT NULL AFTER transfer_time;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add abandon_reason\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN abandon_reason ENUM('caller_hangup','queue_timeout','failover','no_agents','ring_timeout') DEFAULT NULL AFTER transfer_type;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add failover_destination\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN failover_destination VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL AFTER abandon_reason;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Add ring_time_sec\\\\\\\\nALTER TABLE call_records ADD COLUMN ring_time_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL AFTER failover_destination;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- ==========================================\\\\\\\\n-- OPTION 2: Use stored procedure (run this entire block at once)\\\\\\\\n-- This handles \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"column already exists\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" errors automatically\\\\\\\\n-- ==========================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nDELIMITER //\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nDROP PROCEDURE IF EXISTS add_column_if_not_exists//\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE PROCEDURE add_column_if_not_exists(\\\\\\\\n    IN tbl_name VARCHAR(64),\\\\\\\\n    IN col_name VARCHAR(64),\\\\\\\\n    IN col_definition VARCHAR(500)\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\nBEGIN\\\\\\\\n    DECLARE col_exists INT DEFAULT 0;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO col_exists\\\\\\\\n    FROM information_schema.COLUMNS\\\\\\\\n    WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()\\\\\\\\n      AND TABLE_NAME = tbl_name\\\\\\\\n      AND COLUMN_NAME = col_name;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    IF col_exists = 0 THEN\\\\\\\\n        SET @sql = CONCAT('ALTER TABLE ', tbl_name, ' ADD COLUMN ', col_name, ' ', col_definition);\\\\\\\\n        PREPARE stmt FROM @sql;\\\\\\\\n        EXECUTE stmt;\\\\\\\\n        DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;\\\\\\\\n    END IF;\\\\\\\\nEND//\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nDELIMITER ;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Run the procedure for each column\\\\\\\\nCALL add_column_if_not_exists('call_records', 'transfer_status', 'TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0');\\\\\\\\nCALL add_column_if_not_exists('call_records', 'transfer_to', 'VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL');\\\\\\\\nCALL add_column_if_not_exists('call_records', 'wait_time_sec', 'INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL');\\\\\\\\nCALL 020_performance_reporting_tables.sql\\\\\\\\n-- Aggregated reporting tables for agent performance analytics.\\\\\\\\n-- Depends on: 017 (agent_sessions, agent_status_log), 018 (agent_daily_stats)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Hourly stats for granular intraday analysis and trend charts\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_hourly_stats (\\\\\\\\n  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  tenant_id       INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  agent_id        VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  agent_user_id   INT UNSIGNED,\\\\\\\\n  stat_date       DATE NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  stat_hour       TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  calls_answered  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  calls_missed    INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  talk_time_sec   INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  wrap_time_sec   INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  pause_time_sec  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  ready_time_sec  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  login_time_sec  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  occupancy       DECIMAL(5,4) DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  avg_handle_time_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  UNIQUE KEY uk_tenant_agent_date_hour (tenant_id, agent_id, stat_date, stat_hour),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_tenant_date_hour (tenant_id, stat_date, stat_hour),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_agent_date (agent_id, stat_date)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Break-level stats for discipline monitoring\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_break_stats (\\\\\\\\n  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  tenant_id       INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  agent_id        VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  agent_user_id   INT UNSIGNED,\\\\\\\\n  stat_date       DATE NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  break_type      VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Unknown',\\\\\\\\n  break_count     INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  total_duration_sec INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  avg_duration_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  max_duration_sec INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  UNIQUE KEY uk_tenant_agent_date_break (tenant_id, agent_id, stat_date, break_type),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_tenant_date Used by Asterisk HTTP callbacks and agent routes.\\\\\\\\n * Resolves agent number (extension / phone_login_number) to user id for realtime broadcast.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { broadcastToAgent, broadcastToWallboard, EventTypes } from './realtime.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { setQueueLastAgent } from './queue-strategy.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { resolveAgentUserByExtensionName } from './agent-extension-resolver.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { setAgentState, deleteAgentState, isRedisAvailable } from './redis-wallboard.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { logAgentStatusChange, mapToLogStatus } from './agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function resolveAgentTenantId(agentId) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!agentId) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const row = await queryOne('SELECT tenant_id FROM agent_status WHERE agent_id = ? LIMIT 1', [agentId]);\\\\\\\\n    return row?.tenant_id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n  } catch { return null; }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** Show only last 4 digits; rest masked. Used only for agent incoming_call payload. Monitoring/reporting keep full number. */\\\\\\\\nfunction maskCallerNumberLast4(num) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = String(num ?? '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!s) return '****';\\\\\\\\n  if (s.length &lt;= 4) return '****';\\\\\\\\n  return '*'.repeat(Math.min(s.length - 4, 8)) + s.slice(-4);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction updateRedisAgent(tenantId, agentId, data) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!isRedisAvailable() || !tenantId) return;\\\\\\\\n  setAgentState(tenantId, agentId, { ...data, updated_at: Date.now() }).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentNumber - extension name or phone_login_number (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;number|null&gt;} users.id for that agent\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getAgentUserIdByNumber(agentNumber) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!agentNumber) return null;\\\\\\\\n  const row = await resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(null, agentNumber);\\\\\\\\n  return row ? Number(row.id) : null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Create a call record (inbound or outbound). Idempotent by unique_id (ignore if exists).\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} opts - tenantId, uniqueId, channelId, sourceNumber, destinationNumber, direction, queueName, campaignName (optional), didTfn (optional, DID/TFN for reporting), agentUserId (optional), agentExtension, agentId (phone number)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createCallRecord(opts) {\\\\\\\\n  const {\\\\\\\\n    tenantId,\\\\\\\\n    uniqueId,\\\\\\\\n    channelId = null,\\\\\\\\n    sourceNumber = null,\\\\\\\\n    destinationNumber = null,\\\\\\\\n    direction = 'inbound',\\\\\\\\n    queueName = null,\\\\\\\\n    campaignName = null,\\\\\\\\n    didTfn = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentUserId = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentExtension = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentId = null,\\\\\\\\n  } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1', [uniqueId]);\\\\\\\\n  if (existing) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;INSERT INTO call_records (tenant_id, unique_id, channel_id, source_number, destination_number, did_tfn, direction, queue_name, campaign_name, agent_user_id, agent_extension, agent_id, start_time, status)\\\\\\\\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), 'ringing')&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [tenantId, uniqueId, channelId, sourceNumber, destinationNumber, didTfn || null, direction, queueName, campaignName || null, agentUserId, agentExtension, agentId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update call record when answered.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateCallRecordAnswered(uniqueId) {\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE call_records SET answer_time = NOW(), status = 'answered' WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, answer_time FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return row;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set agent on a call record (e.g. when queue assigns to an agent). No-op if record does not exist.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} uniqueId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} opts - agentUserId, agentExtension, agentId\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateCallRecordAgent(uniqueId, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const { agentUserId = null, agentExtension = null, agentId = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE call_records SET agent_user_id = ?, agent_extension = ?, agent_id = ? WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [agentUserId ?? null, agentExtension ?? null, agentId ?? null, uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Normalize call end status from Asterisk/dialplan/queue to canonical call_records status.\\\\\\\\n * Canonical: completed, answered, abandoned, failed, rejected, transferred, noanswer.\\\\\\\\n * Used so Queue Performance and reporting count correctly (e.g. exitempty/timeout → abandoned).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function normalizeCallStatus(raw) {\\\\\\\\n  if (raw == null || typeof raw !== 'string') return 'completed';\\\\\\\\n  const s = String(raw).trim().toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n  if (!s) return 'completed';\\\\\\\\n  switch (s) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'completed':\\\\\\\\n    case 'answer':\\\\\\\\n    case 'answered':\\\\\\\\n      return 'completed';\\\\\\\\n    case 'abandoned':\\\\\\\\n    case 'abondoned':\\\\\\\\n    case 'abandon':\\\\\\\\n    case 'exitempty':\\\\\\\\n    case 'timeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'exitwithtimeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'exitwithkey':\\\\\\\\n    case 'queue_timeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'noanswer':\\\\\\\\n    case 'no_answer':\\\\\\\\n    case 'leaveempty':\\\\\\\\n    case 'joinempty':\\\\\\\\n    case 'full':\\\\\\\\n      return 'abandoned';\\\\\\\\n    case 'failed':\\\\\\\\n    case 'fail':\\\\\\\\n    case 'busy':\\\\\\\\n    case 'cancel':\\\\\\\\n    case 'congestion':\\\\\\\\n      return 'failed';\\\\\\\\n    case 'rejected':\\\\\\\\n    case 'reject':\\\\\\\\n      return 'rejected';\\\\\\\\n    case 'transferred':\\\\\\\\n    case 'transfer':\\\\\\\\n      return 'transferred';\\\\\\\\n    default:\\\\\\\\n      return 'completed';\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update call record on hangup and set duration/talk_sec/wait_time_sec.\\\\\\\\n * Status is normalized to canonical value before storing.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateCallRecordEnd(uniqueId, status = 'completed') {\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, start_time, answer_time FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? Idempotent by unique_id (ignore if exists).\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} opts - tenantId, uniqueId, channelId, sourceNumber, destinationNumber, direction, queueName, campaignName (optional), didTfn (optional, DID/TFN for reporting), agentUserId (optional), agentExtension, agentId (phone number)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createCallRecord(opts) {\\\\\\\\n  const {\\\\\\\\n    tenantId,\\\\\\\\n    uniqueId,\\\\\\\\n    channelId = null,\\\\\\\\n    sourceNumber = null,\\\\\\\\n    destinationNumber = null,\\\\\\\\n    direction = 'inbound',\\\\\\\\n    queueName = null,\\\\\\\\n    campaignName = null,\\\\\\\\n    didTfn = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentUserId = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentExtension = null,\\\\\\\\n    agentId = null,\\\\\\\\n  } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1', [uniqueId]);\\\\\\\\n  if (existing) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;INSERT INTO call_records (tenant_id, unique_id, channel_id, source_number, destination_number, did_tfn, direction, queue_name, campaign_name, agent_user_id, agent_extension, agent_id, start_time, status)\\\\\\\\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), 'ringing')&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [tenantId, uniqueId, channelId, sourceNumber, destinationNumber, didTfn || null, direction, queueName, campaignName || null, agentUserId, agentExtension, agentId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update call record when answered.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateCallRecordAnswered(uniqueId) {\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE call_records SET answer_time = NOW(), status = 'answered' WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const row = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, answer_time FROM call_records WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return row;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set agent on a call record (e.g. when queue assigns to an agent). No-op if record does not exist.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} uniqueId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} opts - agentUserId, agentExtension, agentId\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateCallRecordAgent(uniqueId, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const { agentUserId = null, agentExtension = null, agentId = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;UPDATE call_records SET agent_user_id = ?, agent_extension = ?, agent_id = ? WHERE unique_id = ? LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [agentUserId ?? null, agentExtension ?? null, agentId ?? null, uniqueId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Normalize call end status from Asterisk/dialplan/queue to canonical call_records status.\\\\\\\\n * Canonical: completed, answered, abandoned, failed, rejected, transferred, noanswer.\\\\\\\\n * Used so Queue Performance and 'completed';\\\\\\\\n  const s = String(raw).trim().toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n  if (!s) return 'completed';\\\\\\\\n  switch (s) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'completed':\\\\\\\\n    case 'answer':\\\\\\\\n 'timeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'exitwithtimeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'exitwithkey':\\\\\\\\n    case 'queue_timeout':\\\\\\\\n    case 'noanswer':\\\\\\\\n    case 'no_answer':\\\\\\\\n    case 'leaveempty':\\\\\\\\n    case 'joinempty':\\\\\\\\n    case 'full':\\\\\\\\n      return 'abandoned';\\\\\\\\n    case 'failed':\\\\\\\\n    case 'fail':\\\\\\\\n    case 'busy':\\\\\\\\n    case development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\realtime.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":150,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\realtime.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Real-time event delivery via Server-Sent Events (SSE).\\\\\\\\n * Agents subscribe by agent user id; call-handler and routes broadcast events.\\\\\\\\n * Wallboard supervisors subscribe by tenant id for live dashboard updates.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst clients = new Map(); // agentUserId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst wallboardClients = new Map(); // tenantId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS = 25000;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction sendEvent(res, event) {\\\\\\\\n  if (res.writableEnded) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = typeof event === 'string' ? event : JSON.stringify(event);\\\\\\\\n  res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe an agent to real-time events. Call with the Express res for SSE.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId - req.agentUser.id\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (must not have been sent yet)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!clients.has(key)) clients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  clients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) {\\\\\\\\n      clearInterval(heartbeat);\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Unsubscribe one response for an agent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) clients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast an event to a single agent (all their tabs).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToAgent(agentUserId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe a wallboard viewer to real-time events for a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (SSE stream)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!wallboardClients.has(key)) wallboardClients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  wallboardClients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) { clearInterval(heartbeat); return; }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) wallboardClients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all wallboard viewers watching a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set || set.size === 0) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all agents in a tenant (e.g. queue activity for supervisor).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToTenant(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Event types: incoming_call, call_answered, call_ended, agent_status, queue_activity, call_held, call_resumed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const EventTypes = {\\\\\\\\n  INCOMING_CALL: 'incoming_call',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ANSWERED: 'call_answered',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ENDED: 'call_ended',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT_STATUS: 'agent_status',\\\\\\\\n  QUEUE_ACTIVITY: 'queue_activity',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_HELD: 'call_held',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_RESUMED: 'call_resumed',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":136}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\realtime.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":150},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Real-time event delivery via Server-Sent Events (SSE).\\\\\\\\n * Agents subscribe by agent user id; call-handler and routes broadcast events.\\\\\\\\n * Wallboard supervisors subscribe by tenant id for live dashboard updates.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst clients = new Map(); // agentUserId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst wallboardClients = new Map(); // tenantId -&gt; Set&lt;res&gt;\\\\\\\\nconst HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS = 25000;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction sendEvent(res, event) {\\\\\\\\n  if (res.writableEnded) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = typeof event === 'string' ? event : JSON.stringify(event);\\\\\\\\n  res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe an agent to real-time events. Call with the Express res for SSE.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId - req.agentUser.id\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (must not have been sent yet)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!clients.has(key)) clients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  clients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    unsubscribe(agentUserId, res);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) {\\\\\\\\n      clearInterval(heartbeat);\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Unsubscribe one response for an agent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribe(agentUserId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) clients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast an event to a single agent (all their tabs).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} agentUserId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToAgent(agentUserId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(agentUserId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = clients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Subscribe a wallboard viewer to real-time events for a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} res - Express response (SSE stream)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function subscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!wallboardClients.has(key)) wallboardClients.set(key, new Set());\\\\\\\\n  wallboardClients.get(key).add(res);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n  res.on('error', () =&gt; unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const heartbeat = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (res.writableEnded) { clearInterval(heartbeat); return; }\\\\\\\\n    res.write(': heartbeat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n  }, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  res.on('close', () =&gt; clearInterval(heartbeat));\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function unsubscribeWallboard(tenantId, res) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (set) {\\\\\\\\n    set.delete(res);\\\\\\\\n    if (set.size === 0) wallboardClients.delete(key);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all wallboard viewers watching a tenant.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const set = wallboardClients.get(key);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set || set.size === 0) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const res of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(&#96;data: ${data}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Broadcast to all agents in a tenant (e.g. queue activity for supervisor).\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {object} payload - { type: string, payload: any }\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToTenant(tenantId, payload) {\\\\\\\\n  broadcastToWallboard(tenantId, payload);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Event types: incoming_call, call_answered, call_ended, agent_status, queue_activity, call_held, call_resumed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const EventTypes = {\\\\\\\\n  INCOMING_CALL: 'incoming_call',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ANSWERED: 'call_answered',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_ENDED: 'call_ended',\\\\\\\\n  AGENT_STATUS: 'agent_status',\\\\\\\\n  QUEUE_ACTIVITY: 'queue_activity',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_HELD: 'call_held',\\\\\\\\n  CALL_RESUMED: 'call_resumed',\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":136,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4008,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\report-aggregator.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":150}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\report-aggregator.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":150,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\report-aggregator.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Background worker that periodically aggregates agent and queue stats\\\\\\\\n * into reporting tables for fast historical queries.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst INTERVAL_MS = parseInt(process.env.REPORT_AGGREGATE_INTERVAL_MS || '300000', 10); // 5 min\\\\\\\\nconst SLA_THRESHOLD_SEC = parseInt(process.env.WALLBOARD_SLA_SECONDS || '20', 10);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet timer = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function startReportAggregator() {\\\\\\\\n  runAggregation().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Initial aggregation error:', e?.message || e));\\\\\\\\n  timer = setInterval(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    runAggregation().catch((e) =&gt; console.error('Aggregation cycle error:', e?.message || e));\\\\\\\\n  }, INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;Report aggregator started (every ${INTERVAL_MS / 1000}s)&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function stopReportAggregator() {\\\\\\\\n  if (timer) clearInterval(timer);\\\\\\\\n  timer = null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function runAggregation() {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const tenants = await query('SELECT id FROM tenants ORDER BY id').catch(() =&gt; []);\\\\\\\\n    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n    for (const t of tenants) {\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateHourlyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateBreakStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateQueueDailyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateDailyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('runAggregation:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function aggregateHourlyStats(tenantId, date) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const agents = await query(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id AS user_id, phone_login_number AS agent_id FROM users WHERE parent_id = ? AND role = 5',\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const u of agents) {\\\\\\\\n      const agentId = String(u.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n      if (!agentId) continue;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      for (let h = 0; h &lt;= (date === new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) ? currentHour : 23); h++) {\\\\\\\\n        const hourStart = &#96;${date} ${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:00:00&#96;;\\\\\\\\n        const hourEnd = &#96;${date} ${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:59:59&#96;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let callsAnswered = 0, callsMissed = 0, talkSec = 0, totalDuration = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const cr = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT\\\\\\\\n               SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') AND answer_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS answered,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('abandoned') OR (answer_time IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('failed')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missed,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') THEN talk_sec ELSE 0 END), 0) AS talk,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') THEN duration_sec ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dur\\\\\\\\n             FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND (agent_id = ? OR agent_user_id = ?)\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [tenantId, agentId, u.user_id, hourStart, hourEnd]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          callsAnswered = Number(cr?.answered) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          callsMissed = Number(cr?.missed) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          talkSec = Number(cr?.talk) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          totalDuration = Number(cr?.dur) || 0;\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let pauseSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const br = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(start_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(end_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, COALESCE(end_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_status_log\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND status = 'PAUSED'\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time &lt;= ? AND (end_time &gt;= ? OR end_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          pauseSec = Math.max(0, Number(br?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let readySec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const rr = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(start_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(end_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, COALESCE(end_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_status_log\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND status = 'READY'\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time &lt;= ? AND (end_time &gt;= ? OR end_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          readySec = Math.max(0, Number(rr?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let loginSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const sess = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(login_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(logout_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, COALESCE(logout_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_sessions\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ?\\\\\\\\n               AND login_time &lt;= ? AND (logout_time &gt;= ? OR logout_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          loginSec = Math.max(0, Number(sess?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const wrapSec = Math.max(0, totalDuration - talkSec);\\\\\\\\n        const occupancy = loginSec &gt; 0 ? Math.min(1, (talkSec + wrapSec) / loginSec) : null;\\\\\\\\n        const aht = callsAnswered &gt; 0 ? Math.round(totalDuration / callsAnswered) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if (callsAnswered || callsMissed || talkSec || pauseSec || loginSec) {\\\\\\\\n          await query(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;INSERT INTO agent_hourly_stats\\\\\\\\n               (tenant_id, agent_id, agent_user_id, stat_date, stat_hour,\\\\\\\\n                calls_answered, calls_missed, talk_time_sec, wrap_time_sec, pause_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n                ready_time_sec, login_time_sec, occupancy, avg_handle_time_sec)\\\\\\\\n             VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\n             ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\\\\\\\\n               calls_answered = VALUES(calls_answered), calls_missed = VALUES(calls_missed),\\\\\\\\n               talk_time_sec = VALUES(talk_time_sec), wrap_time_sec = VALUES(wrap_time_sec),\\\\\\\\n               pause_time_sec = VALUES(pause_time_sec), ready_time_sec = VALUES(ready_time_sec),\\\\\\\\n               login_time_sec = VALUES(login_time_sec), occupancy = VALUES(occupancy),\\\\\\\\n               avg_handle_time_sec = VALUES(avg_handle_time_sec), updated_at = NOW()&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [tenantId, agentId, u.user_id, date, h,\\\\\\\\n             callsAnswered, callsMissed, talkSec, wrapSec, pauseSec,\\\\\\\\n             readySec, loginSec, occupancy, aht]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('aggregateHourlyStats:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function aggregateBreakStats(tenantId, date) {\\\\\\\\n  try e?.message || e));\\\\\\\\n  }, INTERVAL_MS);\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;Report aggregator started (every ${INTERVAL_MS / 1000}s)&#96;);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function aggregateHourlyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateBreakStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateQueueDailyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n      await aggregateDailyStats(t.id, today).catch(() =&gt; {});\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('runAggregation:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function aggregateHourlyStats(tenantId, date) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const agents = await query(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id AS user_id, phone_login_number AS agent_id FROM users WHERE parent_id = ? AND role = 5',\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const currentHour = new Date().getHours();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const u of agents) {\\\\\\\\n      const agentId = String(u.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n      if (!agentId) continue;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      for (let h = 0; h &lt;= (date === new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) ? currentHour : 23); h++) {\\\\\\\\n        const hourStart = &#96;${date} ${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:00:00&#96;;\\\\\\\\n        const hourEnd = &#96;${date} ${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:59:59&#96;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let callsAnswered = 0, callsMissed = 0, talkSec = 0, totalDuration = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const cr = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT\\\\\\\\n               SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') AND answer_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS answered,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('abandoned') OR (answer_time IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('failed')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missed,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') THEN talk_sec ELSE 0 END), 0) AS talk,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('failed','abandoned') THEN duration_sec ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dur\\\\\\\\n             FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND (agent_id = ? OR agent_user_id = ?)\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [tenantId, agentId, u.user_id, hourStart, hourEnd]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          callsAnswered = Number(cr?.answered) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          callsMissed = Number(cr?.missed) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          talkSec = Number(cr?.talk) || 0;\\\\\\\\n          totalDuration = Number(cr?.dur) || 0;\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let pauseSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const br = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(start_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(end_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, COALESCE(end_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_status_log\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND status = 'PAUSED'\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time &lt;= ? AND (end_time &gt;= ? OR end_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          pauseSec = Math.max(0, Number(br?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let readySec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const rr = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(start_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(end_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, COALESCE(end_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_status_log\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND status = 'READY'\\\\\\\\n               AND start_time &lt;= ? AND (end_time &gt;= ? OR end_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          readySec = Math.max(0, Number(rr?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        let loginSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const sess = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;SELECT COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, GREATEST(login_time, ?), LEAST(COALESCE(logout_time, NOW()), ?)),\\\\\\\\n                TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, COALESCE(logout_time, NOW()))\\\\\\\\n              )), 0) AS s\\\\\\\\n             FROM agent_sessions\\\\\\\\n             WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ?\\\\\\\\n               AND login_time &lt;= ? AND (logout_time &gt;= ? OR logout_time IS NULL)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            [hourStart, hourEnd, tenantId, agentId, hourEnd, hourStart]\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          loginSec = Math.max(0, Number(sess?.s) || 0);\\\\\\\\n        } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const wrapSec = Math.max(0, totalDuration - talkSec);\\\\\\\\n        const occupancy = loginSec &gt; 0 ? }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function aggregateBreakStats(tenantId, date) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":391,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":18437,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web
