"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.935Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_efcaa07c-eec6-42db-8ad4-24c9b62652d\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_efcaa07c-eec6-42db-8ad4-24c9b62652d\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\reports.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\reports.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\reports.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Historical Agent Performance Reporting API.\\\\\\\\n * Provides daily/weekly/monthly/custom-range reports, agent comparison,\\\\\\\\n * break analysis, leaderboard, trend analysis, and queue-based analytics.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst BREAK_LIMITS = {\\\\\\\\n  Lunch: 30 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'Short Break': 15 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  Meeting: 60 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  Training: 120 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'System Issue': 30 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'Personal Break': 15 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  default: 90 * 60,\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireReportAccess(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  const r = user.role;\\\\\\\\n  if (!(r === 'superadmin' || r === 1 || r === 'admin' || r === 2 || r === 'user' || r === 3)) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Reports access denied' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  req.reportUser = user;\\\\\\\\n  next();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.use(requireReportAccess);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction isSuperadmin(u) { return u.role === 'superadmin' || u.role === 1; }\\\\\\\\nfunction isAdmin(u) { return u.role === 'admin' || u.role === 2; }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function getTenantId(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const u = req.reportUser;\\\\\\\\n  const assigned = u.parent_id != null || u.tenant_id != null\\\\\\\\n    ? (parseInt(u.parent_id ?? u.tenant_id, 10) || null)\\\\\\\\n    : null;\\\\\\\\n  if (isSuperadmin(u) || (isAdmin(u) &amp;&amp; !assigned)) {\\\\\\\\n    const q = req.query.tenant_id;\\\\\\\\n    if (q != null &amp;&amp; q !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      const n = parseInt(q, 10);\\\\\\\\n      if (!Number.isNaN(n) &amp;&amp; n &gt;= 1) return n;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const first = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM tenants ORDER BY id LIMIT 1');\\\\\\\\n    return first ? first.id : null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (assigned) return assigned;\\\\\\\\n  const first = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM tenants ORDER BY id LIMIT 1');\\\\\\\\n  return first ? first.id : null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseDateRange(req) {\\\\\\\\n  const { period, start_date, end_date, date } = req.query;\\\\\\\\n  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (period === 'weekly') {\\\\\\\\n    const d = new Date();\\\\\\\\n    d.setDate(d.getDate() - d.getDay());\\\\\\\\n    return { startDate: d.toISOString().slice(0, 10), endDate: today };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (period === 'monthly') {\\\\\\\\n    const d = new Date();\\\\\\\\n    return { startDate: &#96;${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-01&#96;, endDate: today };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (start_date &amp;&amp; end_date) {\\\\\\\\n    return { startDate: start_date, endDate: end_date };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return { startDate: date || today, endDate: date || today };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction fmtSec(s) {\\\\\\\\n  const sec = Number(s) || 0;\\\\\\\\n  const h = Math.floor(sec / 3600);\\\\\\\\n  const m = Math.floor((sec % 3600) / 60);\\\\\\\\n  const ss = sec % 60;\\\\\\\\n  return &#96;${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(ss).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction csvEscape(s) {\\\\\\\\n  if (s == null) return '';\\\\\\\\n  const str = String(s);\\\\\\\\n  if (/[,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n]/.test(str)) return &#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${str.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/g, '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;;\\\\\\\\n  return str;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n// GET /api/reports/performance\\\\\\\\n// Agent performance summary for date range\\\\\\\\n// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/performance', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = await getTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    if (!tenantId) return res.json({ success: true, agents: [] });\\\\\\\\n    const { startDate, endDate } = parseDateRange(req);\\\\\\\\n    const agentFilter = req.query.agent_id || null;\\\\\\\\n    const queueFilter = req.query.queue || null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let agents = [];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      let sql = &#96;\\\\\\\\n        SELECT d.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(u.phone_login_name, u.username) AS name,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.calls_answered) AS calls_answered,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.calls_missed) AS calls_missed,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.talk_time_sec) AS talk_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.wrap_time_sec) AS wrap_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.pause_time_sec) AS pause_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.login_time_sec) AS login_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               CASE WHEN SUM(d.login_time_sec) &gt; 0\\\\\\\\n                 THEN LEAST(1, (SUM(d.talk_time_sec) + SUM(d.wrap_time_sec)) / SUM(d.login_time_sec))\\\\\\\\n                 ELSE NULL END AS occupancy,\\\\\\\\n               CASE WHEN SUM(d.calls_answered) &gt; 0\\\\\\\\n                 THEN ROUND((SUM(d.talk_time_sec) + SUM(d.wrap_time_sec)) / SUM(d.calls_answered))\\\\\\\\n                 ELSE NULL END AS aht\\\\\\\\n        FROM agent_daily_stats d\\\\\\\\n        LEFT JOIN users u ON u.phone_login_number = d.agent_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n        WHERE d.tenant_id = ? AND d.stat_date BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;;\\\\\\\\n      const params = [tenantId, startDate, endDate];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (agentFilter) {\\\\\\\\n        sql += ' AND d.agent_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n        params.push(agentFilter);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' GROUP BY d.agent_id, u.phone_login_name, u.username ORDER BY name';\\\\\\\\n      agents = await query(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('Report performance error:', e);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If queue filter, narrow to agents who handled calls in that queue\\\\\\\\n    if (queueFilter &amp;&amp; agents.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const qAgents = await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n           WHERE tenant_id = ? AND queue_name = ? AND DATE(start_time) BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [tenantId, queueFilter, startDate, endDate]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        const qSet = new Set(qAgents.map(r =&gt; r.agent_id));\\\\\\\\n        agents = agents.filter(a =&gt; qSet.has(a.agent_id));\\\\\\\\n      } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const result = agents.map(a =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const callsAnswered = Number(a.calls_answered) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const loginSec = Number(a.login_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const talkSec = Number(a.talk_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const wrapSec = Number(a.wrap_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const pauseSec = Number(a.pause_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const occ = a.occupancy != null ? Number(a.occupancy) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const maxCalls = 80 * Math.max(1, Math.round((new Date(endDate) - new Date(startDate)) / 86400000) + 1);\\\\\\\\n      const callScore = Math.min(100, (callsAnswered / maxCalls) * 100);\\\\\\\\n      const occScore = occ != null ? occ * 100 : 0;\\\\\\\\n      const score = Math.round((callScore * 0.4) + (occScore * 0.2)) || 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        agent_id: a.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n        name: a.name || a.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n        calls_answered: callsAnswered,\\\\\\\\n        calls_missed: Number(a.calls_missed) || 0,\\\\\\\\n        talk_time_sec: talkSec,\\\\\\\\n        talk_time: fmtSec(talkSec),\\\\\\\\n        wrap_time_sec: wrapSec,\\\\\\\\n        wrap_time: fmtSec(wrapSec),\\\\\\\\n        pause_time_sec: pauseSec,\\\\\\\\n        pause_time: fmtSec(pauseSec),\\\\\\\\n        login_time_sec: loginSec,\\\\\\\\n        login_time: fmtSec(loginSec),\\\\\\\\n        ready_time_sec: Math.max(0, loginSec - talkSec - wrapSec - pauseSec),\\\\\\\\n        occupancy: occ,\\\\\\\\n        occupancy_pct: occ != null ? Math.round(occ * 100) : 0,\\\\\\\\n        aht: Number(a.aht) || 0,\\\\\\\\n        aht_formatted: fmtSec(Number(a.aht) || 0),\\\\\\\\n        performance_score: score,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (req.query.format === 'csv') {\\\\\\\\n      const headers = ['Agent ID', 'Name', 'Calls Answered', 'Calls Missed', 'Talk Time', 'Wrap Time',\\\\\\\\n        'Pause Time', 'Login Time', 'Occupancy %', 'AHT', 'Score'];\\\\\\\\n      const lines = [headers.map(csvEscape).join(',')];\\\\\\\\n      for (const a of result) {\\\\\\\\n        lines.push([a.agent_id, a.name, a.calls_answered, a.calls_missed, a.talk_time, a.wrap_time,\\\\\\\\n          a.pause_time, a.login_time, a.occupancy_pct, a.aht_formatted, a.performance_score\\\\\\\\n        ].map(csvEscape).join(','));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/csv; charset=utf-8');\\\\\\\\n      res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', &#96;attachment; filename=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"performance-${startDate}-${endDate}.csv\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      return res.send('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\uFEFF' + lines.join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n'));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, startDate, endDate, agents: result });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Report performance error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to load performance report' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":763}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\reports.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Historical Agent Performance Reporting API.\\\\\\\\n * Provides daily/weekly/monthly/custom-range reports, agent comparison,\\\\\\\\n * break analysis, leaderboard, trend analysis, and queue-based analytics.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst BREAK_LIMITS = {\\\\\\\\n  Lunch: 30 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'Short Break': 15 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  Meeting: 60 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  Training: 120 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'System Issue': 30 * 60,\\\\\\\\n  'Personal Break': 15 * success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  const r = user.role;\\\\\\\\n  if (!(r === 'superadmin' || r === 1 || r === 'admin' || r === 2 || r === 'user' || r === 3)) {\\\\\\\\n next();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.use(requireReportAccess);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction isSuperadmin(u) { return u.role === 'superadmin' || u.role === 1; }\\\\\\\\nfunction isAdmin(u) { return null\\\\\\\\n    ? end_date) {\\\\\\\\n    return { startDate: start_date, endDate: end_date };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return { startDate: date || today, endDate: date || today };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction fmtSec(s) {\\\\\\\\n  const sec = Number(s) || 0;\\\\\\\\n  const h = Math.floor(sec / 3600);\\\\\\\\n  const m = Math.floor((sec % 3600) / 60);\\\\\\\\n  const ss = sec % 60;\\\\\\\\n  return &#96;${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(ss).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction csvEscape(s) {\\\\\\\\n  if (s == null) return '';\\\\\\\\n  const str = String(s);\\\\\\\\n  if (/[,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n]/.test(str)) return &#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${str.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/g, '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;;\\\\\\\\n  return str;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\n// GET /api/reports/performance\\\\\\\\n// Agent performance summary for date range\\\\\\\\n// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/performance', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = await getTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    if (!tenantId) return res.json({ success: true, agents: [] });\\\\\\\\n    const { startDate, endDate } = parseDateRange(req);\\\\\\\\n    const agentFilter = req.query.agent_id || null;\\\\\\\\n    const queueFilter = req.query.queue || null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let agents = [];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      let sql = &#96;\\\\\\\\n        SELECT d.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n               COALESCE(u.phone_login_name, u.username) AS name,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.calls_answered) AS calls_answered,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.calls_missed) AS calls_missed,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.talk_time_sec) AS talk_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.wrap_time_sec) AS wrap_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.pause_time_sec) AS pause_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               SUM(d.login_time_sec) AS login_time_sec,\\\\\\\\n               CASE WHEN SUM(d.login_time_sec) &gt; 0\\\\\\\\n                 THEN LEAST(1, (SUM(d.talk_time_sec) + SUM(d.wrap_time_sec)) / SUM(d.login_time_sec))\\\\\\\\n                 ELSE NULL END AS occupancy,\\\\\\\\n               CASE WHEN SUM(d.calls_answered) &gt; 0\\\\\\\\n                 THEN ROUND((SUM(d.talk_time_sec) + SUM(d.wrap_time_sec)) / SUM(d.calls_answered))\\\\\\\\n                 ELSE NULL END AS aht\\\\\\\\n        FROM agent_daily_stats d\\\\\\\\n        LEFT JOIN users u ON u.phone_login_number = d.agent_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n        WHERE d.tenant_id = ? AND d.stat_date BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;;\\\\\\\\n      const params = [tenantId, startDate, endDate];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (agentFilter) {\\\\\\\\n        sql += ' AND d.agent_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n        params.push(agentFilter);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' GROUP BY d.agent_id, u.phone_login_name, u.username ORDER BY name';\\\\\\\\n      agents = await query(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') console.error('Report performance error:', e);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // If queue filter, narrow to agents who handled calls in that queue\\\\\\\\n    if (queueFilter &amp;&amp; agents.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const qAgents = await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n           WHERE tenant_id = ? AND queue_name = ? AND DATE(start_time) BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          [tenantId, queueFilter, startDate, endDate]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        const qSet = new Set(qAgents.map(r =&gt; r.agent_id));\\\\\\\\n        agents = agents.filter(a =&gt; qSet.has(a.agent_id));\\\\\\\\n      } catch (_) {}\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const result = agents.map(a =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const callsAnswered = Number(a.calls_answered) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const loginSec = Number(a.login_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const talkSec = Number(a.talk_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const wrapSec = Number(a.wrap_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const pauseSec = Number(a.pause_time_sec) || 0;\\\\\\\\n      const occ = a.occupancy != null ? Number(a.occupancy) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const maxCalls = 80 * Math.max(1, Math.round((new Date(endDate) - new Date(startDate)) / 86400000) + 1);\\\\\\\\n      const callScore = Math.min(100, (callsAnswered / maxCalls) * 100);\\\\\\\\n      const occScore = occ != null ? occ * 100 : 0;\\\\\\\\n      const score = Math.round((callScore * 0.4) + (occScore * 0.2)) || 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        agent_id: a.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n        name: a.name || a.agent_id,\\\\\\\\n        calls_answered: callsAnswered,\\\\\\\\n        calls_missed: Number(a.calls_missed) || 0,\\\\\\\\n        talk_time_sec: talkSec,\\\\\\\\n        talk_time: fmtSec(talkSec),\\\\\\\\n        wrap_time_sec: wrapSec,\\\\\\\\n        wrap_time: fmtSec(wrapSec),\\\\\\\\n        pause_time_sec: pauseSec,\\\\\\\\n        pause_time: fmtSec(pauseSec),\\\\\\\\n        login_time_sec: loginSec,\\\\\\\\n        login_time: fmtSec(loginSec),\\\\\\\\n        ready_time_sec: Math.max(0, loginSec - talkSec - wrapSec - pauseSec),\\\\\\\\n        occupancy: occ,\\\\\\\\n        occupancy_pct: occ != null ? Math.round(occ * 100) : 0,\\\\\\\\n        aht: Number(a.aht) || 0,\\\\\\\\n        aht_formatted: fmtSec(Number(a.aht) || 0),\\\\\\\\n        performance_score: score,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (req.query.format === 'csv') {\\\\\\\\n      const headers = ['Agent ID', 'Name', 'Calls Answered', 'Calls Missed', 'Talk Time', 'Wrap Time',\\\\\\\\n        'Pause Time', 'Login Time', 'Occupancy %', 'AHT', 'Score'];\\\\\\\\n      const lines = [headers.map(csvEscape).join(',')];\\\\\\\\n      for (const a of result) {\\\\\\\\n        lines.push([a.agent_id, a.name, a.calls_answered, a.calls_missed, a.talk_time, a.wrap_time,\\\\\\\\n          a.pause_time, a.login_time, a.occupancy_pct, a.aht_formatted, a.performance_score\\\\\\\\n {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!Number.isFinite(id) || id &lt; 1) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid id' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n    const isSuperadmin = user?.role === 'superadmin' || user?.role === 1;\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id, tenant_id FROM blacklist WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Not found' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!isSuperadmin &amp;&amp; (user?.parent_id != null || user?.tenant_id != null)) {\\\\\\\\n      const adminTenant = user.parent_id ?? user.tenant_id;\\\\\\\\n      if (existing.tenant_id !== adminTenant) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Can only delete blacklist entries for your tenant' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    await query('DELETE FROM blacklist WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Admin blacklist delete error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to delete' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// --- Stats (overview) ---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/stats', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n    const isSuperadmin = user?.role === 'superadmin' || user?.role === 1;\\\\\\\\n    const adminTenantId = !isSuperadmin &amp;&amp; (user?.parent_id != null || user?.parent_id === 0) ? parseInt(user.parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const safeCount = async (sql, params = []) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const row = await queryOne(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n        return row?.n ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        return 0;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    let active_agents, total_users, extensions, trunks, queues, inbound_routes;\\\\\\\\n    if (adminTenantId != null &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(adminTenantId)) {\\\\\\\\n      [active_agents, total_users, extensions, trunks, queues, inbound_routes] = await Promise.all([\\\\\\\\n        queryOne(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM agent_status a JOIN users u ON u.phone_login_number = a.agent_id AND u.role = 5 WHERE a.status NOT IN ('LoggedOut', 'LoginFailed') AND u.parent_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", [adminTenantId]).then(r =&gt; r?.n ?? 0).catch(() =&gt; 0),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM users WHERE parent_id = ?', [adminTenantId]),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ?', [adminTenantId]),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sip_trunks WHERE tenant_id = ?', [adminTenantId]),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM queues WHERE tenant_id = ?', [adminTenantId]),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM inbound_routes WHERE tenant_id = ?', [adminTenantId]),\\\\\\\\n      ]);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      [active_agents, total_users, extensions, trunks, queues, inbound_routes] = await Promise.all([\\\\\\\\n        safeCount(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM agent_status WHERE status NOT IN ('LoggedOut', 'LoginFailed')\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM users'),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sip_extensions'),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sip_trunks'),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM queues'),\\\\\\\\n        safeCount('SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM inbound_routes'),\\\\\\\\n      ]);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({\\\\\\\\n      success: true,\\\\\\\\n      stats: {\\\\\\\\n        active_agents,\\\\\\\\n        total_users,\\\\\\\\n        extensions,\\\\\\\\n        trunks,\\\\\\\\n        queues,\\\\\\\\n        inbound_routes,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Admin stats error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    const message = err?.message || 'Failed to load stats';\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: message });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// --- Live agents ---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/live-agents', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n    const isSuperadmin = user?.role === 'superadmin' || user?.role === 1;\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = !isSuperadmin &amp;&amp; (user?.parent_id != null || user?.parent_id === 0) ? parseInt(user.parent_id, 10) : null;\\\\\\\\n    const tenantIdParam = effectiveTenantId != null ? String(effectiveTenantId) : req.query.tenant_id;\\\\\\\\n    let tenantFilter = '';\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (tenantIdParam != null &amp;&amp; tenantIdParam !== '' &amp;&amp; tenantIdParam !== 'all') {\\\\\\\\n      const tid = parseInt(tenantIdParam, 10);\\\\\\\\n      if (!Number.isNaN(tid) &amp;&amp; tid &gt;= 1) {\\\\\\\\n        tenantFilter = 'AND u.parent_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n        params.push(tid);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let agentRows;\\\\\\\\n    const selectWithBreakStarted = &#96;SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.phone_login_name, u.phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n              u.parent_id AS tenant_id, u.account_status, u.soft_phone_login_status,\\\\\\\\n              a.agent_id, a.status, a.break_name, a.break_started_at, a.queue_name,\\\\\\\\n              a.customer_number, a.calls_taken, a.extension_number,\\\\\\\\n              a.session_started_at, a.call_id, a.timestamp,\\\\\\\\n              t.name AS tenant_name\\\\\\\\n       FROM users u\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN agent_status a ON a.agent_id = u.phone_login_number\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE u.role = 5 ${tenantFilter}\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY\\\\\\\\n         CASE\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status IS NULL OR a.status IN ('LoggedOut','LoginFailed') THEN 2\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status = 'On Call' THEN 0\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status = 'Ringing' THEN 0\\\\\\\\n           ELSE 1\\\\\\\\n         END,\\\\\\\\n         a.timestamp DESC,\\\\\\\\n         u.username ASC&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const selectWithoutBreakStarted = &#96;SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.phone_login_name, u.phone_login_number,\\\\\\\\n              u.parent_id AS tenant_id, u.account_status, u.soft_phone_login_status,\\\\\\\\n              a.agent_id, a.status, a.break_name, a.queue_name,\\\\\\\\n              a.customer_number, a.calls_taken, a.extension_number,\\\\\\\\n              a.session_started_at, a.call_id, a.timestamp,\\\\\\\\n              t.name AS tenant_name\\\\\\\\n       FROM users u\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN agent_status a ON a.agent_id = u.phone_login_number\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE u.role = 5 ${tenantFilter}\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY\\\\\\\\n         CASE\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status IS NULL OR a.status IN ('LoggedOut','LoginFailed') THEN 2\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status = 'On Call' THEN 0\\\\\\\\n           WHEN a.status = 'Ringing' THEN 0\\\\\\\\n           ELSE 1\\\\\\\\n         END,\\\\\\\\n         a.timestamp DESC,\\\\\\\\n         u.username ASC&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      agentRows = await query(selectWithBreakStarted, params);\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code === 'ER_BAD_FIELD_ERROR' &amp;&amp; e?.message?.includes('break_started_at')) {\\\\\\\\n        agentRows = await query(selectWithoutBreakStarted, params);\\\\\\\\n        agentRows.forEach((r) =&gt; { r.break_started_at = null; });\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        throw e;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let breaksByAgent = [];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const tenantIds = [...new Set(agentRows.map((r) =&gt; r.tenant_id).filter(Boolean))];\\\\\\\\n      if (tenantIds.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n        const placeholders = tenantIds.map(() =&gt; '?').join(',');\\\\\\\\n        breaksByAgent = await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;SELECT agent_id, start_time, end_time\\\\\\\\n           FROM session_agent_breaks\\\\\\\\n           WHERE tenant_id IN (${placeholders}) AND start_time &gt;= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 HOUR)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          tenantIds\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') throw e;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let activeCallMap = {};\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const callRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_id, direction, source_number, destination_number, did_tfn, queue_name, start_time\\\\\\\\n         FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE end_time IS NULL AND status IN ('ringing', 'answered') AND DATE(start_time) = CURDATE()\\\\\\\\n         ORDER BY start_time DESC&#96;\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      for (const c of callRows) {\\\\\\\\n        if (c.agent_id &amp;&amp; !activeCallMap[c.agent_id]) {\\\\\\\\n          activeCallMap[c.agent_id] = c;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      // call_records table may not exist\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const now = new Date();\\\\\\\\n    const agents = agentRows.map((r) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const agentId = r.phone_login_number || r.agent_id || String(r.user_id);\\\\\\\\n      const call = activeCallMap[agentId] || null;\\\\\\\\n      const status = r.status || (r.account_status === 0 ? 'Disabled' : 'LoggedOut');\\\\\\\\n      const sessionStart = r.session_started_at ? new Date(r.session_started_at) : null;\\\\\\\\n      let totalBreakSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n      for (const b of breaksByAgent) {\\\\\\\\n        if (b.agent_id !== r.user_id) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const start = new Date(b.start_time);\\\\\\\\n        if (sessionStart &amp;&amp; start &lt; sessionStart) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const end = new Date(b.end_time);\\\\\\\\n        totalBreakSec += Math.max(0, Math.floor((end - start) / 1000));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (r.break_started_at) {\\\\\\\\n        totalBreakSec += Math.max(0, Math.floor((now - new Date(r.break_started_at)) / 1000));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        agent_id: agentId,\\\\\\\\n        user_id: r.user_id,\\\\\\\\n        name: r.phone_login_name || r.username || agentId,\\\\\\\\n        extension: r.extension_number || r.phone_login_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        status,\\\\\\\\n        break_name: r.break_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        break_started_at: r.break_started_at || null,\\\\\\\\n        queue_name: r.queue_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        customer_number: r.customer_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        calls_taken: r.calls_taken || 0,\\\\\\\\n        session_started_at: r.session_started_at || null,\\\\\\\\n        total_break_session_sec: totalBreakSec,\\\\\\\\n        timestamp: r.timestamp || null,\\\\\\\\n        tenant_id: r.tenant_id,\\\\\\\\n        tenant_name: r.tenant_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_direction: call?.direction || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_source: call?.source_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_destination: call?.destination_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_did: call?.did_tfn || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_start_time: call?.start_time || null,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const online = agents.filter(\\\\\\\\n      (a) =&gt;   } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code === 'ER_BAD_FIELD_ERROR' &amp;&amp; e?.message?.includes('break_started_at')) {\\\\\\\\n        agentRows = await query(selectWithoutBreakStarted, params);\\\\\\\\n        agentRows.forEach((r) =&gt; { r.break_started_at = null; });\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        throw e;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let breaksByAgent = [];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const tenantIds = [...new Set(agentRows.map((r) =&gt; r.tenant_id).filter(Boolean))];\\\\\\\\n      if (tenantIds.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n        const placeholders = tenantIds.map(() =&gt; '?').join(',');\\\\\\\\n        breaksByAgent = await query(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;SELECT agent_id, start_time, end_time\\\\\\\\n           FROM session_agent_breaks\\\\\\\\n           WHERE tenant_id IN (${placeholders}) AND start_time &gt;= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 HOUR)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          tenantIds\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      if (e?.code !== 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') throw e;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let activeCallMap = {};\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const callRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_id, direction, source_number, destination_number, did_tfn, queue_name, start_time\\\\\\\\n         FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE end_time IS NULL AND status IN ('ringing', 'answered') AND DATE(start_time) = CURDATE()\\\\\\\\n         ORDER BY start_time DESC&#96;\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      for (const c of callRows) {\\\\\\\\n        if (c.agent_id &amp;&amp; !activeCallMap[c.agent_id]) {\\\\\\\\n          activeCallMap[c.agent_id] = c;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      // call_records table may not exist\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const now = new Date();\\\\\\\\n    const agents = agentRows.map((r) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const agentId = r.phone_login_number || r.agent_id || String(r.user_id);\\\\\\\\n      const call = activeCallMap[agentId] || null;\\\\\\\\n      const status = r.status || (r.account_status === 0 ? 'Disabled' : 'LoggedOut');\\\\\\\\n      const sessionStart = r.session_started_at ? new Date(r.session_started_at) : null;\\\\\\\\n      let totalBreakSec = 0;\\\\\\\\n      for (const b of breaksByAgent) {\\\\\\\\n        if (b.agent_id !== r.user_id) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const start = new Date(b.start_time);\\\\\\\\n        if (sessionStart &amp;&amp; start &lt; sessionStart) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const end = new Date(b.end_time);\\\\\\\\n        totalBreakSec += Math.max(0, Math.floor((end - start) / 1000));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (r.break_started_at) {\\\\\\\\n        totalBreakSec += Math.max(0, Math.floor((now - new Date(r.break_started_at)) / 1000));\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        agent_id: agentId,\\\\\\\\n        user_id: r.user_id,\\\\\\\\n        name: r.phone_login_name || r.username || agentId,\\\\\\\\n        extension: r.extension_number || r.phone_login_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        status,\\\\\\\\n        break_name: r.break_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        break_started_at: r.break_started_at || null,\\\\\\\\n        queue_name: r.queue_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        customer_number: r.customer_number || null,\\\\\\\\n        calls_taken: r.calls_taken || 0,\\\\\\\\n        session_started_at: r.session_started_at || null,\\\\\\\\n        total_break_session_sec: totalBreakSec,\\\\\\\\n        timestamp: r.timestamp || null,\\\\\\\\n        tenant_id: r.tenant_id,\\\\\\\\n        tenant_name: r.tenant_name || null,\\\\\\\\n        call_direction: null,\\\\\\\\n        call_start_time: call?.start_time || null,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const online = agents.filter(\\\\\\\\n      (a) =&gt; a.status &amp;&amp; !['LoggedOut', 'LoginFailed', 'Disabled', 'Unknown'].includes(a.status)\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const onCall = online.filter(\\\\\\\\n      (a) =&gt; a.status === 'On Call' || a.status === avg_handle_time_sec)\\\\\\\"}]}],\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":285,\\\\\\\"totalMatchedLines\\\\\\\":285}}}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"5ee96e3a-9f7c-4684-9bdc-8c74eb0265af\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"b61c0ed9-aede-4e2a-8d0b-7e417936e1f6\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.939Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_deca7e27-8e8d-45a5-8f3a-398090ddb2f\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_deca7e27-8e8d-45a5-8f3a-398090ddb2f\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Agent session and status log for performance monitoring.\\\\\\\\n * - agent_sessions: one row per login→logout (session_duration_sec, logout_reason).\\\\\\\\n * - agent_status_log: one row per state (READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT) with start/end/duration.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst STATUS_LOG_TABLE = 'agent_status_log';\\\\\\\\nconst SESSIONS_TABLE = 'agent_sessions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Map agent_status.status (UI/ARI) to agent_status_log.status (canonical).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function mapToLogStatus(rawStatus, breakName) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (rawStatus || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LOGGEDIN' || s === 'LoginInitiated') return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'Ringing') return 'RINGING';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'On Call' || s === 'Outbound' || s === 'Transferring') return 'IN_CALL';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'PAUSED' || (breakName != null &amp;&amp; breakName !== '')) return 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'After_Call_Work' || s === 'ACW' || s === 'WRAPUP') return 'WRAP_UP';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LoggedOut' || s === 'LoginFailed') return 'LOGOUT';\\\\\\\\n  return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Start a new agent session (on login success). Idempotent: if an open session exists for this agent, close it first then create new.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId - phone_login_number / extension\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} [agentUserId] - users.id\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;number|null&gt;} session id or null if table missing\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function startAgentSession(tenantId, agentId, agentUserId = null) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open session (stale from crash/disconnect)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = 'connection_lost'\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open status log row for this agent\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${SESSIONS_TABLE} (tenant_id, agent_id, agent_user_id, login_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId, aid, agentUserId ?? null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const row = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionId = row?.id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionId) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'READY', NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionId, tenantId, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return sessionId;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return null;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions startAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * End the current agent session (on logout / force logout / login failed).\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {'normal'|'forced'|'connection_lost'} [logoutReason] - default 'normal'\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;boolean&gt;} true if a session was closed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function endAgentSession(agentId, logoutReason = 'normal') {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid) return false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close current open status log (e.g. READY or PAUSED)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Insert LOGOUT transition\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id, tenant_id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionRow) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, end_time, duration_sec) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'LOGOUT', NOW(), NOW(), 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionRow.id, sessionRow.tenant_id, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const result = await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = ?\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [logoutReason, aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return (result?.affectedRows ?? 0) &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return false;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions endAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Log a state change (close previous open log row, insert new one). Call after updating agent_status.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} logStatus - READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT\\\\\\\\n * @param {{ pauseReason?: string }} [opts]\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function logAgentStatusChange(tenantId, agentId, logStatus, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return;\\\\\\\\n  const { pauseReason = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close previous open log row\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, pause_reason) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [sessionRow?.id ?? null, tenantId, aid, logStatus, pauseReason]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions logAgentStatusChange:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":133}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-sessions.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Agent session and status log for performance monitoring.\\\\\\\\n * - agent_sessions: one row per login→logout (session_duration_sec, logout_reason).\\\\\\\\n * - agent_status_log: one row per state (READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT) with start/end/duration.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst STATUS_LOG_TABLE = 'agent_status_log';\\\\\\\\nconst SESSIONS_TABLE = 'agent_sessions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Map agent_status.status (UI/ARI) to agent_status_log.status (canonical).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function mapToLogStatus(rawStatus, breakName) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (rawStatus || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LOGGEDIN' || s === 'LoginInitiated') return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'Ringing') return 'RINGING';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'On Call' || s === 'Outbound' || s === 'Transferring') return 'IN_CALL';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'PAUSED' || (breakName != null &amp;&amp; breakName !== '')) return 'PAUSED';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'After_Call_Work' || s === 'ACW' || s === 'WRAPUP') return 'WRAP_UP';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'LoggedOut' || s === 'LoginFailed') return 'LOGOUT';\\\\\\\\n  return 'READY';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Start a new agent session (on login success). Idempotent: if an open session exists for this agent, close it first then create new.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId - phone_login_number / extension\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} [agentUserId] - users.id\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;number|null&gt;} session id or null if table missing\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function startAgentSession(tenantId, agentId, agentUserId = null) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return null;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open session (stale from crash/disconnect)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = 'connection_lost'\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Close any open status log row for this agent\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${SESSIONS_TABLE} (tenant_id, agent_id, agent_user_id, login_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId, aid, agentUserId ?? null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const row = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    const sessionId = row?.id ?? null;\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionId) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'READY', NOW())&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionId, tenantId, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return sessionId;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return null;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions startAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * End the current agent session (on logout / force logout / login failed).\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {'normal'|'forced'|'connection_lost'} [logoutReason] - default 'normal'\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;boolean&gt;} true if a session was closed\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function endAgentSession(agentId, logoutReason = 'normal') {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid) return false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close current open status log (e.g. READY or PAUSED)\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    // Insert LOGOUT transition\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id, tenant_id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    if (sessionRow) {\\\\\\\\n      await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, end_time, duration_sec) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'LOGOUT', NOW(), NOW(), 0)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [sessionRow.id, sessionRow.tenant_id, aid]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const result = await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${SESSIONS_TABLE} SET logout_time = NOW(), session_duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, login_time, NOW()), logout_reason = ?\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [logoutReason, aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return (result?.affectedRows ?? 0) &gt; 0;\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return false;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions endAgentSession:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Log a state change (close previous open log row, insert new one). Call after updating agent_status.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} agentId\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} logStatus - READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT\\\\\\\\n * @param {{ pauseReason?: string }} [opts]\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function logAgentStatusChange(tenantId, agentId, logStatus, opts = {}) {\\\\\\\\n  const aid = String(agentId).trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!aid || !tenantId) return;\\\\\\\\n  const { pauseReason = null } = opts;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close previous open log row\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;UPDATE ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} SET end_time = NOW(), duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW())\\\\\\\\n       WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [aid]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const sessionRow = await queryOne(&#96;SELECT id FROM ${SESSIONS_TABLE} WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL LIMIT 1&#96;, [aid]);\\\\\\\\n    await query(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ${STATUS_LOG_TABLE} (session_id, tenant_id, agent_id, status, start_time, pause_reason) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [sessionRow?.id ?? null, tenantId, aid, logStatus, pauseReason]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    if (e?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') return;\\\\\\\\n    console.error('agent-sessions logAgentStatusChange:', e?.message || e);\\\\\\\\n development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\superadmin.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/voicemail-boxes', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = effectiveTenantId != null ? effectiveTenantId : req.query.tenant_id;\\\\\\\\n    let sql = 'SELECT id, tenant_id, mailbox, password, email, config_json, created_at FROM voicemail_boxes';\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' WHERE tenant_id = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(parseInt(tenantId, 10));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY tenant_id, mailbox';\\\\\\\\n    const boxes = await query(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    for (const b of boxes) {\\\\\\\\n      if (b.config_json &amp;&amp; typeof b.config_json === 'string') {\\\\\\\\n        try { b.config_json = JSON.parse(b.config_json); } catch { /* keep string */ }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, boxes });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin list voicemail-boxes error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to list voicemail boxes' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.post('/voicemail-boxes', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { tenant_id, mailbox, password, email, config } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = parseInt(tenant_id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!tenant_id || isNaN(tenantId) || tenantId &lt; 1) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Valid tenant_id required' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const mb = String(mailbox || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!mb) return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Mailbox number required' });\\\\\\\\n    const result = await query(\\\\\\\\n      'INSERT INTO voicemail_boxes (tenant_id, mailbox, password, email, config_json) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)',\\\\\\\\n      [tenantId, mb, password ? String(password).trim() : null, email ? String(email).trim() : null, config ? JSON.stringify(config) : null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, id: result.insertId });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin create voicemail-box error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to create voicemail box' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.patch('/voicemail-boxes/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid voicemail box ID' });\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM voicemail_boxes WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Voicemail box not found' });\\\\\\\\n    const { mailbox, password, email, config } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const sets = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (mailbox !== undefined) { sets.push('mailbox = ?'); params.push(String(mailbox).trim()); }\\\\\\\\n    if (password !== undefined) { sets.push('password = ?'); params.push(password ? String(password).trim() : null); }\\\\\\\\n    if (email !== undefined) { sets.push('email = ?'); params.push(email ? String(email).trim() : null); }\\\\\\\\n    if (config !== undefined) { sets.push('config_json = ?'); params.push(config ? JSON.stringify(config) : null); }\\\\\\\\n    if (sets.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n      params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n      await query(&#96;UPDATE voicemail_boxes SET ${sets.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin update voicemail-box error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to update voicemail box' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.delete('/voicemail-boxes/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid voicemail box ID' });\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM voicemail_boxes WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Voicemail box not found' });\\\\\\\\n    await query('DELETE FROM voicemail_boxes WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin delete voicemail-box error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to delete voicemail box' });\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":2615}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\superadmin.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"offset\\\\\\\":1710,\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":80},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/voicemail-boxes', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const effectiveTenantId = getEffectiveTenantId(req);\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = effectiveTenantId != null ? JSON.stringify(config) : null]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    return res.json({ success: true, id: result.insertId });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Superadmin create voicemail-box error:', err);\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to create voicemail box' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.patch('/voicemail-boxes/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: 'Invalid voicemail box ID' });\\\\\\\\n    const existing = await queryOne('SELECT id FROM voicemail_boxes WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    if (!existing) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: 'Voicemail box not found' });\\\\\\\\n    const { mailbox, password, email, config } = req.body || {};\\\\\\\\n    const sets = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (mailbox !== undefined) { sets.push('mailbox = ?'); params.push(String(mailbox).trim()); }\\\\\\\\n    if (password !== undefined) { sets.push('password = ?'); params.push(password ? res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: 'Failed to update voicemail box' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.delete('/voicemail-boxes/:id', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try });\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":2615,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":117761,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web tLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.940Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"90e4a8de-c33a-4ddb-984f-73e106f4f025\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"80dc7a70-1ca1-4125-86d2-63440b49ab9a\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.940Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n# Database schema and migrations analysis\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Main schema (&#96;docs/database-schema.sql&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**Database:** &#96;pbx_callcentre&#96; (MySQL, utf8mb4_unicode_ci)\\\\n\\\\n### Tables overview\\\\n\\\\n| Table | Purpose |\\\\n|-------|---------|\\\\n| users | Auth, roles, agent bindings (phone_login_number, soft_phone_login_status) |\\\\n| role_modules | Role-based module access (roles 2,3,5) |\\\\n| teams | Optional agent grouping |\\\\n| agent_status | Live agent state (UNIQUE on agent_id) |\\\\n| agent_breaks | Break types per tenant |\\\\n| caller_id_short_codes | DID short codes for manual dial |\\\\n| manual_calls | Manual outbound CDR |\\\\n| call_status | Queue CDR transfer status |\\\\n| tenants | Multi-tenant orgs |\\\\n| sip_extensions | PJSIP extensions, &#96;agent_user_id&#96;, failover |\\\\n| sip_trunks | SIP trunks, JSON config |\\\\n| outbound_routes | Trunk routing |\\\\n| queues | Call queues, failover |\\\\n| inbound_routes | DIDs, campaigns |\\\\n| blacklist | Blocked numbers |\\\\n| sound_files, api_endpoints | IVR/API config |\\\\n| ivr_menus, ivr_menu_options | IVR routing |\\\\n| time_groups, time_group_rules | Time definitions |\\\\n| time_conditions | Time-based routing |\\\\n| conferences, voicemail_boxes | Conferencing and voicemail |\\\\n| outbound_queues, outbound_queue_numbers | Outbound campaigns |\\\\n| session_agent_apr, session_agent_breaks, session_agent_calls | Legacy session reports |\\\\n| break_agent_apr | Break-level aggregates |\\\\n| active_servers | Multi-node |\\\\n| queue_members | Queue membership |\\\\n| agent_extension_usage | Extension–agent assignment |\\\\n| crm_customers | CRM lookup |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Migrations (001–021)\\\\n\\\\n### 001_agent_session_and_crm.sql\\\\n- **agent_status:** &#96;session_started_at DATETIME&#96;\\\\n- **crm_customers:** created if missing  \\\\n  - Columns: &#96;tenant_id&#96;, &#96;customer_id&#96;, &#96;name&#96;, &#96;phone&#96;, &#96;email&#96;, &#96;notes&#96;  \\\\n  - Indexes: &#96;uk_tenant_customer&#96;, &#96;idx_tenant&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 002_phase3_call_records_realtime.sql\\\\n- **call_records:** new table  \\\\n  - Columns: &#96;tenant_id&#96;, &#96;unique_id&#96;, &#96;channel_id&#96;, &#96;source_number&#96;, &#96;destination_number&#96;, &#96;agent_user_id&#96;, &#96;agent_extension&#96;, &#96;agent_id&#96;, &#96;direction&#96;, &#96;queue_name&#96;, &#96;start_time&#96;, &#96;answer_time&#96;, &#96;end_time&#96;, &#96;duration_sec&#96;, &#96;talk_sec&#96;, &#96;status&#96;, &#96;recording_path&#96;  \\\\n  - Indexes: &#96;idx_tenant&#96;, &#96;idx_agent_user&#96;, &#96;idx_unique_id&#96;, &#96;idx_start_time&#96;, &#96;idx_status&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 003_tenants.sql\\\\n- **tenants:** created if missing (matches base schema)\\\\n\\\\n### 004_ivr_timecond_voicemail.sql\\\\n- **ivr_menu_options:** created if missing\\\\n- **time_conditions:** &#96;match_destination_type&#96;, &#96;match_destination_id&#96;, &#96;nomatch_destination_type&#96;, &#96;nomatch_destination_id&#96;\\\\n- **call_records:** &#96;transfer_status&#96;, &#96;transfer_to&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 005_role_modules.sql\\\\n- **role_modules:** created, seeded for roles 2, 3, 5\\\\n\\\\n### 006_sip_extensions_agent_user_id.sql\\\\n- **sip_extensions:** &#96;agent_user_id INT UNSIGNED&#96;, &#96;idx_agent_user&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 007_time_conditions_tables.sql\\\\n- **time_groups, time_group_rules, time_conditions:** created if missing\\\\n\\\\n### 008_time_conditions_destination_columns.sql\\\\n- **time_conditions:** same destination columns as 004 (redundant if 004 run)\\\\n\\\\n### 009_peerless_outbound_trunk.sql\\\\n- **sip_trunks, outbound_routes:** seed peerless trunk and route\\\\n\\\\n### 010_campaigns_inbound_routes.sql\\\\n- **campaigns:** new table\\\\n- **inbound_routes:** &#96;campaign_id&#96;, backfill to “Default” campaign\\\\n- **call_records:** &#96;campaign_name&#96;, &#96;idx_campaign_name&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 011_blacklist.sql\\\\n- **blacklist:** new table  \\\\n  - Columns: &#96;tenant_id&#96;, &#96;number&#96;  \\\\n  - Indexes: &#96;idx_tenant&#96;, &#96;uk_tenant_number&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 012_queue_failover.sql\\\\n- **queues:** &#96;failover_destination_type&#96;, &#96;failover_destination_id&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 013_extension_failover.sql\\\\n- **sip_extensions:** &#96;failover_destination_type&#96;, &#96;failover_destination_id&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 014_fix_abandoned_call_status.sql\\\\n- **call_records:** &#96;status = 'abandoned'&#96; when &#96;answer_time IS NULL&#96; and status in (completed, abondoned)\\\\n\\\\n### 015_call_records_did_tfn.sql\\\\n- **call_records:** &#96;did_tfn VARCHAR(32)&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 016_call_tracking_enhancements.sql\\\\n- **call_records:**  \\\\n  - &#96;wait_time_sec&#96;, &#96;transfer_from&#96;, &#96;transfer_time&#96;, &#96;transfer_type&#96;  \\\\n  - &#96;abandon_reason&#96;, &#96;failover_destination&#96;, &#96;ring_time_sec&#96;  \\\\n  - Indexes: &#96;idx_call_records_status&#96;, &#96;idx_call_records_transfer&#96;, &#96;idx_call_records_abandon&#96;, &#96;idx_call_records_start_status&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 017_agent_sessions_and_status_log.sql\\\\n- **agent_sessions:** login→logout sessions\\\\n- **agent_status_log:** status transitions (READY, RINGING, IN_CALL, WRAP_UP, PAUSED, LOGOUT)\\\\n\\\\n### 018_agent_daily_stats.sql\\\\n- **agent_daily_stats:** pre-aggregated daily stats  \\\\n  - &#96;uk_tenant_agent_date&#96;, &#96;idx_tenant_date&#96;, &#96;idx_agent_date&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 019_tenant_mask_caller_agent.sql\\\\n- **tenants:** &#96;mask_caller_number_agent TINYINT&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 020_performance_reporting_tables.sql\\\\n- **agent_hourly_stats**\\\\n- **agent_break_stats**\\\\n- **queue_daily_stats**\\\\n- **agent_daily_stats:** &#96;calls_offered&#96;, &#96;calls_transferred&#96;, &#96;sales_count&#96;, &#96;ready_time_sec&#96;, &#96;performance_score&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 021_agent_status_break_started_at.sql\\\\n- **agent_status:** &#96;break_started_at DATETIME&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Backend query usage\\\\n\\\\n### call_records (most used)\\\\n- &#96;WHERE unique_id = ?&#96; – all lifecycle updates\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ?&#96; – queue strategy leastrecent/fewestcalls\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND queue_name = ? AND DATE(start_time) BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; – reports\\\\n- &#96;WHERE end_time IS NULL AND status IN ('ringing','answered')&#96; – active calls\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND (agent_id = ? OR agent_user_id = ?) AND start_time BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; – report aggregator\\\\n\\\\n### agent_status\\\\n- &#96;WHERE agent_id = ?&#96; – status checks and updates\\\\n- &#96;JOIN users u ON u.phone_login_number = a.agent_id&#96; – live agent counts\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND status = ?&#96; – tenant/status filters\\\\n\\\\n### users\\\\n- &#96;WHERE username = ?&#96; – auth\\\\n- &#96;WHERE id = ?&#96; – user lookups\\\\n- &#96;WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5&#96; – agent resolution\\\\n- &#96;WHERE parent_id = ?&#96; – tenant users and counts\\\\n\\\\n### blacklist\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND number = ?&#96; – inbound check (asterisk), admin CRUD\\\\n\\\\n### agent_sessions / agent_status_log\\\\n- &#96;WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96; – open sessions\\\\n- &#96;WHERE agent_id = ? AND end_time IS NULL&#96; – open status log rows\\\\n- Time-range aggregation by &#96;tenant_id&#96;, &#96;agent_id&#96;, &#96;start_time&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### agent_daily_stats\\\\n- &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND stat_date BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; – reports, leaderboard, trends\\\\n- &#96;GROUP BY d.agent_id&#96; – performance report\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. Potential normalization issues\\\\n\\\\n1. **agent_id vs agent_user_id**  \\\\n   &#96;agent_status.agent_id&#96; is VARCHAR (phone_login_number). Some tables use &#96;agent_user_id&#96; (users.id). JOINs require &#96;users.phone_login_number = agent_status.agent_id&#96;. This is a common join pattern but couples tables to that convention.\\\\n\\\\n2. **queue_members without tenant_id**  \\\\n   &#96;queue_members&#96; has &#96;queue_name&#96; and &#96;member_name&#96; but no &#96;tenant_id&#96;. Queue names are only unique within tenant, so multi-tenant setups may collide.\\\\n\\\\n3. **destination polymorphic references**  \\\\n   &#96;destination_type&#96;/&#96;destination_id&#96; and &#96;failover_destination_type&#96;/&#96;failover_destination_id&#96; are generic references (ivr, queue, extension, etc.) without FKs. Integrity is application-driven.\\\\n\\\\n4. **Redundant campaign_name in call_records**  \\\\n   Campaign is in &#96;inbound_routes&#96; (campaign_id), but &#96;call_records&#96; also has &#96;campaign_name&#96; for reporting. Denormalization is intentional for reporting performance.\\\\n\\\\n5. **session_agent_breaks vs agent_status_log**  \\\\n   Both track breaks: &#96;session_agent_breaks&#96; for user-initiated breaks, &#96;agent_status_log&#96; for PAUSED state. Some overlap and possible duplication.\\\\n\\\\n6. **users.parent_id meaning**  \\\\n   &#96;parent_id&#96; represents tenant (org). No explicit FK or naming as &#96;tenant_id&#96; makes the model less obvious.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Missing or weak indexes\\\\n\\\\n| Table | Query pattern | Current index | Suggestion |\\\\n|-------|----------------|---------------|------------|\\\\n| call_records | &#96;WHERE unique_id = ?&#96; | idx_unique_id | Use UNIQUE on unique_id if not already |\\\\n| call_records | &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND start_time BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; | idx_tenant, idx_start_time | Composite &#96;(tenant_id, start_time)&#96; |\\\\n| call_records | &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND start_time BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; | Separate indexes | Composite &#96;(tenant_id, agent_id, start_time)&#96; |\\\\n| agent_status | &#96;WHERE agent_id = ?&#96; | uk_agent (unique) | Covered |\\\\n| users | &#96;WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5&#96; | None | &#96;idx_phone_login_role (phone_login_number, role)&#96; |\\\\n| agent_daily_stats | &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND stat_date BETWEEN ? AND ?&#96; | idx_tenant_date | Covered |\\\\n| session_agent_breaks | &#96;WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_id = ? AND DATE(start_time) = ?&#96; | idx_tenant_agent, idx_start | &#96;(tenant_id, agent_id, start_time)&#96; |\\\\n| agent_sessions | &#96;WHERE agent_id = ? AND logout_time IS NULL&#96; | idx_logout_null | Covered |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. Schema design observations\\\\n\\\\n- **Multi-tenant:** Most tables have &#96;tenant_id&#96;; queries consistently filter by it.\\\\n- **No FKs:** No foreign keys are defined. Referential integrity and cascades are handled in application logic (e.g. &#96;DELETE FROM agent_status WHERE agent_id = ?&#96; when deleting users).\\\\n- **Polymorphic routing:** &#96;destination_type&#96; + &#96;destination_id&#96; used for IVR, time conditions, failover. Flexible but not enforced at DB level.\\\\n- **Agent identity:** Mix of &#96;agent_id&#96; (phone_login_number) and &#96;agent_user_id&#96; (users.id). Resolved in app code.\\\\n- **Reporting layering:** Raw data in &#96;call_records&#96; and &#96;agent_status_log&#96;; daily/hourly aggregates in &#96;agent_daily_stats&#96;, &#96;agent_hourly_stats&#96;, etc.\\\\n- **Migration consistency:** Some migrations overlap (004/007/008 for time conditions). Running out of order can cause duplicates or errors.\\\\n- **voicemail_boxes:** Schema uses &#96;password&#96;; superadmin expects &#96;password&#96;. Column naming matches.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. Query patterns summary\\\\n\\\\n| Module | Main tables | Notable patterns |\\\\n|--------|-------------|------------------|\\\\n| Auth | users, role_modules | username, id, role |\\\\n| Asterisk callbacks | call_records, agent_status, blacklist, inbound_routes | unique_id, agent_id, tenant_id + number |\\\\n| Queue strategy | queues, queue_members, agent_status, call_records | queue by name/id, last_called, fewest calls |\\\\n| Agent UI | agent_status, agent_extension_usage, crm_customers | extension selection, CRM lookup |\\\\n| Live agents / wallboard | users, agent_status, tenants, call_records, session_agent_breaks | JOIN users–agent_status, active calls |\\\\n| Reports | agent_daily_stats, call_records, agent_status_log, session_agent_breaks | Date range, tenant, agent |\\\\n| Report aggregator | call_records, agent_sessions, agent_status_log, session_agent_breaks | Hourly/daily rollups |\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1773136587466,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Database schema and migration analysis\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"chat\",\"forceMode\":\"chat\",\"usageData\":{},\"contextUsagePercent\":32.338,\"contextTokensUsed\":64676,\"contextTokenLimit\":200000,\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-1.5\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"subagentComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDismissed\":false,\"totalLinesAdded\":0,\"totalLinesRemoved\":0,\"addedFiles\":0,\"removedFiles\":0,\"isDraft\":false,\"isCreatingWorktree\":false,\"isApplyingWorktree\":false,\"isUndoingWorktree\":false,\"applied\":false,\"pendingCreateWorktree\":false,\"worktreeStartedReadOnly\":false,\"isBestOfNSubcomposer\":false,\"isBestOfNParent\":false,\"bestOfNJudgeWinner\":false,\"isSpec\":false,\"isProject\":false,\"isSpecSubagentDone\":false,\"isContinuationInProgress\":false,\"stopHookLoopCount\":0,\"branches\":[],\"speculativeSummarizationEncryptionKey\":\"bNavX4zWHmpPfXsnVz8oHONSEtrd3JkA1cZV404PBZ4=\",\"isNAL\":true,\"planModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"debugModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"conversationState\":\"~\",\"queueItems\":[],\"blobEncryptionKey\":\"aBiahBLRPzHXwGbPXM3OWMCGQ2khA+ExbXH5R/oKqkI=\",\"latestChatGenerationUUID\":\"c455a7c9-bbef-4141-9a16-27c07b6fd66b\",\"isAgentic\":false,\"subtitle\":\"Read Read ALL files in:\n- &#96;docs/asterisk/&#96; (all .conf and .md files)\n- &#96;docs/ASTERISK-CONFIG-SYNC.md&#96;\n- &#96;docs/AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md&#96;\n- &#96;scripts/asterisk-config-receiver/server.js&#96;\n- &#96;.env.example&#96;\n- Any Asterisk-related configuration files\n\nFor each file, provide:\n1. Potential issues or improvements\n\nReturn a comprehensive Asterisk integration analysis.",
