development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Bound extension (Option 2): one extension per agent\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAgents are fixed to a single extension. When you create an agent in Super Admin and set their \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"extension\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (phone login number), that extension is bound to them via &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96;. The agent can only log in with that extension.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Existing agents – no need to remove or recreate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Already-created agents** (e.g. Reeta with ext 6002) are already bound: Super Admin set &#96;users.phone_login_number = 6002&#96; and &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id = &lt;Reeta's user id&gt;&#96; for extension 6002.\\\\\\\\n- You do **not** need to delete and recreate them. They will work as soon as they use **their** extension (6002 for Reeta).\\\\\\\\n- If an agent had previously logged in with a different extension (e.g. 6001), they will now see only their assigned extension (6002) in the agent dashboard. They must use that extension to receive calls.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Behaviour\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Ring resolution**: When a call is offered to extension 6002, the app resolves the user via &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; for that tenant + extension, so the correct agent gets the ring on their dashboard.\\\\\\\\n2. **Agent dashboard**: GET &#96;/api/agent/extensions&#96; returns only the extension where &#96;agent_user_id = current user&#96;. The agent cannot pick another extension.\\\\\\\\n3. **Select / call extension**: Only the bound extension can be selected or used for SIP login.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## If an agent has no bound extension\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIf &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; was never set for that agent (e.g. created before binding existed), the agent will see **no extensions** and cannot log in. Fix: in Super Admin, edit the agent and set their phone number/extension again (Edit phone / PIN); that will call &#96;setExtensionAgentUserId&#96; and bind the extension to them.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":20}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Bound extension (Option 2): one extension per agent\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAgents are fixed to a single extension. When you create an agent in Super Admin and set their \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"extension\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (phone login number), that extension is bound to them via &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96;. The agent can only log in with that extension.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Existing agents – no need to remove or recreate\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Already-created agents** (e.g. Reeta with ext 6002) are already bound: Super Admin set &#96;users.phone_login_number = 6002&#96; and &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id = &lt;Reeta's user id&gt;&#96; for extension 6002.\\\\\\\\n- You do **not** need to delete and recreate them. They will work as soon as they use **their** extension (6002 for Reeta).\\\\\\\\n- If an agent had previously logged in with a different extension (e.g. 6001), they will now see only their assigned extension (6002) in the agent dashboard. They must use that extension to receive calls.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Behaviour\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Ring resolution**: When a call is offered to extension 6002, the app resolves the user via &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; for that tenant + extension, so the correct agent gets the ring on their dashboard.\\\\\\\\n2. **Agent dashboard**: GET &#96;/api/agent/extensions&#96; returns only the extension where &#96;agent_user_id = current user&#96;. The agent cannot pick another extension.\\\\\\\\n3. **Select / call extension**: Only the bound extension can be selected or used for SIP login.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## If an agent has no bound extension\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIf &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; was never set for that agent (e.g. created before binding existed), the agent will see **no extensions** and cannot log in. Fix: in Super Admin, edit the agent and set their phone number/extension again (Edit phone / PIN); that will call &#96;setExtensionAgentUserId&#96; and bind the extension to them.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":20,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":1732,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AGENTS-BOUND-EXTENSION.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":20}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"381b0c51-4228-4c91-ab49-38c92a9c2529\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"046ff297-05e3-45f9-afd2-72ed1448ba9e\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.964Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_3ceadba8-1078-4ef2-84fa-8183148aad6\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_3ceadba8-1078-4ef2-84fa-8183148aad6\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\.env.example\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\.env.example\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\.env.example\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n# PBX Call Centre – .env (place in project root; used by Node server and Vite)\\\\\\\\n# Copy to .env and fill in your values.\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Database (MySQL) – required for login and all features ---\\\\\\\\nDB_HOST=localhost\\\\\\\\nDB_PORT=3306\\\\\\\\nDB_USER=root\\\\\\\\nDB_PASSWORD=your_mysql_root_password_here\\\\\\\\nDB_NAME=pbx_callcentre\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- API server (Node) ---\\\\\\\\nPORT=3001\\\\\\\\n# Comma-separated origins for CORS (add your LAN IP so other devices can open the app, e.g. http://10.50.7.181:5173)\\\\\\\\nCORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173\\\\\\\\nSESSION_SECRET=change-this-to-a-random-secret-in-production\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Frontend (Vite) – base URL for API calls ---\\\\\\\\nVITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK: Choose one setup\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# CURRENT SETUP – Asterisk on another server (development / remote Asterisk)\\\\\\\\n# -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n# - ARI and dialplan callbacks use the Asterisk server host.\\\\\\\\n# - Asterisk must be able to reach this app (curl) for InboundRoute, Recording, etc.\\\\\\\\n#   Set ASTERISK_APP_URL to this app’s URL as seen from Asterisk (e.g. your machine’s IP or hostname).\\\\\\\\n# - CDR recording playback will NOT work (app cannot read files on the other server).\\\\\\\\n#   Leave RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH empty.\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# PRODUCTION – Same server for Asterisk and this app\\\\\\\\n# -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n# - Use 127.0.0.1 or localhost for ARI and APP_URL.\\\\\\\\n# - Set RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH so the app can serve recording files from disk.\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk ARI (agent SIP, PJSIP status). App calls this to ring phones and list endpoints. ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current):\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_URL=http://10.50.2.190:8088\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): ASTERISK_ARI_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8088\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_USER=myuser\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_PASSWORD=india@123\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- URL Asterisk uses to call this app (curl). Must be reachable FROM the Asterisk server. ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current): use this machine’s IP/hostname so Asterisk can reach it, e.g.:\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_APP_URL=http://YOUR_APP_SERVER_IP:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production):\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Recording paths (only used when app and Asterisk are on the SAME server) ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current): leave empty – app cannot read Asterisk’s recording files.\\\\\\\\n# RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH=\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): path where Asterisk stores recordings; app streams from here for CDR playback.\\\\\\\\n# RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH=/var/spool/asterisk/monitor\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH=/var/spool/asterisk/monitor\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk config sync (required for Sync to Asterisk to work) ---\\\\\\\\n# App POSTs config to this URL when you create/update agents, extensions, trunks.\\\\\\\\n# Run scripts/asterisk-config-receiver on the Asterisk server (see docs/ASTERISK-CONFIG-SYNC.md).\\\\\\\\n# If unset: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Sync to Asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" is skipped and Asterisk will not get new extensions (e.g. 6001, 6002).\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL=http://10.50.2.190:9999\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_KEY=your-secret-key\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk logs (Super Admin dashboard) ---\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): set ASTERISK_LOG_DIR so the app reads log files directly. No config-receiver needed for logs.\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_LOG_DIR=/var/log/asterisk\\\\\\\\n# Remote (current): leave ASTERISK_LOG_DIR unset; app uses ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL to fetch logs from config-receiver (see docs).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Stasis app name (queue routing). Default: queue-dashboard ---\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_STASIS_APP=queue-dashboard\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Wallboard ---\\\\\\\\n# SLA threshold in seconds for service level calculation (default: 20)\\\\\\\\n# WALLBOARD_SLA_SECONDS=20\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Redis (optional, for wallboard real-time caching) ---\\\\\\\\n# When set, agent/queue state is cached in Redis for sub-second wallboard reads.\\\\\\\\n# If unset, wallboard reads directly from MySQL (still works, slightly higher latency).\\\\\\\\n# REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":84}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\.env.example\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n# PBX Call Centre – .env (place in project root; used by Node server and Vite)\\\\\\\\n# Copy to .env and fill in your values.\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Database (MySQL) – required for login and all features ---\\\\\\\\nDB_HOST=localhost\\\\\\\\nDB_PORT=3306\\\\\\\\nDB_USER=root\\\\\\\\nDB_PASSWORD=your_mysql_root_password_here\\\\\\\\nDB_NAME=pbx_callcentre\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- API server (Node) ---\\\\\\\\nPORT=3001\\\\\\\\n# Comma-separated origins for CORS (add your LAN IP so other devices can open the app, e.g. http://10.50.7.181:5173)\\\\\\\\nCORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173\\\\\\\\nSESSION_SECRET=change-this-to-a-random-secret-in-production\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Frontend (Vite) – base URL for API calls ---\\\\\\\\nVITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK: Choose one setup\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# CURRENT SETUP – Asterisk on another server (development / remote Asterisk)\\\\\\\\n# -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n# - ARI and dialplan callbacks use the Asterisk server host.\\\\\\\\n# - Asterisk must be able to reach this app (curl) for InboundRoute, Recording, etc.\\\\\\\\n#   Set ASTERISK_APP_URL to this app’s URL as seen from Asterisk (e.g. your machine’s IP or hostname).\\\\\\\\n# - CDR recording playback will NOT work (app cannot read files on the other server).\\\\\\\\n#   Leave RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH empty.\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# PRODUCTION – Same server for Asterisk and this app\\\\\\\\n# -------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n# - Use 127.0.0.1 or localhost for ARI and APP_URL.\\\\\\\\n# - Set RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH so the app can serve recording files from disk.\\\\\\\\n# =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk ARI (agent SIP, PJSIP status). App calls this to ring phones and list endpoints. ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current):\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_URL=http://10.50.2.190:8088\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): ASTERISK_ARI_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8088\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_USER=myuser\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_ARI_PASSWORD=india@123\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- URL Asterisk uses to call this app (curl). Must be reachable FROM the Asterisk server. ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current): use this machine’s IP/hostname so Asterisk can reach it, e.g.:\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_APP_URL=http://YOUR_APP_SERVER_IP:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production):\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Recording paths (only used when app and Asterisk are on the SAME server) ---\\\\\\\\n# Another server (current): leave empty – app cannot read Asterisk’s recording files.\\\\\\\\n# RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH=\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): path where Asterisk stores recordings; app streams from here for CDR playback.\\\\\\\\n# RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH=/var/spool/asterisk/monitor\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH=/var/spool/asterisk/monitor\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk config sync (required for Sync to Asterisk to work) ---\\\\\\\\n# App POSTs config to this URL when you create/update agents, extensions, trunks.\\\\\\\\n# Run scripts/asterisk-config-receiver on the Asterisk server (see docs/ASTERISK-CONFIG-SYNC.md).\\\\\\\\n# If unset: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Sync to Asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" is skipped and Asterisk will not get new extensions (e.g. 6001, 6002).\\\\\\\\nASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL=http://10.50.2.190:9999\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_KEY=your-secret-key\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Asterisk logs (Super Admin dashboard) ---\\\\\\\\n# Same server (production): set ASTERISK_LOG_DIR so the app reads log files directly. No config-receiver needed for logs.\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_LOG_DIR=/var/log/asterisk\\\\\\\\n# Remote (current): leave ASTERISK_LOG_DIR unset; app uses ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL to fetch logs from config-receiver (see docs).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Stasis app name (queue routing). Default: queue-dashboard ---\\\\\\\\n# ASTERISK_STASIS_APP=queue-dashboard\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Wallboard ---\\\\\\\\n# SLA threshold in seconds for service level calculation (default: 20)\\\\\\\\n# WALLBOARD_SLA_SECONDS=20\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# --- Redis (optional, for wallboard real-time caching) ---\\\\\\\\n# When set, agent/queue state is cached in Redis for sub-second wallboard reads.\\\\\\\\n# If unset, wallboard reads directly from MySQL (still works, slightly higher latency).\\\\\\\\n# REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":84,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4177,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web tyContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.964Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_aee59020-5181-426c-8b02-5e2fd0c9a4d\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_aee59020-5181-426c-8b02-5e2fd0c9a4d\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\scripts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk-config-receiver\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\scripts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk-config-receiver\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Run this on the Asterisk server (e.g. 10.50.2.190).\\\\\\\\n * The PBX app (10.50.7.181) POSTs config here; this script writes to Asterisk config files and reloads.\\\\\\\\n * Also serves Asterisk log files for the Super Admin dashboard (GET /logs/:file).\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Env (optional):\\\\\\\\n *   PORT=9999\\\\\\\\n *   AGENTS_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/agents.conf\\\\\\\\n *   PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf\\\\\\\\n *   PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf\\\\\\\\n *   DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\n *   ASTERISK_LOG_DIR=/var/log/asterisk  (for GET /logs/:file)\\\\\\\\n *   CONFIG_API_KEY=secret  (if set, requests must send header X-Config-API-Key: secret)\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Endpoints:\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/agents       body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write agents.conf, reload app_agent_pool\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/pjsip       body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write pjsip_custom.conf, reload pjsip\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/pjsip-trunks body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } -&gt; write pjsip_trunks_custom.conf, reload pjsip\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/dialplan     body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write callcentre.conf, dialplan reload\\\\\\\\n *   GET  /logs/:file         ?tail=N  -&gt; last N lines of full|messages|queue_log (default tail=2000)\\\\\\\\n *   GET  /logs/:file/stream  -&gt; SSE stream of new lines (full|messages|queue_log)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport http from 'http';\\\\\\\\nimport fs from 'fs/promises';\\\\\\\\nimport { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';\\\\\\\\nimport path from 'path';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '9999', 10);\\\\\\\\nconst AGENTS_CONF = process.env.AGENTS_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/agents.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst PJSIP_CUSTOM = process.env.PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst PJSIP_TRUNKS = process.env.PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst DIALPLAN_CONF = process.env.DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst LOG_DIR = (process.env.ASTERISK_LOG_DIR || '/var/log/asterisk').replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/$/, '');\\\\\\\\nconst CONFIG_API_KEY = process.env.CONFIG_API_KEY?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ALLOWED_LOG_FILES = new Set(['full', 'messages', 'queue_log']);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction checkAuth(req) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!CONFIG_API_KEY) return true;\\\\\\\\n  const key = req.headers['x-config-api-key'];\\\\\\\\n  return key === CONFIG_API_KEY;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction getLogPath(file) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!file || !ALLOWED_LOG_FILES.has(file)) return null;\\\\\\\\n  return path.join(LOG_DIR, file);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function writeAndReload(filePath, content, reloadCmd) {\\\\\\\\n  await fs.writeFile(filePath, content, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    execSync(reloadCmd, { stdio: 'inherit', timeout: 10000 });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Reload failed:', e.message);\\\\\\\\n    throw e;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function ensurePjsipFilesExist() {\\\\\\\\n  const minimal = '; Placeholder - overwritten by PBX app config sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n';\\\\\\\\n  for (const file of [PJSIP_CUSTOM, PJSIP_TRUNKS]) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await fs.access(file);\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      await fs.writeFile(file, minimal, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n      console.log(&#96;Created ${file}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** GET /logs/:file?tail=N - return last N lines. */\\\\\\\\nasync function handleLogsTail(req, res, file, tail) {\\\\\\\\n  const filePath = getLogPath(file);\\\\\\\\n  if (!filePath) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid log file. Use: full, messages, queue_log' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const n = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(tail, 10) || 2000, 1), 50000);\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await fs.access(filePath);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Log file not found or not readable' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    const lines = content.split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n    const last = lines.slice(-n);\\\\\\\\n    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(200);\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, lines: last }));\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(500, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: e.message || 'Read failed' }));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** GET /logs/:file/stream - SSE stream of new lines. */\\\\\\\\nfunction handleLogsStream(req, res, file) {\\\\\\\\n  const filePath = getLogPath(file);\\\\\\\\n  if (!filePath) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid log file. Use: full, messages, queue_log' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  res.writeHead(200, {\\\\\\\\n    'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',\\\\\\\\n    'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-transform',\\\\\\\\n    Connection: 'keep-alive',\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  res.flushHeaders?.();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const tail = spawn('tail', ['-f', '-n', '0', filePath], { stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'ignore'] });\\\\\\\\n  tail.stdout.setEncoding('utf8');\\\\\\\\n  tail.stdout.on('data', (chunk) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const lines = String(chunk).split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\\\\\\\n      res.write(&#96;data: ${line.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/g, ' ')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.flush?.();\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  tail.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    res.write(&#96;data: [error] ${err.message}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  req.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    tail.kill('SIGTERM');\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst server = http.createServer(async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!checkAuth(req)) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(401, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const urlPath = req.url?.split('?')[0] || '';\\\\\\\\n  const qs = new URLSearchParams((req.url?.split('?')[1] || ''));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (req.method === 'GET') {\\\\\\\\n    const logMatch = urlPath.match(/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/logs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/(full|messages|queue_log)(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/stream)?$/);\\\\\\\\n    if (logMatch) {\\\\\\\\n      const file = logMatch[1];\\\\\\\\n      if (logMatch[2] === '/stream') {\\\\\\\\n        return handleLogsStream(req, res, file);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return handleLogsTail(req, res, file, qs.get('tail'));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (req.method !== 'POST') {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(405, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const allowedPaths = ['/config/agents', '/config/pjsip', '/config/pjsip-trunks', '/config/dialplan'];\\\\\\\\n  if (!allowedPaths.includes(urlPath)) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  let body = '';\\\\\\\\n  for await (const chunk of req) body += chunk;\\\\\\\\n  let data;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    data = JSON.parse(body);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const content = data?.content;\\\\\\\\n  if (typeof content !== 'string') {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing or invalid \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    if (urlPath === '/config/agents') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(AGENTS_CONF, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload app_agent_pool.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else if (urlPath === '/config/pjsip-trunks') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(PJSIP_TRUNKS, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload res_pjsip.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else if (urlPath === '/config/dialplan') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(DIALPLAN_CONF, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'dialplan reload'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(PJSIP_CUSTOM, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload res_pjsip.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok: true }));\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(500, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: e.message || 'Write or reload failed' }));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nserver.listen(PORT, '0.0.0.0', async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  await ensurePjsipFilesExist();\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;Asterisk config receiver listening on port ${PORT}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  if (CONFIG_API_KEY) console.log('API key required (X-Config-API-Key)');\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":208}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\scripts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk-config-receiver\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Run this on the Asterisk server (e.g. 10.50.2.190).\\\\\\\\n * The PBX app (10.50.7.181) POSTs config here; this script writes to Asterisk config files and reloads.\\\\\\\\n * Also serves Asterisk log files for the Super Admin dashboard (GET /logs/:file).\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Env (optional):\\\\\\\\n *   PORT=9999\\\\\\\\n *   AGENTS_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/agents.conf\\\\\\\\n *   PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf\\\\\\\\n *   PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH=/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf\\\\\\\\n *   DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH=/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\n *   ASTERISK_LOG_DIR=/var/log/asterisk  (for GET /logs/:file)\\\\\\\\n *   CONFIG_API_KEY=secret  (if set, requests must send header X-Config-API-Key: secret)\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Endpoints:\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/agents       body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write agents.conf, reload app_agent_pool\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/pjsip       body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write pjsip_custom.conf, reload pjsip\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/pjsip-trunks body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } -&gt; write pjsip_trunks_custom.conf, reload pjsip\\\\\\\\n *   POST /config/dialplan     body: { content: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }  -&gt; write callcentre.conf, dialplan reload\\\\\\\\n *   GET  /logs/:file         ?tail=N  -&gt; last N lines of full|messages|queue_log (default tail=2000)\\\\\\\\n *   GET  /logs/:file/stream  -&gt; SSE stream of new lines (full|messages|queue_log)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport http from 'http';\\\\\\\\nimport fs from 'fs/promises';\\\\\\\\nimport { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';\\\\\\\\nimport path from 'path';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '9999', 10);\\\\\\\\nconst AGENTS_CONF = process.env.AGENTS_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/agents.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst PJSIP_CUSTOM = process.env.PJSIP_CUSTOM_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_custom.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst PJSIP_TRUNKS = process.env.PJSIP_TRUNKS_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/pjsip_trunks_custom.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst DIALPLAN_CONF = process.env.DIALPLAN_CONF_PATH || '/etc/asterisk/callcentre.conf';\\\\\\\\nconst LOG_DIR = (process.env.ASTERISK_LOG_DIR || '/var/log/asterisk').replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/$/, '');\\\\\\\\nconst CONFIG_API_KEY = process.env.CONFIG_API_KEY?.trim() || '';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ALLOWED_LOG_FILES = new Set(['full', 'messages', 'queue_log']);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction checkAuth(req) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!CONFIG_API_KEY) return true;\\\\\\\\n  const key = req.headers['x-config-api-key'];\\\\\\\\n  return key === CONFIG_API_KEY;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction getLogPath(file) {\\\\\\\\n  if (!file || !ALLOWED_LOG_FILES.has(file)) return null;\\\\\\\\n  return path.join(LOG_DIR, file);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function writeAndReload(filePath, content, reloadCmd) {\\\\\\\\n  await fs.writeFile(filePath, content, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    execSync(reloadCmd, { stdio: 'inherit', timeout: 10000 });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Reload failed:', e.message);\\\\\\\\n    throw e;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function ensurePjsipFilesExist() {\\\\\\\\n  const minimal = '; Placeholder - overwritten by PBX app config sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n';\\\\\\\\n  for (const file of [PJSIP_CUSTOM, PJSIP_TRUNKS]) {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await fs.access(file);\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      await fs.writeFile(file, minimal, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n      console.log(&#96;Created ${file}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** GET /logs/:file?tail=N - return last N lines. */\\\\\\\\nasync function handleLogsTail(req, res, file, tail) {\\\\\\\\n  const filePath = getLogPath(file);\\\\\\\\n  if (!filePath) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid log file. Use: full, messages, queue_log' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const n = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(tail, 10) || 2000, 1), 50000);\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await fs.access(filePath);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Log file not found or not readable' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const content = await fs.readFile(filePath, 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    const lines = content.split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n    const last = lines.slice(-n);\\\\\\\\n    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(200);\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, lines: last }));\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(500, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: e.message || 'Read failed' }));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** GET /logs/:file/stream - SSE stream of new lines. */\\\\\\\\nfunction handleLogsStream(req, res, file) {\\\\\\\\n  const filePath = getLogPath(file);\\\\\\\\n  if (!filePath) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid log file. Use: full, messages, queue_log' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  res.writeHead(200, {\\\\\\\\n    'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',\\\\\\\\n    'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-transform',\\\\\\\\n    Connection: 'keep-alive',\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  res.flushHeaders?.();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const tail = spawn('tail', ['-f', '-n', '0', filePath], { stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'ignore'] });\\\\\\\\n  tail.stdout.setEncoding('utf8');\\\\\\\\n  tail.stdout.on('data', (chunk) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const lines = String(chunk).split(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\\\\\\\n      res.write(&#96;data: ${line.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/g, ' ')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.flush?.();\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  tail.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    res.write(&#96;data: [error] ${err.message}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n  req.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    tail.kill('SIGTERM');\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst server = http.createServer(async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!checkAuth(req)) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(401, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const urlPath = req.url?.split('?')[0] || '';\\\\\\\\n  const qs = new URLSearchParams((req.url?.split('?')[1] || ''));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (req.method === 'GET') {\\\\\\\\n    const logMatch = urlPath.match(/^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/logs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/(full|messages|queue_log)(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/stream)?$/);\\\\\\\\n    if (logMatch) {\\\\\\\\n      const file = logMatch[1];\\\\\\\\n      if (logMatch[2] === '/stream') {\\\\\\\\n        return handleLogsStream(req, res, file);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return handleLogsTail(req, res, file, qs.get('tail'));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (req.method !== 'POST') {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(405, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const allowedPaths = ['/config/agents', '/config/pjsip', '/config/pjsip-trunks', '/config/dialplan'];\\\\\\\\n  if (!allowedPaths.includes(urlPath)) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  let body = '';\\\\\\\\n  for await (const chunk of req) body += chunk;\\\\\\\\n  let data;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    data = JSON.parse(body);\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const content = data?.content;\\\\\\\\n  if (typeof content !== 'string') {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing or invalid \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"' }));\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    if (urlPath === '/config/agents') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(AGENTS_CONF, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload app_agent_pool.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else if (urlPath === '/config/pjsip-trunks') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(PJSIP_TRUNKS, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload res_pjsip.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else if (urlPath === '/config/dialplan') {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(DIALPLAN_CONF, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'dialplan reload'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      await writeAndReload(PJSIP_CUSTOM, content, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"asterisk -rx 'module reload res_pjsip.so'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ ok: true }));\\\\\\\\n  } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n    res.writeHead(500, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });\\\\\\\\n    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: e.message || 'Write or reload failed' }));\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nserver.listen(PORT, '0.0.0.0', async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  await ensurePjsipFilesExist();\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;Asterisk config receiver listening on port ${PORT}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  if (CONFIG_API_KEY) console.log('API key required (X-Config-API-Key)');\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":208,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":7728,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\scripts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk-config-receiver\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":208}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"ee0e9ce3-4f59-4c6f-be1e-5feccdf7abd5\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"b39f8ba9-6124-4275-8e20-a815886c5390\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[]
