development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\callcentre.conf\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Call centre – single dialplan file (inbound, queue, extension, agent login)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Put globals in extensions.conf [globals]. In extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n; Point trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Agent login: ARI to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AgentLogin\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; HangME,1,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,s,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Queue: send customer to Stasis app; app picks agent by ring strategy (ringall, leastrecent, fewestcalls, random, rrmemory, rrordered, linear)\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Stasis(queue-dashboard,${QueueName},${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(ring-agent,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Agent ${AgentNumber} login)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=AgentLogin,callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGIN}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(dtmf_features)=HT)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Authenticate(${AgentPassword})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginCompleted)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,AgentLogin(${AgentNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentSuccess=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS}AgentID=${AgentNumber}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; callstatus,1,NoOp(Agent login hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LoginCompleted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentHangupStatus=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGOUT}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=LoginFailed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; ----- Notify app: incoming (ringing), answered, hangup -----\\\\\\\\n[notify-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify incoming - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_INCOMING}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[notify-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify answered - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[notify-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify hangup - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PENDING_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PENDING_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PENDING_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CURL_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[ring-agent]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=hangup-customer,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(notify-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2})),B(notify-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(ring-agent-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Bridge ended)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(No answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-BUSY,1,NoOp(Busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Channel unavailable)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _ring-agent-.,1,NoOp(Dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Hangup handler)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Trunk sends DID as extension; use this context if your trunk points to \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"from-trunk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[from-trunk]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound ${EXTEN:1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(from-pstn,${EXTEN:1},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":145}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\callcentre.conf\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Call centre – single dialplan file (inbound, queue, extension, agent login)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Put globals in extensions.conf [globals]. In extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n; Point trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". Agent login: ARI to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AgentLogin\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; HangME,1,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,s,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Queue: send customer to Stasis app; app picks agent by ring strategy (ringall, leastrecent, fewestcalls, random, rrmemory, rrordered, linear)\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Stasis(queue-dashboard,${QueueName},${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(ring-agent,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Agent ${AgentNumber} login)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=AgentLogin,callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGIN}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(dtmf_features)=HT)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Authenticate(${AgentPassword})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginCompleted)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,AgentLogin(${AgentNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentSuccess=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS}AgentID=${AgentNumber}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; callstatus,1,NoOp(Agent login hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LoginCompleted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentHangupStatus=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AGENT_LOGOUT}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=LoginFailed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; ----- Notify app: incoming (ringing), answered, hangup -----\\\\\\\\n[notify-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify incoming - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_INCOMING}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[notify-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify answered - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[notify-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Notify hangup - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PENDING_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PENDING_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(CURL_URL=${CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PENDING_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CURL_URL=${CURL_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(CURL_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CURL_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[ring-agent]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RING_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=hangup-customer,s,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(notify-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2})),B(notify-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(ring-agent-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Bridge ended)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(No answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-BUSY,1,NoOp(Busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; ring-agent-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Channel unavailable)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _ring-agent-.,1,NoOp(Dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Hangup handler)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(notify-hangup,s,1(${RING_UNIQUE_ID},${RING_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Trunk sends DID as extension; use this context if your trunk points to \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"from-trunk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[from-trunk]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound ${EXTEN:1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(from-pstn,${EXTEN:1},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":145,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":6214,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\callcentre.conf\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":145}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"7303bfce-d857-4f2a-b2a1-ee13cfcef9c3\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"76a42468-9cea-4505-957e-a7ffa87acaf1\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.964Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_5afdb017-24c3-40db-bcac-124a8d66d03\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_5afdb017-24c3-40db-bcac-124a8d66d03\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; PBX Call Centre – full dialplan for new Node app (no us4group.conf)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Paste this file into /etc/asterisk/ and in extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Or paste the entire contents into extensions.conf.\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Before use:\\\\\\\\n;   1. Set APIURL in [globals] to your Node app (e.g. http://10.50.7.181:3001/api/asterisk/)\\\\\\\\n;   2. Ensure inbound_routes, queues, queue_members, sip_extensions are set in the app DB\\\\\\\\n;   3. Point your trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (e.g. from-pstn → Goto(inbound,s,1))\\\\\\\\n;   4. Agent SIP login: point ARI/originate to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AgentLogin\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with vars AgentNumber, AgentPassword\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[globals]\\\\\\\\n; Node app base URL – change to your server (no trailing slash)\\\\\\\\nAPIURL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Agent login (SIP login to dashboard)\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLogin=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogin?\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLogout=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogout?\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLoginSuccess?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Inbound route lookup (DID → queue or extension)\\\\\\\\nINBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\nQUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Phase 3 real-time call events\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_INCOMING_CALL=${APIURL}IncomingCall?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED=${APIURL}CallAnswered?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_CALL_HANGUP=${APIURL}CallHangup?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_RECORDING=${APIURL}Recording?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Recording path (optional; for MixMonitor)\\\\\\\\n; RecPath=/var/spool/asterisk/recording/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; INBOUND: entry from trunk / DID\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Where to go (based on InboundRoute API)\\\\\\\\n; Destination_Action: 0=hangup, 2=queue, 9=extension\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; QUEUE: try agents in order (Phase 3). Gets member list from Node app.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueMembersList=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QUEUE_MEMBERS}QueueName=${QueueName}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QueueMembersList}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoMembers)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(QueueTryNext),Set(MemberExten=${CUT(QueueMembersList,&amp;,${MemberIndex})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${MemberExten}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoAnswer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${MemberExten},${QueueName}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,Done)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=$[${MemberIndex} + 1])\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(QueueTryNext)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoAnswer),NoOp(No queue member answered)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(Done),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoMembers),NoOp(Queue has no members)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; SIP EXTENSION: ring single extension (Phase 3)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Hangup handler (optional; Phase 3 already sends CallHangup in its flow)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; AGENT LOGIN: SIP login to dashboard (ARI originates here with AgentNumber, AgentPassword)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Agent ${AgentNumber} login)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=AgentLogin,callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLogin}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(dtmf_features)=HT)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Authenticate(${AgentPassword})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginCompleted)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,AgentLogin(${AgentNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentSuccess=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess}AgentID=${AgentNumber}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; callstatus,1,NoOp(Agent login hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LoginCompleted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?AgentLogin,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentHangupStatus=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLogout}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=LoginFailed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; PHASE 3: subroutines (IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 IncomingCall - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})}&amp;CampaignName=${URIENCODE(${ARG6})}&amp;DID=${URIENCODE(${ARG7})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallAnswered - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallHangup - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PHASE3_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PHASE3_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-ring-one]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=pbx-phase3-hangup-customer,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(pbx-phase3-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2}^${PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME}^${CallerDnid})),B(pbx-phase3-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(pbx-phase3-dial-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Phase3 customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 bridge ended)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 no answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-BUSY,1,NoOp(Phase3 busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Phase3 channunavail)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _pbx-phase3-dial-.,1,NoOp(Phase3 dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 hangup handler)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: from-pstn – point your trunk to this, then Goto inbound\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: internal dial (e.g. agent dials 9 + number for outbound)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound ${EXTEN:1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(from-pstn,${EXTEN:1},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":203}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; PBX Call Centre – full dialplan for new Node app (no us4group.conf)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Paste this file into /etc/asterisk/ and in extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pbx-callcentre.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Or paste the entire contents into extensions.conf.\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Before use:\\\\\\\\n;   1. Set APIURL in [globals] to your Node app (e.g. http://10.50.7.181:3001/api/asterisk/)\\\\\\\\n;   2. Ensure inbound_routes, queues, queue_members, sip_extensions are set in the app DB\\\\\\\\n;   3. Point your trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (e.g. from-pstn → Goto(inbound,s,1))\\\\\\\\n;   4. Agent SIP login: point ARI/originate to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AgentLogin\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with vars AgentNumber, AgentPassword\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[globals]\\\\\\\\n; Node app base URL – change to your server (no trailing slash)\\\\\\\\nAPIURL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Agent login (SIP login to dashboard)\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLogin=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogin?\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLogout=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLogout?\\\\\\\\nUS4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess=${APIURL}US4GROUP_Agent/AgentLoginSuccess?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Inbound route lookup (DID → queue or extension)\\\\\\\\nINBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\nQUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Phase 3 real-time call events\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_INCOMING_CALL=${APIURL}IncomingCall?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED=${APIURL}CallAnswered?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_CALL_HANGUP=${APIURL}CallHangup?\\\\\\\\nPHASE3_RECORDING=${APIURL}Recording?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Recording path (optional; for MixMonitor)\\\\\\\\n; RecPath=/var/spool/asterisk/recording/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; INBOUND: entry from trunk / DID\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Where to go (based on InboundRoute API)\\\\\\\\n; Destination_Action: 0=hangup, 2=queue, 9=extension\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; QUEUE: try agents in order (Phase 3). Gets member list from Node app.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueMembersList=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QUEUE_MEMBERS}QueueName=${QueueName}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QueueMembersList}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoMembers)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(QueueTryNext),Set(MemberExten=${CUT(QueueMembersList,&amp;,${MemberIndex})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${MemberExten}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoAnswer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${MemberExten},${QueueName}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,Done)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=$[${MemberIndex} + 1])\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(QueueTryNext)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoAnswer),NoOp(No queue member answered)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(Done),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoMembers),NoOp(Queue has no members)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; SIP EXTENSION: ring single extension (Phase 3)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Hangup handler (optional; Phase 3 already sends CallHangup in its flow)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; AGENT LOGIN: SIP login to dashboard (ARI originates here with AgentNumber, AgentPassword)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Agent ${AgentNumber} login)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=AgentLogin,callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginInitiated)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentInformation=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLogin}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(dtmf_features)=HT)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Authenticate(${AgentPassword})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentStatus=LoginCompleted)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,AgentLogin(${AgentNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentSuccess=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLoginSuccess}AgentID=${AgentNumber}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; callstatus,1,NoOp(Agent login hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${AgentStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LoginCompleted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?AgentLogin,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentHangupStatus=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${US4GROUP_AgentLogout}AgentID=${AgentNumber}&amp;AgentStatus=LoginFailed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; PHASE 3: subroutines (IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 IncomingCall - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})}&amp;CampaignName=${URIENCODE(${ARG6})}&amp;DID=${URIENCODE(${ARG7})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallAnswered - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallHangup - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PHASE3_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PHASE3_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-ring-one]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=pbx-phase3-hangup-customer,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(pbx-phase3-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2}^${PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME}^${CallerDnid})),B(pbx-phase3-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(pbx-phase3-dial-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Phase3 customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 bridge ended)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 no answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-BUSY,1,NoOp(Phase3 busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Phase3 channunavail)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _pbx-phase3-dial-.,1,NoOp(Phase3 dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 hangup handler)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: from-pstn – point your trunk to this, then Goto inbound\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: internal dial (e.g. agent dials 9 + number for outbound)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound ${EXTEN:1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(from-pstn,${EXTEN:1},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":203,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":9923,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Inbound / Queue / Extension flow only (no [globals], no AgentLogin, no Phase 3)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Use this when you already have:\\\\\\\\n;   - [globals] in extensions.conf (with APIURL, Phase 3 URLs, etc.)\\\\\\\\n;   - pbx.conf with [AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\n;   - phase3-dialplan.conf with [pbx-phase3-*] subroutines\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Add to your [globals] in extensions.conf (if not already there):\\\\\\\\n;   INBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\n;   QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; In extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pbx-inbound.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Point your trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (e.g. Goto(inbound,s,1)).\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueMembersList=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QUEUE_MEMBERS}QueueName=${QueueName}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QueueMembersList}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoMembers)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(QueueTryNext),Set(MemberExten=${CUT(QueueMembersList,&amp;,${MemberIndex})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${MemberExten}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoAnswer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${MemberExten},${QueueName}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,Done)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=$[${MemberIndex} + 1])\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(QueueTryNext)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoAnswer),NoOp(No queue member answered)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(Done),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoMembers),NoOp(Queue has no members)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Inbound / Queue / Extension flow only (no [globals], no AgentLogin, no Phase 3)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Use this when you already have:\\\\\\\\n;   - [globals] in extensions.conf (with APIURL, Phase 3 URLs, etc.)\\\\\\\\n;   - pbx.conf with [AgentLogin]\\\\\\\\n;   - phase3-dialplan.conf with [pbx-phase3-*] subroutines\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Add to your [globals] in extensions.conf (if not already there):\\\\\\\\n;   INBOUND_ROUTE=${APIURL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\n;   QUEUE_MEMBERS=${APIURL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; In extensions.conf add:\\\\\\\\n;   #include \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pbx-inbound.conf\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Point your trunk/DID to context \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (e.g. Goto(inbound,s,1)).\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[inbound]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Inbound call)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Progress()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(Caller=${FILTER(0-9,${CALLERID(num)})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallerDnid=${CALLERID(dnid)})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CDRID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(RouteResult=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${INBOUND_ROUTE}DID=${CallerDnid}&amp;CallerNumber=${Caller}&amp;CallUniqueID=${UNIQUEID}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(ARRAY(CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID)=${RouteResult})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${CallStatus}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"HANGUP\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=7200)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=callstatus,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Answer()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(WhereToGO,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[WhereToGO]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(WhereToGO Action=${Destination_Action} Value=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 0]?inbound,HangME)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 2]?Queue,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[${Destination_Action} = 9]?SipExtension,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[Queue]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Queue ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueName=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(QueueMembersList=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QUEUE_MEMBERS}QueueName=${QueueName}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${QueueMembersList}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoMembers)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(QueueTryNext),Set(MemberExten=${CUT(QueueMembersList,&amp;,${MemberIndex})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${MemberExten}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,NoAnswer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${MemberExten},${QueueName}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,Done)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(MemberIndex=$[${MemberIndex} + 1])\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(QueueTryNext)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoAnswer),NoOp(No queue member answered)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(Done),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(NoMembers),NoOp(Queue has no members)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[SipExtension]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(SipExtension ${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${Destination_Value},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[callstatus]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Call hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-pstn]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Call from trunk ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CALLERID(dnid)=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(inbound,s,1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[from-internal]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _9.,1,NoOp(Internal outbound ${EXTEN:1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(from-pstn,${EXTEN:1},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":76,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":3064,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\pbx-inbound.conf\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":76}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"1b252c99-5a55-4c75-a15e-ab5b84729252\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"5761ce39-f581-4c47-b6a7-8a0460cd76c7\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectL =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Copy the lines below into the [globals] section of extensions.conf.\\\\\\\\n; Replace YOUR_APP_HOST:3001 with your Node app host and port.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; App base URL (no trailing slash)\\\\\\\\nAPP_URL=http://YOUR_APP_HOST:3001/api/asterisk/\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Agent login / logout (SIP login to dashboard)\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGIN=${APP_URL}AgentLogin?\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGOUT=${APP_URL}AgentLogout?\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS=${APP_URL}AgentLoginSuccess?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Inbound routing (DID → queue or extension)\\\\\\\\nINBOUND_ROUTE=${APP_URL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\nQUEUE_MEMBERS=${APP_URL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Real-time call events (ringing, answered, hangup, recording)\\\\\\\\nCALL_INCOMING=${APP_URL}IncomingCall?\\\\\\\\nCALL_ANSWERED=${APP_URL}CallAnswered?\\\\\\\\nCALL_HANGUP=${APP_URL}CallHangup?\\\\\\\\nRECORDING=${APP_URL}Recording?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":25}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web dashboard)\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGIN=${APP_URL}AgentLogin?\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGOUT=${APP_URL}AgentLogout?\\\\\\\\nAGENT_LOGIN_SUCCESS=${APP_URL}AgentLoginSuccess?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Inbound routing (DID → queue or extension)\\\\\\\\nINBOUND_ROUTE=${APP_URL}InboundRoute?\\\\\\\\nQUEUE_MEMBERS=${APP_URL}QueueMembers?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Real-time call events (ringing, answered, hangup, development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\phase3-dialplan.conf\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Phase 3: Real-time call handling – dialplan (include from extensions.conf)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; This file implements IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup (and optionally\\\\\\\\n; Recording) HTTP callbacks so the Node app can push events to the agent UI.\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Prerequisites:\\\\\\\\n;   - In [globals]: APIURL, PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL, PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED,\\\\\\\\n;     PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP (and PHASE3_RECORDING if using recording callback).\\\\\\\\n;   - PJSIP or SIP endpoint for agents (e.g. PJSIP/1001 or SIP/1001).\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Usage:\\\\\\\\n;   To ring one agent with Phase 3 notifications from your inbound/queue flow:\\\\\\\\n;     Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=1001)\\\\\\\\n;     Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=Support)\\\\\\\\n;     Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n;   The current channel must be the customer (inbound) leg.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine (b): notify app when agent channel is created (ringing)\\\\\\\\n; Runs on B-leg. ARG1=customer_channel, ARG2=uniqueid, ARG3=caller_number, ARG4=agent_id, ARG5=queue_name, ARG6=campaign_name (optional), ARG7=DID/TFN (for reporting)\\\\\\\\n; Set PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME before Gosub to pass campaign for agent display.\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 IncomingCall notify - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})}&amp;CampaignName=${URIENCODE(${ARG6})}&amp;DID=${URIENCODE(${ARG7})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine (B): notify app when agent answers\\\\\\\\n; Runs on B-leg when answer. ARG1=customer_uniqueid, ARG2=agent_id\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallAnswered notify - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine: notify app on call hangup (caller hangup handler or after Dial)\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallHangup notify - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PHASE3_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PHASE3_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Main context: ring one agent with Phase 3 callbacks\\\\\\\\n; Entry: Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))\\\\\\\\n;   agent_id  = extension number (e.g. 1001) – must match PJSIP/SIP endpoint\\\\\\\\n;   queue_name = optional queue name for display (e.g. Support)\\\\\\\\n;   Set PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME before Gosub to pass campaign name to agent UI.\\\\\\\\n; Current channel = customer leg. Uses PJSIP by default; change to SIP if needed.\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-ring-one]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=pbx-phase3-hangup-customer,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(pbx-phase3-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2}^${PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME}^${CallerDnid})),B(pbx-phase3-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(pbx-phase3-dial-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Customer hung up during ring or talk\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Phase3 customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; After Dial: bridge ended (agent or customer hung up)\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 bridge ended - call completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 agent no answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-BUSY,1,NoOp(Phase3 agent busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Phase3 channel unavailable)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _pbx-phase3-dial-.,1,NoOp(Phase3 dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Hangup handler for customer channel (so we notify when customer hangs up)\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 hangup handler - customer channel)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: use from Queue() via Local channel\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; If you use Queue() and want Phase 3 only when a specific agent answers, you\\\\\\\\n; can't easily inject IncomingCall before each ring. Alternative: replace\\\\\\\\n; Queue() with a loop that tries each member using pbx-phase3-ring-one.\\\\\\\\n; Example (pseudo): try agent 1001, if no answer try 1002, etc.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: Recording callback (after MixMonitor or Record)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; When a recording file is ready, call from dialplan or an external script:\\\\\\\\n;   curl \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_RECORDING}UniqueID=...&amp;Path=/path/to/recording.wav\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n; Or in dialplan after MixMonitor (e.g. in h extension or after Hangup):\\\\\\\\n;   Set(PHASE3_REC_PATH=${URIENCODE(${RECORDED_FILE})})\\\\\\\\n;   Set(PHASE3_REC_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_RECORDING}UniqueID=${UNIQUEID}&amp;Path=${PHASE3_REC_PATH}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":123}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\phase3-dialplan.conf\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Phase 3: Real-time call handling – dialplan (include from extensions.conf)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; This file implements IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup (and optionally\\\\\\\\n; Recording) HTTP callbacks so the Node app can push events to the agent UI.\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Prerequisites:\\\\\\\\n;   - In [globals]: APIURL, PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL, PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED,\\\\\\\\n;     PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP (and PHASE3_RECORDING if using recording callback).\\\\\\\\n;   - PJSIP or SIP endpoint for agents (e.g. PJSIP/1001 or SIP/1001).\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Usage:\\\\\\\\n;   To ring one agent with Phase 3 notifications from your inbound/queue flow:\\\\\\\\n;     Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=1001)\\\\\\\\n;     Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=Support)\\\\\\\\n;     Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n;   The current channel must be the customer (inbound) leg.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine (b): notify app when agent channel is created (ringing)\\\\\\\\n; Runs on B-leg. ARG1=customer_channel, ARG2=uniqueid, ARG3=caller_number, ARG4=agent_id, ARG5=queue_name, ARG6=campaign_name (optional), ARG7=DID/TFN (for reporting)\\\\\\\\n; Set PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME before Gosub to pass campaign for agent display.\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-incoming]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 IncomingCall notify - Agent ${ARG4})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_INCOMING_CALL}AgentID=${ARG4}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG2}&amp;ChannelID=${URIENCODE(${CHANNEL(name)})}&amp;CustomerChannelID=${URIENCODE(${ARG1})}&amp;CustomerNumber=${URIENCODE(${ARG3})}&amp;QueueName=${URIENCODE(${ARG5})}&amp;CampaignName=${URIENCODE(${ARG6})}&amp;DID=${URIENCODE(${ARG7})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine (B): notify app when agent answers\\\\\\\\n; Runs on B-leg when answer. ARG1=customer_uniqueid, ARG2=agent_id\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-answered]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallAnswered notify - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_ANSWERED}AgentID=${ARG2}&amp;UniqueID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Subroutine: notify app on call hangup (caller hangup handler or after Dial)\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 CallHangup notify - UniqueID ${ARG1} Agent ${ARG2} Status ${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG3}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?setstatus)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_STATUS=${ARG3})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(url)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(setstatus),Set(PHASE3_STATUS=completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(url),Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_CALL_HANGUP}UniqueID=${ARG1}&amp;Status=${URIENCODE(${PHASE3_STATUS})})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${ARG2}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?curl)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_URL=${PHASE3_URL}&amp;AgentID=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(curl),Set(PHASE3_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s -o /dev/null -w \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%{http_code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_URL}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n; Main context: ring one agent with Phase 3 callbacks\\\\\\\\n; Entry: Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))\\\\\\\\n;   agent_id  = extension number (e.g. 1001) – must match PJSIP/SIP endpoint\\\\\\\\n;   queue_name = optional queue name for display (e.g. Support)\\\\\\\\n;   Set PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME before Gosub to pass campaign name to agent UI.\\\\\\\\n; Current channel = customer leg. Uses PJSIP by default; change to SIP if needed.\\\\\\\\n; -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-ring-one]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 ring agent ${ARG1} queue ${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_ID=${ARG1})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=${ARG2})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID=${UNIQUEID})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(CHANNEL(hangup_handler_push)=pbx-phase3-hangup-customer,1)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,b(pbx-phase3-incoming^s^1(${CHANNEL(name)}^${UNIQUEID}^${CALLERID(num)}^${ARG1}^${ARG2}^${PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME}^${CallerDnid})),B(pbx-phase3-answered^s^1(${UNIQUEID}^${ARG1})),e)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Goto(pbx-phase3-dial-${DIALSTATUS},1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Customer hung up during ring or talk\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; h,1,NoOp(Phase3 customer hangup)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; After Dial: bridge ended (agent or customer hung up)\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-ANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 bridge ended - call completed)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-NOANSWER,1,NoOp(Phase3 agent no answer)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},noanswer))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-BUSY,1,NoOp(Phase3 agent busy)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},busy))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; pbx-phase3-dial-CHANUNAVAIL,1,NoOp(Phase3 channel unavailable)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},failed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _pbx-phase3-dial-.,1,NoOp(Phase3 dial status ${DIALSTATUS})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},${DIALSTATUS}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Hangup handler for customer channel (so we notify when customer hangs up)\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-hangup-customer]\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; s,1,NoOp(Phase3 hangup handler - customer channel)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-hangup,s,1(${PHASE3_UNIQUE_ID},${PHASE3_AGENT_ID},completed))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: use from Queue() via Local channel\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; If you use Queue() and want Phase 3 only when a specific agent answers, you\\\\\\\\n; can't easily inject IncomingCall before each ring. Alternative: replace\\\\\\\\n; Queue() with a loop that tries each member using pbx-phase3-ring-one.\\\\\\\\n; Example (pseudo): try agent 1001, if no answer try 1002, etc.\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Optional: Recording callback (after MixMonitor or Record)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; When a recording file is ready, call from dialplan or an external script:\\\\\\\\n;   curl \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_RECORDING}UniqueID=...&amp;Path=/path/to/recording.wav\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n; Or in dialplan after MixMonitor (e.g. in h extension or after Hangup):\\\\\\\\n;   Set(PHASE3_REC_PATH=${URIENCODE(${RECORDED_FILE})})\\\\\\\\n;   Set(PHASE3_REC_RESULT=${SHELL(curl -s \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${PHASE3_RECORDING}UniqueID=${UNIQUEID}&amp;Path=${PHASE3_REC_PATH}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")})\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":123,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":7183,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Phase 3: Example – inbound call to a single extension (with CDR + realtime)\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n; Use this when your inbound route sends the call to one extension (e.g. 1001)\\\\\\\\n; instead of a queue. Replace \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Destination_Action = 9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / SipExtension handling\\\\\\\\n; with a jump to this context, or include this and call it from your main flow.\\\\\\\\n;\\\\\\\\n; Variables expected (set by your inbound/account check):\\\\\\\\n;   Destination_Value = extension number to ring (e.g. 1001), or set EXTEN\\\\\\\\n;   Caller, UNIQUEID, CDRID, UserID, etc. as in your existing flow\\\\\\\\n;   Optionally: QueueName (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Inbound\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") for display\\\\\\\\n; =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[pbx-phase3-inbound-extension]\\\\\\\\n; Entry: extension in Destination_Value (or pass as argument)\\\\\\\\n; Current channel = customer (inbound call)\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; _X.,1,NoOp(Phase3 inbound to extension ${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_EXT=${EXTEN})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=Inbound)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${PHASE3_AGENT_EXT},${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Return()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n; Optional: entry point from your main context (e.g. after WhereToGO when Destination_Action=9)\\\\\\\\n; exten =&gt; s,1,Set(PHASE3_AGENT_EXT=${Destination_Value})\\\\\\\\n; same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=Inbound)\\\\\\\\n; same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${PHASE3_AGENT_EXT},${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":27}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\phase3-example-inbound-extension.conf\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\";
