(or the file that contains &#96;SipExtension&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- **Find:** the &#96;Dial(SIP/${ExtensionNumber},...)&#96; line and the &#96;Hangup()&#96; right after it.\\\\\\\\n- **Replace** that Dial + Hangup with a **Gosub** to Phase 3, then Hangup.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nExample:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Before:**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ini\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentNumber=${ExtensionNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentCallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,MixMonitor(${RecPath}${RecName}.wav,b)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Dial(SIP/${ExtensionNumber},${ExtensionTimeout},tTU(InAnswerTime^${CDRID}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**After (using Phase 3):**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ini\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentNumber=${ExtensionNumber})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(AgentCallStartTime=${EPOCH})\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,MixMonitor(${RecPath}${RecName}.wav,b)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${ExtensionNumber},Inbound))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Hangup()\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(hang),HangUp()\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **First argument** &#96;ExtensionNumber&#96; = agent extension (e.g. 1001). Phase 3 will ring that (e.g. &#96;PJSIP/1001&#96; or &#96;SIP/1001&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- **Second argument** &#96;Inbound&#96; = queue/label name for the UI (e.g. “Inbound”). You can use &#96;${QueueName}&#96; or a fixed string like &#96;Support&#96; if you prefer.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSo in **point 3**, “paste” means: in the **SipExtension** block, **replace the single &#96;Dial(SIP/...)&#96; + &#96;Hangup()&#96;** with **&#96;Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${ExtensionNumber},Inbound))&#96;** then **&#96;Hangup()&#96;**, as above.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### If you use PJSIP\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPhase 3 dialplan uses **PJSIP** by default. If your agents are registered as **SIP** (chan_sip), either:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Change in **phase3-dialplan.conf** the &#96;Dial(PJSIP/${ARG1},30,...)&#96; line to &#96;Dial(SIP/${ARG1},30,...)&#96;, or  \\\\\\\\n- Keep PJSIP and ensure 1001/1002 are in **pjsip.conf** (or equivalent).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Scenario B – Inbound to queue (Queue())\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nHere the call is put in a **queue** and **Queue()** rings multiple members. The “ringing” is done inside the Queue() app, so you don’t have a single “Dial(agent)” line to replace.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Why Phase 3 “ring one” doesn’t fit Queue() directly\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Phase 3** expects: **one** customer channel, **one** agent extension; you call **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))** and it does Dial + callbacks.\\\\\\\\n- **Queue()** does: “ring many members, answer when one answers” and only gives you a macro/URL when the call is **answered** (e.g. SendResponse), not “when we start ringing agent 1001”.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSo you **cannot** “paste” Phase 3 **inside** Queue() without changing the flow.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Two ways to use Phase 3 with a “queue”\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Option B1 – Keep Queue() for routing; add Phase 3 only when one agent is chosen**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Keep your current **Queue()** and **SendResponse** as they are (SendResponse runs when an agent answers).\\\\\\\\n- In **SendResponse** you already notify the old app (AgentOnCall). You can **also** call the Node app’s **CallAnswered** (and optionally **IncomingCall** for the ring state) from that same macro if you pass the right data (agent id, uniqueid, etc.). That would require adding a small curl in SendResponse to your Node **CallAnswered** (and optionally **IncomingCall**) endpoint with the same parameters as in Phase 3.\\\\\\\\n- So “using Phase 3 when ringing an agent” in a queue setup can mean: **when the agent answers**, call **CallAnswered** (and, if you want ring state, **IncomingCall** when the member is tried). The **ring-one** subroutine is not used here; only the **HTTP callbacks** (and your Node app) are used.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Option B2 – Replace Queue() with “try agents in order” using Phase 3**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Remove the **Queue()** call for that queue.\\\\\\\\n- Implement “try agent 1001, then 1002, then …” yourself with a loop, and each time you try an agent you call **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))**.\\\\\\\\n- Then “using Phase 3 when ringing an agent” means: **each** time you ring the next agent, you paste that **Gosub** in the loop (see below).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nExample of a **simple** “try two agents in order” using Phase 3 (you can extend with more agents or get the list from an API):\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ini\\\\\\\\n; Replace \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Queue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for this queue with a custom “try agents” loop\\\\\\\\nexten =&gt; Queue,1,NoOp(Phase3 try agents in order)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(LastLocation=Queue)\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Set(PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME=${QueueName})\\\\\\\\n ; Try agent 1001 first\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(1001,${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,HangME)\\\\\\\\n ; Try agent 1002 next\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(1002,${PHASE3_QUEUE_NAME}))\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n,GotoIf($[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${DIALSTATUS}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ANSWER\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]?Queue,HangME)\\\\\\\\n ; No one answered\\\\\\\\n same =&gt; n(Queue,HangME),Hangup()\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nHere, **each** **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(1001,...))** and **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(1002,...))** is “using Phase 3 when ringing an agent” for that agent.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Summary table – where to paste / what to do\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Your flow | Where “ring agent” happens | What to do for Point 3 |\\\\\\\\n|-----------|-----------------------------|--------------------------|\\\\\\\\n| **Inbound → single extension** (SipExtension, Destination_Action=9) | &#96;Dial(SIP/${ExtensionNumber},...)&#96; in **SipExtension** | Replace that Dial (+ Hangup after) with **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(${ExtensionNumber},Inbound))** then Hangup. |\\\\\\\\n| **Inbound → queue** (Queue()) | Inside Queue() app | Either: (B1) Only add CallAnswered/IncomingCall from SendResponse; or (B2) Replace Queue() with a loop and call **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))** for each agent you try. |\\\\\\\\n| **Any other “ring one extension”** | Any &#96;Dial(SIP/1001,...)&#96; or &#96;Dial(PJSIP/1001,...)&#96; | Replace that Dial (and following Hangup if any) with **Gosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(1001,YourQueueName))** then Hangup. |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Gosub parameters explained\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;ini\\\\\\\\nGosub(pbx-phase3-ring-one,s,1(agent_id,queue_name))\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **pbx-phase3-ring-one** – context in **phase3-dialplan.conf** that does Dial + IncomingCall/CallAnswered/CallHangup.\\\\\\\\n- **s** – extension (start).\\\\\\\\n- **1** – priority.\\\\\\\\n- **agent_id** – extension number to ring (e.g. &#96;1001&#96; or &#96;${ExtensionNumber}&#96;). Must match your PJSIP/SIP endpoint.\\\\\\\\n- **queue_name** – label for the UI (e.g. &#96;Inbound&#96;, &#96;Support&#96;, &#96;${QueueName}&#96;). Shown as “queue” in the agent dashboard.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nUsually the channel will **hang up inside** Phase 3 (agent or customer hung up), so the next line after &#96;Gosub(...)&#96; in your context may not run. If the Gosub ever returns (e.g. in edge cases), **DIALSTATUS** is set (e.g. &#96;ANSWER&#96;, &#96;NOANSWER&#96;, &#96;BUSY&#96;), so you can branch on it if needed.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nSo when you “use Phase 3 when ringing an agent”, you are literally **adding or replacing** the place that rings that agent with this **Gosub** and the two arguments above.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":169,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":9033,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\docs\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\asterisk\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\PHASE3-USAGE-ELABORATED.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":169}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"a60f1a52-0550-42c0-ac5e-a2bf4ec66c1d\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"00f359c7-7259-47ff-8325-903ad2f764f0\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\ development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ari-stasis-queue.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":1008},\\\\\\\"contentBlobId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"HvPQPW92+8TciadjskDWsoiY8Yl5dSxe8SbvKAk60jA=\\\\\\\"}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"d42f31c0-32dc-4c73-90bf-9ff9cca53ef7\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"50936433-4a87-4aec-a3d1-7eb6c0fda7f3\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.972Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_2761998b-96f5-4dcf-950f-43f2893b99f\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_2761998b-96f5-4dcf-950f-43f2893b99f\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Queue ring strategy: order queue members by strategy for incoming queue calls.\\\\\\\\n * Used by Stasis queue-dashboard to pick which agent(s) to try and in what order.\\\\\\\\n * All strategies are per-queue and work for any number of queues and any number of agents per queue.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Default behaviour (all queues and agents): only available agents are considered.\\\\\\\\n * Agents who are LoggedOut, LoginFailed, Outbound, On Call, Ringing, or Transferring are excluded\\\\\\\\n * so the next call always goes to the next available agent.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Strategies:\\\\\\\\n * - ringall: fixed order by member_name (first agent first every time)\\\\\\\\n * - linear: same as ringall (member_name order)\\\\\\\\n * - rrordered: round-robin by position (each new call tries next agent in list)\\\\\\\\n * - rrmemory: round-robin by last answered (next call goes to agent after who last answered)\\\\\\\\n * - leastrecent: agent with oldest last_called time first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - fewestcalls: agent with fewest answered calls first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - random: shuffle order per call\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// In-memory state per queue: rrordered = last tried index, rrmemory = last agent who answered\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastIndex = new Map();\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastAgent = new Map();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeStrategy(str) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (str || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'roundrobin' || s === 'rrordered') return 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'rrmemory') return 'rrmemory';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'leastrecent') return 'leastrecent';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'fewestcalls') return 'fewestcalls';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'random') return 'random';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'linear') return 'linear';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'ringall') return 'ringall';\\\\\\\\n  return 'ringall'; // default\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction shuffle(arr) {\\\\\\\\n  const a = [...arr];\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = a.length - 1; i &gt; 0; i--) {\\\\\\\\n    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\\\\\\\\n    [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return a;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get queue members ordered by the queue's ring strategy.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} queueIdOrName - Queue id (numeric) or queue name\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ members: string[], strategy: string }&gt;} Ordered list of member_name (extension numbers) and strategy used\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getOrderedQueueMembers(queueIdOrName) {\\\\\\\\n  const raw = (queueIdOrName || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!raw) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE name = ? LIMIT 1', [raw]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue &amp;&amp; /^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+$/.test(raw)) {\\\\\\\\n    queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1', [parseInt(raw, 10)]);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const queueName = queue.name;\\\\\\\\n  const mapKey = String(queueName).trim(); // canonical key for in-memory state (all queues)\\\\\\\\n  // When no strategy is set in DB, default to rrordered so calls distribute across agents\\\\\\\\n  const rawStrategy = queue.strategy != null &amp;&amp; String(queue.strategy).trim() !== '' ? queue.strategy : 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  const strategy = normalizeStrategy(rawStrategy);\\\\\\\\n  const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT member_name FROM queue_members WHERE queue_name = ? AND (paused = 0 OR paused IS NULL) ORDER BY member_name',\\\\\\\\n    [queueName]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  let members = (rows || []).map((r) =&gt; String(r.member_name || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  const rawMembers = [...members];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Single query to get all agent_status rows — classify each as available, busy, or offline\\\\\\\\n  const allStatusRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT agent_id, extension_number, status FROM agent_status'\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const availableIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  const busyIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of allStatusRows || []) {\\\\\\\\n    const ext = String(r.extension_number || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const aid = String(r.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const st = (r.status || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n    const stLower = st.toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    // Treat LoggedOut / login in-progress / SIP phone ringing as offline\\\\\\\\n    if (\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loggedout' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loginfailed' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'logininitiated' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'sip phone ringing'\\\\\\\\n    ) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Treat PAUSED / Break statuses as not available for queue calls\\\\\\\\n    if (stLower === 'paused' || stLower.includes('break')) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Busy: on call / ringing / transferring / outbound\\\\\\\\n    if (['On Call', 'Ringing', 'Transferring', 'Outbound'].includes(st)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) busyIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) busyIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) availableIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) availableIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  members = members.filter((m) =&gt; availableIds.has(m) &amp;&amp; !busyIds.has(m));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log('[queue-strategy]', queueName, '| strategy:', strategy,\\\\\\\\n    '| rawMembers:', rawMembers,\\\\\\\\n    '| available:', [...availableIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| busy:', [...busyIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| finalMembers:', members);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (members.length === 0) return { members: [], strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  switch (strategy) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'random':\\\\\\\\n      members = shuffle(members);\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrordered': {\\\\\\\\n      const last = queueLastIndex.get(mapKey) ?? -1;\\\\\\\\n      const next = Math.max(0, (last + 1) % Math.max(1, members.length));\\\\\\\\n      queueLastIndex.set(mapKey, next);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(next), ...members.slice(0, next)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrmemory': {\\\\\\\\n      const lastAgent = queueLastAgent.get(mapKey);\\\\\\\\n      const idx = lastAgent ? members.indexOf(lastAgent) : -1;\\\\\\\\n      const start = idx &gt;= 0 ? (idx + 1) % members.length : 0;\\\\\\\\n      if (members.length &gt; 0) queueLastAgent.set(mapKey, members[start] ?? members[0]);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(start), ...members.slice(0, start)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'leastrecent': {\\\\\\\\n      const recents = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, MAX(end_time) AS last_called FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const lastByExt = new Map((recents || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), r.last_called]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ta = lastByExt.get(a) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(a)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        const tb = lastByExt.get(b) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(b)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ta !== tb) return ta - tb; // least recent first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'fewestcalls': {\\\\\\\\n      const counts = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND status = 'answered' AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const countByExt = new Map((counts || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), Number(r.cnt) || 0]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ca = countByExt.get(a) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        const cb = countByExt.get(b) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ca !== cb) return ca - cb; // fewest first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'linear':\\\\\\\\n    case 'ringall':\\\\\\\\n    default:\\\\\\\\n      // already ordered by member_name (stable, deterministic)\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { members, strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update last agent for rrmemory when a call is answered (so next call uses next agent).\\\\\\\\n * Uses same canonical queue key as getOrderedQueueMembers so strategy state stays consistent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function setQueueLastAgent(queueName, agentExtension) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = queueName != null ? String(queueName).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  const ext = agentExtension != null ? String(agentExtension).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  if (key &amp;&amp; ext) queueLastAgent.set(key, ext);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":186}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\queue-strategy.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Queue ring strategy: order queue members by strategy for incoming queue calls.\\\\\\\\n * Used by Stasis queue-dashboard to pick which agent(s) to try and in what order.\\\\\\\\n * All strategies are per-queue and work for any number of queues and any number of agents per queue.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Default behaviour (all queues and agents): only available agents are considered.\\\\\\\\n * Agents who are LoggedOut, LoginFailed, Outbound, On Call, Ringing, or Transferring are excluded\\\\\\\\n * so the next call always goes to the next available agent.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Strategies:\\\\\\\\n * - ringall: fixed order by member_name (first agent first every time)\\\\\\\\n * - linear: same as ringall (member_name order)\\\\\\\\n * - rrordered: round-robin by position (each new call tries next agent in list)\\\\\\\\n * - rrmemory: round-robin by last answered (next call goes to agent after who last answered)\\\\\\\\n * - leastrecent: agent with oldest last_called time first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - fewestcalls: agent with fewest answered calls first (from call_records)\\\\\\\\n * - random: shuffle order per call\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// In-memory state per queue: rrordered = last tried index, rrmemory = last agent who answered\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastIndex = new Map();\\\\\\\\nconst queueLastAgent = new Map();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction normalizeStrategy(str) {\\\\\\\\n  const s = (str || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'roundrobin' || s === 'rrordered') return 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'rrmemory') return 'rrmemory';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'leastrecent') return 'leastrecent';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'fewestcalls') return 'fewestcalls';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'random') return 'random';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'linear') return 'linear';\\\\\\\\n  if (s === 'ringall') return 'ringall';\\\\\\\\n  return 'ringall'; // default\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction shuffle(arr) {\\\\\\\\n  const a = [...arr];\\\\\\\\n  for (let i = a.length - 1; i &gt; 0; i--) {\\\\\\\\n    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\\\\\\\\n    [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return a;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Get queue members ordered by the queue's ring strategy.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} queueIdOrName - Queue id (numeric) or queue name\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ members: string[], strategy: string }&gt;} Ordered list of member_name (extension numbers) and strategy used\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getOrderedQueueMembers(queueIdOrName) {\\\\\\\\n  const raw = (queueIdOrName || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!raw) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE name = ? LIMIT 1', [raw]);\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue &amp;&amp; /^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+$/.test(raw)) {\\\\\\\\n    queue = await queryOne('SELECT id, name, strategy FROM queues WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1', [parseInt(raw, 10)]);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!queue) return { members: [], strategy: 'ringall', queueName: null };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const queueName = queue.name;\\\\\\\\n  const mapKey = String(queueName).trim(); // canonical key for in-memory state (all queues)\\\\\\\\n  // When no strategy is set in DB, default to rrordered so calls distribute across agents\\\\\\\\n  const rawStrategy = queue.strategy != null &amp;&amp; String(queue.strategy).trim() !== '' ? queue.strategy : 'rrordered';\\\\\\\\n  const strategy = normalizeStrategy(rawStrategy);\\\\\\\\n  const rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT member_name FROM queue_members WHERE queue_name = ? AND (paused = 0 OR paused IS NULL) ORDER BY member_name',\\\\\\\\n    [queueName]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  let members = (rows || []).map((r) =&gt; String(r.member_name || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);\\\\\\\\n  const rawMembers = [...members];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Single query to get all agent_status rows — classify each as available, busy, or offline\\\\\\\\n  const allStatusRows = await query(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT agent_id, extension_number, status FROM agent_status'\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const availableIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  const busyIds = new Set();\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of allStatusRows || []) {\\\\\\\\n    const ext = String(r.extension_number || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const aid = String(r.agent_id || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n    const st = (r.status || '').toString().trim();\\\\\\\\n    const stLower = st.toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    // Treat LoggedOut / login in-progress / SIP phone ringing as offline\\\\\\\\n    if (\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loggedout' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'loginfailed' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'logininitiated' ||\\\\\\\\n      stLower === 'sip phone ringing'\\\\\\\\n    ) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Treat PAUSED / Break statuses as not available for queue calls\\\\\\\\n    if (stLower === 'paused' || stLower.includes('break')) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Busy: on call / ringing / transferring / outbound\\\\\\\\n    if (['On Call', 'Ringing', 'Transferring', 'Outbound'].includes(st)) {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) busyIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) busyIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      if (ext) availableIds.add(ext);\\\\\\\\n      if (aid) availableIds.add(aid);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  members = members.filter((m) =&gt; availableIds.has(m) &amp;&amp; !busyIds.has(m));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log('[queue-strategy]', queueName, '| strategy:', strategy,\\\\\\\\n    '| rawMembers:', rawMembers,\\\\\\\\n    '| available:', [...availableIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| busy:', [...busyIds],\\\\\\\\n    '| finalMembers:', members);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (members.length === 0) return { members: [], strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  switch (strategy) {\\\\\\\\n    case 'random':\\\\\\\\n      members = shuffle(members);\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrordered': {\\\\\\\\n      const last = queueLastIndex.get(mapKey) ?? -1;\\\\\\\\n      const next = Math.max(0, (last + 1) % Math.max(1, members.length));\\\\\\\\n      queueLastIndex.set(mapKey, next);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(next), ...members.slice(0, next)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'rrmemory': {\\\\\\\\n      const lastAgent = queueLastAgent.get(mapKey);\\\\\\\\n      const idx = lastAgent ? members.indexOf(lastAgent) : -1;\\\\\\\\n      const start = idx &gt;= 0 ? (idx + 1) % members.length : 0;\\\\\\\\n      if (members.length &gt; 0) queueLastAgent.set(mapKey, members[start] ?? members[0]);\\\\\\\\n      members = [...members.slice(start), ...members.slice(0, start)];\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'leastrecent': {\\\\\\\\n      const recents = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, MAX(end_time) AS last_called FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const lastByExt = new Map((recents || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), r.last_called]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ta = lastByExt.get(a) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(a)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        const tb = lastByExt.get(b) ? new Date(lastByExt.get(b)).getTime() : 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ta !== tb) return ta - tb; // least recent first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'fewestcalls': {\\\\\\\\n      const counts = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT agent_extension, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM call_records\\\\\\\\n         WHERE queue_name = ? AND status = 'answered' AND agent_extension IS NOT NULL AND agent_extension != ''\\\\\\\\n         GROUP BY agent_extension&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [queueName]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const countByExt = new Map((counts || []).map((r) =&gt; [String(r.agent_extension).trim(), Number(r.cnt) || 0]));\\\\\\\\n      members.sort((a, b) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        const ca = countByExt.get(a) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        const cb = countByExt.get(b) ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n        if (ca !== cb) return ca - cb; // fewest first\\\\\\\\n        return String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true }); // stable tie-break\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    case 'linear':\\\\\\\\n    case 'ringall':\\\\\\\\n    default:\\\\\\\\n      // already ordered by member_name (stable, deterministic)\\\\\\\\n      break;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { members, strategy, queueName };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Update last agent for rrmemory when a call is answered (so next call uses next agent).\\\\\\\\n * Uses same canonical queue key as getOrderedQueueMembers so strategy state stays consistent.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function setQueueLastAgent(queueName, agentExtension) {\\\\\\\\n  const key = queueName != null ? String(queueName).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  const ext = agentExtension != null ? String(agentExtension).trim() : '';\\\\\\\\n  if (key &amp;&amp; ext) queueLastAgent.set(key, ext);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":186,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":7836,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolves which agent (user) is assigned to a PJSIP extension.\\\\\\\\n * Uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id when set, with fallback to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolve extension name to agent user (by tenant).\\\\\\\\n * Tries sip_extensions.agent_user_id first, then falls back to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} tenantId - Optional. If provided, uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id for this tenant first.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name/number (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ id: number, parent_id: number }|null&gt;} User row (id, parent_id) or null\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, extensionName) {\\\\\\\\n  const ext = String(extensionName || '').trim().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId))) {\\\\\\\\n    const byAssignment = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT u.id, u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       FROM sip_extensions e\\\\\\\\n       INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.agent_user_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n       WHERE e.tenant_id = ? AND e.name = ? AND e.agent_user_id IS NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [Number(tenantId), ext]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (byAssignment) return byAssignment;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const byPhoneLogin = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, parent_id FROM users WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [ext]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return byPhoneLogin || null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set or clear the persistent assignment of an extension to an agent.\\\\\\\\n * Call after ensureSipExtensionForAgent when creating/updating an agent.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId - Tenant id\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} userId - User id to assign, or null to clear\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setExtensionAgentUserId(tenantId, extensionName, userId) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    'UPDATE sip_extensions SET agent_user_id = ? WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ?',\\\\\\\\n    [userId ?? null, tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":53}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolves which agent (user) is assigned to a PJSIP extension.\\\\\\\\n * Uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id when set, with fallback to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from './db.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Resolve extension name to agent user (by tenant).\\\\\\\\n * Tries sip_extensions.agent_user_id first, then falls back to users.phone_login_number.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} tenantId - Optional. If provided, uses sip_extensions.agent_user_id for this tenant first.\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name/number (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ id: number, parent_id: number }|null&gt;} User row (id, parent_id) or null\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, extensionName) {\\\\\\\\n  const ext = String(extensionName || '').trim().replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\D/g, '');\\\\\\\\n  if (!ext) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (tenantId != null &amp;&amp; tenantId !== '' &amp;&amp; !Number.isNaN(Number(tenantId))) {\\\\\\\\n    const byAssignment = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT u.id, u.parent_id\\\\\\\\n       FROM sip_extensions e\\\\\\\\n       INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = e.agent_user_id AND u.role = 5\\\\\\\\n       WHERE e.tenant_id = ? AND e.name = ? AND e.agent_user_id IS NOT NULL\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [Number(tenantId), ext]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (byAssignment) return byAssignment;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const byPhoneLogin = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id, parent_id FROM users WHERE phone_login_number = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [ext]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return byPhoneLogin || null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Set or clear the persistent assignment of an extension to an agent.\\\\\\\\n * Call after ensureSipExtensionForAgent when creating/updating an agent.\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} tenantId - Tenant id\\\\\\\\n * @param {string} extensionName - Extension name (e.g. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1001\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n * @param {number|null} userId - User id to assign, or null to clear\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setExtensionAgentUserId(tenantId, extensionName, userId) {\\\\\\\\n  const tid = Number(tenantId);\\\\\\\\n  const name = String(extensionName || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n  if (!name) return;\\\\\\\\n  await query(\\\\\\\\n    'UPDATE sip_extensions SET agent_user_id = ? WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ?',\\\\\\\\n    [userId ?? null, tid, name]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":53,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":2068,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent-extension-resolver.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":53}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"b53fef14-aa26-4610-9240-ad896d463cf3\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"40531903-e018-4ec6-8115-b632bad2a858\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.974Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_19d3e9cc-a5ca-4511-bb54-bf72a376d32\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_19d3e9cc-a5ca-4511-bb54-bf72a376d32\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"limit\\\\\\\":200,\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\web development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\routes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\agent.js\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import express from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { query, queryOne } from '../db.js';\\\\\\\\nimport {\\\\\\\\n  originateAgentLogin,\\\\\\\\n  isAriConfigured,\\\\\\\\n  hangupChannel,\\\\\\\\n  answerChannel,\\\\\\\\n  holdChannel,\\\\\\\\n  unholdChannel,\\\\\\\\n  redirectChannel,\\\\\\\\n  originateIntoStasis,\\\\\\\\n  stopMohOnChannel,\\\\\\\\n} from '../asterisk-ari.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getPendingCustomerChannel, tryNextQueueAgent, hangupBridgedQueueCall, answerQueueCallWithLoginChannel, getAgentLoginChannel, transferBridgedCallToExtension } from '../ari-stasis-queue.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { subscribe, broadcastToWallboard } from '../realtime.js';\\\\\\\\nimport {\\\\\\\\n  setAgentAnswered,\\\\\\\\n  setAgentHangup,\\\\\\\\n  broadcastAgentStatus,\\\\\\\\n  createCallRecord,\\\\\\\\n} from '../call-handler.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { setExtensionAgentUserId } from '../agent-extension-resolver.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { endAgentSession, logAgentStatusChange } from '../agent-sessions.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst router = express.Router();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction requireAgent(req, res, next) {\\\\\\\\n  const user = req.session?.user;\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: 'Not authenticated' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (user.role !== 'agent') {\\\\\\\\n    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, error: 'Agent access required' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  req.agentUser = user;\\\\\\\\n  next();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.use(requireAgent);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * SSE stream for real-time events (incoming call, call answered, call ended, agent status).\\\\\\\\n * Client uses EventSource with credentials.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/events', (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');\\\\\\\\n  res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-transform');\\\\\\\\n  res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');\\\\\\\\n  res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');\\\\\\\\n  res.flushHeaders?.();\\\\\\\\n  subscribe(req.agentUser.id, res);\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nrouter.get('/extensions', async (req, res) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const tenantId = req.agentUser.parent_id;\\\\\\\\n    const userId = req.agentUser.id;\\\\\\\\n    if (tenantId == null) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.json({ success: true, extensions: [] });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Option 2 (bound): agent only sees their assigned extension (sip_extensions.agent_user_id = this user)\\\\\\\\n    let rows;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT e.id, e.name,\\\\\\\\n          (u.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS in_use,\\\\\\\\n          (u.user_id = ?) AS in_use_by_me\\\\\\\\n         FROM sip_extensions e\\\\\\\\n         LEFT JOIN agent_extension_usage u ON u.extension_id = e.id\\\\\\\\n         WHERE e.tenant_id = ? AND e.agent_user_id = ?\\\\\\\\n         ORDER BY e.name&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        [userId, tenantId, userId]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    } catch (joinErr) {\\\\\\\\n      const msg = String(joinErr?.message || joinErr || '');\\\\\\\\n      if (msg.includes('agent_extension_usage') || msg.includes(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"doesn't exist\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") || joinErr?.code === 'ER_NO_SUCH_TABLE') {\\\\\\\\n        rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT id, name FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND agent_user_id = ? ORDER BY name',\\\\\\\\n          [tenantId, userId]\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        rows = rows.map((r) =&gt; ({ ...r, in_use: 0, in_use_by_me: 0 }));\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        throw joinErr;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // If agent has phone_login_number set but no bound extension, try to bind the matching unbound extension (self-heal)\\\\\\\\n    if (rows.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      const userRow = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n        'SELECT phone_login_number FROM users WHERE id = ? AND role = 5 LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n        [userId]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      const phoneNum = userRow?.phone_login_number != null ? String(userRow.phone_login_number).trim() : null;\\\\\\\\n      if (phoneNum) {\\\\\\\\n        const unbound = await queryOne(\\\\\\\\n          'SELECT id, name FROM sip_extensions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND name = ? AND (agent_user_id IS NULL OR agent_user_id = ?) const userId = req.agentUser.id;\\\\\\\\n    if (tenantId == null) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.json({ success: true, extensions: [] });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Option 2 (bound): agent only sees their assigned extension (sip_extensions.agent_user_id = this user)\\\\\\\\n    let rows;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      rows = await query(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;SELECT e.id, e.name,\\\\\\\\n development\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.js\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":68}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"7a3e2876-b4e9-4bdf-8a74-5d7605b99d9b\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"a5b7f7fd-7cf9-4940-b709-62a99359b37f\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.975Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"**Reviewing agent login flow**\\\\n\\\\nI found a format mismatch in dialplan generation where Stasis is used instead of AgentLogin() as per docs. \\\\n\\\\n**Summarizing queue modes**\\\\n\\\\nI'm compiling a report on the two queue modes and their configuration differences. \\\\n\\\\n**Updating config files**\\\\n\\\\nI'm updating the asterisk config files to match the Stasis-based queue flow. I'm updating asterisk config files to match Stasis-based queue flow with agent-extension binding and queue strategies. I'm synchronizing the dialplan to match Stasis-based queue flow with agent-extension binding and queue strategies. \\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"e995dfb7-8ac2-494a-bad8-2a5758533720\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"c8039621-3cd8-407d-ba00-0a5641fc2a97\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T10:10:34.976Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\nHere is the analysis based on the Asterisk integration code and docs.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Asterisk Integration Analysis\\\\n\\\\n## 1. File Overview\\\\n\\\\n| File | Purpose |\\\\n|------|---------|\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/callcentre.conf** | Single dialplan: inbound, queue (Stasis), extension, agent login |\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/pbx-callcentre.conf** | Full dialplan with Phase 3 (curl) + QueueMembers loop |\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/pbx-inbound.conf** | Inbound/queue/extension only; assumes globals + phase3 elsewhere |\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/phase3-dialplan.conf** | Phase 3 callbacks (IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup) |\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/extensions-globals.conf** | Reference globals for extensions.conf |\\\\n| **docs/asterisk/peerless-outbound.conf** | PJSIP outbound trunk example |\\\\n| **scripts/asterisk-config-receiver/server.js** | HTTP receiver: writes agents.conf, pjsip_custom, pjsip_trunks, callcentre.conf |\\\\n| **server/asterisk-config-sync.js** | Generates and pushes full dialplan including IVR, time conditions, etc. |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Asterisk Features Configured\\\\n\\\\n### 2.1 Inbound Routing\\\\n\\\\n- **InboundRoute** (&#96;/api/asterisk/InboundRoute?DID=...&amp;CallerNumber=...&#96;)  \\\\n  Returns: &#96;CallStatus,Destination_Action,Destination_Value,UserID,CDRID,CampaignName&#96;\\\\n- **Destination_Action**: 0=hangup, 1=announcement, 2=queue, 3=IVR, 4=voicemail, 5=time condition, 9=extension\\\\n- Blacklist lookup before routing; blacklisted numbers get &#96;HANGUP&#96;\\\\n- Campaign names from &#96;inbound_routes.campaign_id&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 2.2 Queues\\\\n\\\\nTwo different flows:\\\\n\\\\n**Option A – Stasis (queue-dashboard, generated by sync)**\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;Stasis(queue-dashboard, QueueName, UNIQUEID)&#96;\\\\n- Customer waits in Stasis; agent phone does not ring until they click Answer\\\\n- Node app selects agent via &#96;queue-strategy.js&#96;, creates bridge, originates to agent when they answer\\\\n\\\\n**Option B – Phase 3 (docs pbx-callcentre.conf)**\\\\n\\\\n- Curl to &#96;QueueMembers&#96;, ring agents in order with Phase 3 callbacks\\\\n- Agent phone rings immediately; no Stasis\\\\n\\\\n### 2.3 Extensions\\\\n\\\\n- Single extension routing via &#96;SipExtension&#96;\\\\n- Phase 3 or notify callbacks: IncomingCall, CallAnswered, CallHangup\\\\n- Extension failover via &#96;/api/asterisk/ExtensionFailover&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 2.4 IVR, Time Conditions, Voicemail\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;/api/asterisk/IVRDetail&#96;, &#96;/IVROptionRoute&#96; – DTMF and Normal IVR\\\\n- &#96;/api/asterisk/TimeCondition&#96; – time-based routing\\\\n- &#96;/api/asterisk/VoicemailDetail&#96; – voicemail greeting and max duration\\\\n- &#96;/api/asterisk/SoundFilePath&#96; – sound playback\\\\n\\\\n### 2.5 Queue Failover\\\\n\\\\n- Queue timeout or no agents → &#96;continueInDialplan('QueueFailover', 's', 1)&#96;\\\\n- App sets &#96;Destination_Action&#96; and &#96;Destination_Value&#96; before redirect\\\\n- Failover targets: hangup, announcement, queue, IVR, voicemail, time condition, extension\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. AMI/ARI Event Handling\\\\n\\\\n### 3.1 ARI WebSocket (queue-dashboard)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;ari-stasis-queue.js&#96; connects to:\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nws://HOST/ari/events?app=queue-dashboard&amp;api_key=user:pass\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\nHandled events:\\\\n\\\\n- **StasisStart** – Customer in Stasis, agent login channel, outbound, supervisor barge, agent bridge\\\\n- **ChannelStateChange** – Add agent/supervisor/outbound channel to bridge when state is &#96;up&#96;\\\\n- **ChannelDestroyed** – Clean up maps, update call records, reassign waiting calls, etc.\\\\n- **StasisEnd** – Customer left Stasis before answer; mark as abandoned\\\\n\\\\n### 3.2 HTTP Callbacks (Phase 3 / legacy)\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;/IncomingCall&#96; – call offered to agent (ringing)\\\\n- &#96;/CallAnswered&#96; – agent answered\\\\n- &#96;/CallHangup&#96; – call ended\\\\n- &#96;/Recording&#96; – store recording path\\\\n\\\\n### 3.3 AMI\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;asterisk-events.js&#96; is a stub: AMI/ARI WebSocket “not yet implemented”; all events come via HTTP callbacks or ARI WebSocket.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. Queue Configuration and Strategy\\\\n\\\\n### 4.1 Strategy (in &#96;queue-strategy.js&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n- **ringall / linear** – Fixed order by &#96;member_name&#96;\\\\n- **rrordered** – Round-robin by position (next agent in list)\\\\n- **rrmemory** – Round-robin by last answered (from &#96;call_records&#96;)\\\\n- **leastrecent** – Oldest &#96;last_called&#96; first\\\\n- **fewestcalls** – Fewest answered calls first\\\\n- **random** – Shuffled order per call\\\\n\\\\nDefault: &#96;rrordered&#96; if not set in DB.\\\\n\\\\n### 4.2 Availability\\\\n\\\\n- Available: &#96;LOGGEDIN&#96;, &#96;Ready&#96;, other non-busy states\\\\n- Busy: &#96;On Call&#96;, &#96;Ringing&#96;, &#96;Transferring&#96;, &#96;Outbound&#96;\\\\n- Excluded: &#96;LoggedOut&#96;, &#96;LoginFailed&#96;, &#96;LoginInitiated&#96;, &#96;SIP Phone Ringing&#96;, &#96;PAUSED&#96;, &#96;Break&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 4.3 Agent Ring Timeout\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;AGENT_RING_TIMEOUT_SEC&#96; (default 20s)\\\\n- If no answer → try next agent; if none left → failover\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Call Routing Logic\\\\n\\\\n### 5.1 Inbound\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nTrunk/DID → from-pstn/from-trunk → inbound\\\\n  → curl InboundRoute(DID, CallerNumber)\\\\n  → WhereToGO (Destination_Action, Destination_Value)\\\\n  → Queue | SipExtension | IVR | Voicemail | TimeCondition | Announcement | Hangup\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 5.2 Queue (Stasis Flow)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nQueue → Stasis(queue-dashboard, QueueName, UNIQUEID)\\\\n  → App gets ordered members via getOrderedQueueMembers(queueName)\\\\n  → notifyAgentForQueueCall → setAgentRinging (if available)\\\\n  → Agent clicks Answer → createBridge, add customer + agent channel\\\\n  → On reject/timeout → tryNextQueueAgent\\\\n  → On queue timeout → redirectToQueueFailover\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 5.3 Outbound\\\\n\\\\n- Agent dials number → ARI &#96;originateIntoStasis(..., 'outbound', [agentChannelId, uniqueId])&#96;\\\\n- Trunk originates call; on answer, bridge to agent channel\\\\n- Uses &#96;DEFAULT_TRUNK&#96; from &#96;sip_trunks&#96; (first trunk)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. Agent Login / Monitoring Integration\\\\n\\\\n### 6.1 SIP Login (ARI Originate)\\\\n\\\\n1. Agent selects extension in UI → POST &#96;/api/agent/calls/login&#96;\\\\n2. &#96;originateAgentLogin(channelId, extensionNumber, 'AgentLogin', { AgentNumber, AgentPassword })&#96;\\\\n3. Asterisk answers, curls &#96;AgentLogin&#96; → &#96;Authenticate(AgentPassword)&#96; → &#96;AgentLogin(AgentNumber)&#96; → curl &#96;AgentLoginSuccess&#96;\\\\n4. Sync’d dialplan: &#96;Stasis(queue-dashboard, login, AgentNumber)&#96; so ARI tracks login channel\\\\n5. &#96;agentLoginStasisChannels.set(agentId, channelId)&#96; – login channel used for queue Answer\\\\n\\\\n### 6.2 Bound Extensions\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; ties an extension to an agent\\\\n- &#96;/api/agent/extensions&#96; returns only the bound extension for that agent\\\\n- Resolver: &#96;agent-extension-resolver.js&#96; (extension → user id)\\\\n\\\\n### 6.3 PJSIP Endpoint Status\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;getPjsipEndpointStates()&#96; – registration status for live monitoring\\\\n- Uses &#96;GET /ari/endpoints/pjsip&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. Potential Issues and Improvements\\\\n\\\\n### 7.1 Dialplan Mismatches\\\\n\\\\n- **docs/callcentre.conf**: &#96;AgentLogin()&#96; then &#96;Hangup()&#96; – no Stasis\\\\n- **asterisk-config-sync.js** generated dialplan: &#96;Stasis(login)&#96; after login – needed for queue-dashboard\\\\n- **docs/pbx-callcentre.conf**: &#96;QueueMembers&#96; + Phase 3 – phone rings immediately\\\\n\\\\nThe app expects Stasis-based login and queue. Docs should be updated so callcentre.conf matches the synced dialplan behavior.\\\\n\\\\n### 7.2 PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME\\\\n\\\\nIn &#96;phase3-dialplan.conf&#96; line 69:\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;conf\\\\nb(pbx-phase3-incoming^s^1(...,^${PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME}^${CallerDnid}))\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;PHASE3_CAMPAIGN_NAME&#96; and &#96;CallerDnid&#96; may not always be set before &#96;pbx-phase3-ring-one&#96;. In the Stasis flow these values come from channel variables instead of Phase 3; for Phase 3 dialplan, they should be set in the inbound context before calling the subroutine.\\\\n\\\\n### 7.3 Recording Paths\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;.env.example&#96;: &#96;RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH&#96;\\\\n- &#96;asterisk-config-sync&#96;: uses &#96;ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH&#96; (default &#96;/var/spool/asterisk/monitor&#96;)\\\\n\\\\nVerify &#96;.env&#96; and config sync use the same variable and path.\\\\n\\\\n### 7.4 Queue Failover PJSIP Endpoint\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;queue-failover&#96; uses dummy &#96;contact=sip:127.0.0.1:9&#96; for redirect compatibility\\\\n- Redirect goes to &#96;QueueFailover&#96; context; &#96;continueInDialplan&#96; is used instead of channel redirect in some paths\\\\n\\\\n### 7.5 Curl Timeouts / Failure Handling\\\\n\\\\n- Dialplan uses &#96;curl -s&#96; with no timeout\\\\n- Slow or failing app can block dialplan; consider adding &#96;--connect-timeout&#96; and &#96;--max-time&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 7.6 No AMI Integration\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;asterisk-events.js&#96; is empty beyond a log message\\\\n- CDR, channel events, etc. rely on HTTP callbacks and ARI WebSocket; no AMI CDR or events\\\\n\\\\n### 7.7 Supervisor Barge / Listen\\\\n\\\\n- Barge/listen implemented in ARI Stasis (originate to BargeMe context)\\\\n- &#96;ChanSpy(${BargeChannel}, qw)&#96; for whisper; mute for listen-only\\\\n\\\\n### 7.8 Multi-Tenant\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;tenant_id&#96; is used in routing and agent resolution\\\\n- &#96;resolveAgentUserByExtensionName(tenantId, ext)&#96; prefers &#96;sip_extensions.agent_user_id&#96; per tenant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. Summary Flow Diagram\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\\\n                    │              ASTERISK (PJSIP)                        │\\\\n                    │  Trunk → inbound → InboundRoute curl → WhereToGO     │\\\\n                    └────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘\\\\n                                             │\\\\n        ┌────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────┐\\\\n        │                                    │                                    │\\\\n        ▼                                    ▼                                    ▼\\\\n   [Queue]                            [SipExtension]                         [IVR/Voicemail/...]\\\\n   Stasis(queue-dashboard)            Phase 3 / notify ring                 DB callbacks\\\\n        │                                    │                                    │\\\\n        ▼                                    ▼                                    ▼\\\\n   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\\\\n   │  Node App: ari-stasis-queue.js, call-handler.js, routes/asterisk.js                      │\\\\n   │  • Queue members by strategy • Agent login (ARI originate) • call_records • agent_status │\\\\n   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 9. Configuration Checklist\\\\n\\\\n| Component | Location | Env Vars |\\\\n|-----------|----------|----------|\\\\n| ARI | Asterisk ari.conf | &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_URL&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_USER&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_ARI_PASSWORD&#96; |\\\\n| App URL (for curl) | Asterisk globals | &#96;ASTERISK_APP_URL&#96; |\\\\n| Config sync | Config receiver | &#96;ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_URL&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_CONFIG_API_KEY&#96; |\\\\n| Stasis app name | Optional | &#96;ASTERISK_STASIS_APP&#96; (default &#96;queue-dashboard&#96;) |\\\\n| Agent ring timeout | Optional | &#96;AGENT_RING_TIMEOUT_SEC&#96; |\\\\n| Recordings | Same server only | &#96;RECORDINGS_BASE_PATH&#96;, &#96;ASTERISK_RECORDING_PATH&#96; |\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1773136589969,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Asterisk <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
